| Block Type | Connection | Parameters (args0 order) | ABS Format | Generated Code |
|------------|------------|--------------------------|------------|----------------|
| `serial_begin` | Statement | SERIAL(dropdown), SPEED(dropdown) | `serial_begin(SERIAL, SPEED)` | See generator |
| `serial_available` | Value | SERIAL(dropdown) | `serial_available(SERIAL)` | ....available() |
| `serial_read` | Value | SERIAL(dropdown), TYPE(dropdown) | `serial_read(SERIAL, "read()")` | Dynamic code |
| `serial_read_until` | Value | SERIAL(dropdown), TERMINATOR(input_value) | `serial_read_until(SERIAL, math_number(0))` | ....readStringUntil(...) |
| `serial_print` | Statement | SERIAL(dropdown), VAR(input_value) | `serial_print(SERIAL, math_number(0))` | ....print(...);\n |
| `serial_println` | Statement | SERIAL(dropdown), VAR(input_value) | `serial_println(SERIAL, math_number(0))` | ....println(...);\n |
| `serial_write` | Statement | SERIAL(dropdown), DATA(input_value) | `serial_write(SERIAL, math_number(0))` | ....write(...);\n |
| `serial_read_string` | Value | SERIAL(dropdown) | `serial_read_string(SERIAL)` | ....readString() |
| `serial_begin_esp32_custom` | Statement | VAR(field_input), UART(dropdown), SPEED(dropdown), RX(dropdown), TX(dropdown) | `serial_begin_esp32_custom("SerialCustom", UART0, SPEED, RX, TX)` | ....begin(..., SERIAL_8N1, ..., ...);\n |
| `serial_begin_software` | Statement | VAR(field_input), SPEED(dropdown), RX(dropdown), TX(dropdown) | `serial_begin_software("mySerial", SPEED, RX, TX)` | ....begin(...);\n |
| `serial_listen_software` | Statement | SERIAL_VAR(field_variable) | `serial_listen_software(variables_get($mySerial))` | ....listen();\n |

## Parameter Options

| Parameter | Values | Description |
|-----------|--------|-------------|
| TYPE | read(), peek(), parseInt(), parseFloat(), readString(), readStringUntil('\r'), readStringUntil('\n'), readStringUntil('\0') | serial_read |
| UART | UART0, UART1 | serial_begin_esp32_custom |

  subgraph PC端
    CC[Claude Code Agent]
  end

  subgraph ESP32-C3硬件
    MCU[ESP32-C3主控]
    USB[USB Serial]
    TFT[0.96寸 TFT ST7735]
    BZ[无源蜂鸣器]
    SOL[5V电磁铁 IRF540N驱动]
    BTN[微动按钮]

    MCU -->|SPI| TFT
    MCU -->|PWM Pin4| BZ
    MCU -->|GPIO Pin3| SOL
    BTN -->|GPIO Pin2 INT| MCU
    USB --> MCU
  end

  subgraph 状态机
    IDLE[💤 Idle 休息]
    THINK[🤔 Thinking 思考]
    CODE[💻 Coding 写代码]
    DONE[✅ Done 完成]
    PERM[⚠️ Permission 权限]
  end

  CC -->|Serial JSON| USB
  MCU -->|按键事件 Serial| CC
  MCU --> IDLE
  MCU --> THINK
  MCU --> CODE
  MCU --> DONE
  MCU --> PERM

  IDLE -->|TFT动画| TFT
  THINK -->|TFT动画+蜂鸣| BZ
  CODE -->|TFT动画| TFT
  DONE -->|TFT动画+电磁铁+蜂鸣| SOL
  PERM -->|TFT动画+电磁铁急促| SOL"}

call_00_Wf2CfpPgB0MbXhRHVHeO7659.content:
# logic control

Core library for logic control

## Library Info
- **Name**: @aily-project/lib-core-logic
- **Version**: 0.0.1

## Block Definitions

| Block Type | Connection | Parameters (args0 order) | ABS Format | Generated Code |
|------------|------------|--------------------------|------------|----------------|
| `controls_if` | Statement | IF0(input_value), DO0(input_statement) | `controls_if(math_number(0)) @DO0: child_block()` | Dynamic code |
| `controls_ifelse` | Statement | IF0(input_value), DO0(input_statement), ELSE(input_statement) | `controls_ifelse(math_number(0)) @DO0: child_block() @ELSE: child_block()` | See generator |
| `controls_switch` | Statement | SWITCH(input_value), CASE0(input_value), DO0(input_statement), DEFAULT(input_statement) | `controls_switch(math_number(0), math_number(0)) @DO0: child_block() @DEFAULT: child_block()` | Dynamic code |
| `logic_compare` | Value | A(input_value), OP(dropdown), B(input_value) | `logic_compare(math_number(0), EQ, math_number(0))` | Dynamic code |
| `logic_operation` | Value | A(input_value), OP(dropdown), B(input_value) | `logic_operation(math_number(0), AND, math_number(0))` | Dynamic code |
| `logic_negate` | Value | BOOL(input_value) | `logic_negate(logic_boolean(TRUE))` | Dynamic code |
| `logic_boolean` | Value | BOOL(dropdown) | `logic_boolean(true)` | Dynamic code |
| `logic_ternary` | Value | IF(input_value), THEN(input_value), ELSE(input_value) | `logic_ternary(logic_boolean(TRUE), math_number(0), math_number(0))` | Dynamic code |

## Parameter Options

| Parameter | Values | Description |
|-----------|--------|-------------|
| OP | EQ, NEQ, LT, GT, GTE, LTE | logic_compare |
| OP | AND, OR | logic_operation |
| BOOL | true, false | logic_boolean |

## ABS Examples

### Basic Usage
```
arduino_setup()
    controls_if(math_number(0)) @DO0: child_block()
    serial_begin(Serial, 9600)

arduino_loop()
    serial_println(Serial, logic_compare(math_number(0), EQ, math_number(0)))
    time_delay(math_number(1000))
```

## Notes

1. **Parameter order**: ABS parameters follow `block.json` args order.
2. **Input values**: use `math_number(n)`, `text("s")`, `logic_boolean(TRUE/FALSE)`, variables, or nested value blocks.
3. **Dynamic fields**: `controls_if`, `controls_ifelse`, `logic_operation`, `logic_ternary` may add fields at runtime through Blockly extensions.

call_01_ESm8dke9pop8bL8L8tFY6061.content:
# variable

Core library, usually already integrated into the initial template

## Library Info
- **Name**: @aily-project/lib-core-variables
- **Version**: 1.0.1

## Block Definitions

| Block Type | Connection | Parameters (args0 order) | ABS Format | Generated Code |
|------------|------------|--------------------------|------------|----------------|
| `variable_define` | Statement | VAR(field_input), TYPE(dropdown), VALUE(input_value) | `variable_define("variable", int8_t, math_number(0))` | ... ... = ...;\n |
| `variable_define_scoped` | Statement | SCOPE(dropdown), VAR(field_input), TYPE(dropdown), VALUE(input_value) | `variable_define_scoped(global, "variable", int8_t, math_number(0))` | ... ... = ...;\n |
| `variable_define_advanced` | Statement | STORAGE(dropdown), QUALIFIER(dropdown), VAR(field_input), TYPE(dropdown), VALUE(input_value) | `variable_define_advanced(STORAGE, QUALIFIER, "variable", int8_t, math_number(0))` | Dynamic code |
| `variable_define_advanced_scoped` | Statement | SCOPE(dropdown), STORAGE(dropdown), QUALIFIER(dropdown), VAR(field_input), TYPE(dropdown), VALUE(input_value) | `variable_define_advanced_scoped(global, STORAGE, QUALIFIER, "variable", int8_t, math_number(0))` | Dynamic code |
| `variables_get` | Value | VAR(field_variable) | `variables_get(variables_get($variable))` | Dynamic code |
| `variables_set` | Statement | VAR(field_variable), VALUE(input_value) | `variables_set(variables_get($variable), math_number(0))` | ... = ...;\n |
| `type_cast` | Value | VALUE(input_value), TYPE(dropdown) | `type_cast(math_number(0), int8_t)` | Dynamic code |

## Parameter Options

| Parameter | Values | Description |
|-----------|--------|-------------|
| TYPE | int8_t, int16_t, int32_t, int64_t, uint8_t, uint16_t, uint32_t, uint64_t, ---, int, long, float, double, unsigned int, unsigned long, ---, bool, char, byte, String, ... | variable_define, variable_define_scoped, variable_define_advanced |
| SCOPE | global, local | variable_define_scoped, variable_define_advanced_scoped |
| STORAGE | , static, extern | variable_define_advanced, variable_define_advanced_scoped |
| QUALIFIER | , const, volatile, const volatile | variable_define_advanced, variable_define_advanced_scoped |

## ABS Examples

### Basic Usage
```
arduino_setup()
    variable_define("variable", int8_t, math_number(0))
    serial_begin(Serial, 9600)

arduino_loop()
    serial_println(Serial, variables_get(variables_get($variable)))
    time_delay(math_number(1000))
```

## Notes

1. **Variable**: `variable_define("varName", ...)` creates variable `$varName`; reference it later with `variables_get($varName)`.
2. **Parameter order**: ABS parameters follow `block.json` args order.
3. **Input values**: use `math_number(n)`, `text("s")`, `logic_boolean(TRUE/FALSE)`, variables, or nested value blocks.
4. **Dynamic fields**: `variables_get`, `variables_set` may add fields at runtime through Blockly extensions.

# ============================================
# Blockly ABS File - Claude Code Status Monitor
# ESP32-C3 + 0.96" TFT(ST7735) + Buzzer + Solenoid + Button
# ============================================

arduino_global()
    custom_macro("TFT_CS", "10")
    custom_macro("TFT_DC", "9")
    custom_macro("TFT_RST", "8")
    custom_macro("TFT_BLK", "5")
    custom_macro("PIN_BUZZER", "4")
    custom_macro("PIN_SOLENOID", "3")
    custom_macro("PIN_BUTTON", "2")
    variables_define("gState", int, math_number(0))
    variables_define("gLastState", int, math_number(-1))
    variables_define("gAnimFrame", int, math_number(0))
    variables_define("gLastAnim", unsigned_long, math_number(0))
    variables_define("gMuted", int, math_number(0))
    variables_define("gBtnFlag", int, math_number(0))
    variables_define("gSolenoidEnd", unsigned_long, math_number(0))

arduino_setup()
    serial_begin(Serial, 115200)
    tft_init(ST7735, math_number(10), math_number(9), math_number(7), math_number(6), math_number(8), math_number(5), math_number(160), math_number(80))
    tft_set_rotation("1")
    tft_fill_screen(tft_color565(math_number(0), math_number(0), math_number(0)))
    tft_set_text_size(math_number(2))
    tft_set_text_color(tft_color565(math_number(0), math_number(255), math_number(128)), tft_color565(math_number(0), math_number(0), math_number(0)))
    tft_print(math_number(5), math_number(20), text("Claude"))
    tft_print(math_number(25), math_number(30), text("Monitor"))
    time_delay(math_number(1500))
    io_pinmode(math_number(3), io_mode(OUTPUT))
    io_digitalwrite(math_number(3), io_state(LOW))
    io_pinmode(math_number(4), io_mode(OUTPUT))
    io_pinmode(math_number(2), io_mode(INPUT_PULLUP))
    io_attach_interrupt(2, FALLING) @HANDLER:
        variables_set($gBtnFlag, math_number(1))

arduino_loop()
    comment("=== Read Serial ===")
    controls_if(logic_compare(GTE, serial_available(Serial), math_number(1))) @DO:
        custom_code("String jsonStr = Serial.readStringUntil('\n'); jsonStr.trim();")
        custom_code("if(jsonStr == \"idle\") gState = 0;")
        custom_code("else if(jsonStr == \"thinking\") gState = 1;")
        custom_code("else if(jsonStr == \"coding\") gState = 2;")
        custom_code("else if(jsonStr == \"done\") gState = 3;")
        custom_code("else if(jsonStr == \"permission\") gState = 4;")
    comment("=== Button Check ===")
    controls_if(logic_compare(EQ, variables_get($gBtnFlag), math_number(1))) @DO:
        variables_set($gBtnFlag, math_number(0))
        time_delay(math_number(40))
        controls_if(logic_compare(EQ, io_digitalread(math_number(2)), io_state(LOW))) @DO:
            comment("=== Button held - measure duration ===")
            custom_code("unsigned long start = millis(); while(digitalRead(2) == LOW && millis() - start < 1200) { delay(20); }")
            custom_code("unsigned long held = millis() - start;")
            comment("=== Long press > 700ms = mute toggle ===")
            custom_code("if(held > 700) {")
            custom_code("  gMuted = !gMuted;")
            custom_code("  if(gMuted) { Serial.println(\"muted\"); }")
            custom_code("  else { tone(4, 800, 100); Serial.println(\"unmuted\"); }")
            custom_code("} else {")
            custom_code("  Serial.println(\"btn\");")
            custom_code("  tone(4, 1000, 50);")
            custom_code("}")
    comment("=== State change: reset screen ===")
    controls_if(logic_compare(NEQ, variables_get($gState), variables_get($gLastState))) @DO:
        variables_set($gLastState, variables_get($gState))
        variables_set($gAnimFrame, math_number(0))
        tft_fill_screen(tft_color565(math_number(0), math_number(0), math_number(0)))
        custom_code("if(gState == 3) { gSolenoidEnd = millis() + 300; digitalWrite(3, HIGH); }")
        custom_code("if(gState == 4) { gSolenoidEnd = millis() + 200; digitalWrite(3, HIGH); }")
    comment("=== IDLE Animation ===")
    controls_if(logic_compare(EQ, variables_get($gState), math_number(0))) @DO:
        custom_code("static unsigned long idleT = 0; if(millis() - idleT > 600) { idleT = millis(); gAnimFrame = (gAnimFrame + 1) % 4;")
        custom_code("  tft.fillScreen(ST77XX_BLACK);")

        custom_code("  tft.setTextColor(ST77XX_WHITE); tft.print(\"Z\");")
        custom_code("  if(gAnimFrame >= 1) { tft.print(\"z\"); } if(gAnimFrame >= 2) { tft.print(\"z\"); }")
        custom_code("  if(gAnimFrame == 3) { tft.print(\".\"); }")
        custom_code("  tft.setTextSize(1); tft.setCursor(10, 60); tft.setTextColor(ST77XX_CYAN); tft.print(\"[WORK IS OVER]\");")
        custom_code("  if(!gMuted && gAnimFrame == 0) tone(4, 440, 30); }")
    comment("=== THINKING Animation ===")

    tft_print(math_number(25), math_number(30), text("Monitor"))
    time_delay(math_number(1500))
    io_pinmode(math_number(3), io_mode(OUTPUT))
    io_digitalwrite(math_number(3), io_state(LOW))
    io_pinmode(math_number(4), io_mode(OUTPUT))
    io_pinmode(math_number(2), io_mode(INPUT_PULLUP))
    io_attach_interrupt(2, FALLING)
        variables_set(variables_get($gBtnFlag), math_number(1))

arduino_loop()
    comment("=== Read Serial ===")
    controls_if(logic_compare(GTE, serial_available(Serial), math_number(1)))
        custom_code("String jsonStr = Serial.readStringUntil('\n'); jsonStr.trim();")
        custom_code("if(jsonStr == \"idle\") gState = 0;")
        custom_code("else if(jsonStr == \"thinking\") gState = 1;")
        custom_code("else if(jsonStr == \"coding\") gState = 2;")
        custom_code("else if(jsonStr == \"done\") gState = 3;")
        custom_code("else if(jsonStr == \"permission\") gState = 4;")
    comment("=== Button Check ===")
    controls_if(logic_compare(EQ, variables_get($gBtnFlag), math_number(1)))
        variables_set(variables_get($gBtnFlag), math_number(0))
        time_delay(math_number(40))
        controls_if(logic_compare(EQ, io_digitalread(math_number(2)), io_state(LOW)))
            comment("=== Measure hold duration ===")
            custom_code("unsigned long start = millis(); while(digitalRead(2) == LOW && millis() - start < 1200) { delay(20); }")
            custom_code("unsigned long held = millis() - start;")
            comment("=== Long press > 700ms = mute toggle ===")
            custom_code("if(held > 700) {")
            custom_code("  gMuted = !gMuted;")
            custom_code("  if(gMuted) { Serial.println(\"muted\"); }")
            custom_code("  else { tone(4, 800, 100); Serial.println(\"unmuted\"); }")
            custom_code("} else {")
            custom_code("  Serial.println(\"btn\");")
            custom_code("  tone(4, 1000, 50);")
            custom_code("}")
    comment("=== State change: reset screen ===")
    controls_if(logic_compare(NEQ, variables_get($gState), variables_get($gLastState)))
        variables_set(variables_get($gLastState), variables_get($gState))
        variables_set(variables_get($gAnimFrame), math_number(0))
        tft_fill_screen(tft_color565(math_number(0), math_number(0), math_number(0)))
        custom_code("if(gState == 3) { gSolenoidEnd = millis() + 300; digitalWrite(3, HIGH); }")
        custom_code("if(gState == 4) { gSolenoidEnd = millis() + 200; digitalWrite(3, HIGH); }")
    comment("=== IDLE Animation ===")
    controls_if(logic_compare(EQ, variables_get($gState), math_number(0)))
        custom_code("static unsigned long idleT = 0; if(millis() - idleT > 600) { idleT = millis(); gAnimFrame = (gAnimFrame + 1) % 4;")
        custom_code("  tft.fillScreen(ST77XX_BLACK); tft.setTextSize(3); tft.setCursor(25, 20); tft.setTextColor(ST77XX_WHITE); tft.print(\"Z\");")
        custom_code("  if(gAnimFrame >= 1) { tft.print(\"z\"); } if(gAnimFrame >= 2) { tft.print(\"z\"); }")
        custom_code("  if(gAnimFrame == 3) { tft.print(\".\"); }")
        custom_code("  tft.setTextSize(1); tft.setCursor(10, 60); tft.setTextColor(ST77XX_CYAN); tft.print(\"[WORK IS OVER]\");")
        custom_code("  if(!gMuted && gAnimFrame == 0) tone(4, 440, 30); }")
    comment("=== THINKING Animation ===")
    controls_if(logic_compare(EQ, variables_get($gState), math_number(1)))
        custom_code("static unsigned long thinkT = 0; if(millis() - thinkT > 400) { thinkT = millis(); gAnimFrame = (gAnimFrame + 1) % 6;")
        custom_code("  tft.fillScreen(ST77XX_BLACK); tft.setTextSize(2); tft.setCursor(10, 5); tft.setTextColor(ST77XX_YELLOW); tft.print(\"Thinking\");")
        custom_code("  int cx = 80, cy = 50; for(int i = 0; i < gAnimFrame; i++) { int r = 8 + i * 6; tft.drawCircle(cx, cy, r, ST77XX_YELLOW); }")
        custom_code("  if(!gMuted) tone(4, 600 + gAnimFrame * 80, 30); }")
    comment("=== CODING Animation ===")
    controls_if(logic_compare(EQ, variables_get($gState), math_number(2)))
        custom_code("static unsigned long codeT = 0; if(millis() - codeT > 250) { codeT = millis(); gAnimFrame = (gAnimFrame + 1) % 8;")
        custom_code("  tft.fillScreen(ST77XX_BLACK); tft.setTextSize(1); tft.setTextColor(ST77XX_GREEN);")
        custom_code("  for(int i = 0; i < 7; i++) { tft.setCursor(5, 5 + i * 10); if((gAnimFrame + i) % 4 == 0) tft.print(\"> \"); else tft.print(\"  \"); tft.print(i); tft.print(\" line()\"); }")
        custom_code("  if(!gMuted && gAnimFrame == 0) tone(4, 1000, 20); }")
    comment("=== DONE Animation ===")
    controls_if(logic_compare(EQ, variables_get($gState), math_number(3)))
        custom_code("static unsigned long doneT = 0; if(millis() - doneT > 500) { doneT = millis(); gAnimFrame = (gAnimFrame + 1) % 3;")
        custom_code("  tft.fillScreen(ST77XX_BLACK); tft.setTextSize(3); tft.setTextColor(ST77XX_GREEN); tft.setCursor(30, 10); tft.print(\"OK!\");")
        custom_code("  if(gAnimFrame == 1) { tft.fillCircle(80, 50, 15, ST77XX_GREEN); } else { tft.drawCircle(80, 50, 15, ST77XX_GREEN); }")
        custom_code("  if(!gMuted) tone(4, 1500, 80); }")
    comment("=== PERMISSION Animation ===")
    controls_if(logic_compare(EQ, variables_get($gState), math_number(4)))
        custom_code("static unsigned long permT = 0; if(millis() - permT > 300) { permT = millis(); gAnimFrame = !gAnimFrame;")
        custom_code("  tft.fillScreen(gAnimFrame ? ST77XX_RED : ST77XX_BLACK); tft.setTextSize(2); tft.setCursor(5, 15); tft.setTextColor(ST77XX_WHITE);")
        custom_code("  tft.print(\"PRESS\"); tft.setCursor(10, 45); tft.print(\"BUTTON\");")
        custom_code("  if(!gMuted) tone(4, gAnimFrame ? 2000 : 800, 100);")
        custom_code("  gSolenoidEnd = millis() + 150; digitalWrite(3, gAnimFrame); }")
    comment("=== Solenoid off ===")
    controls_if(logic_compare(GTE, time_millis(), variables_get($gSolenoidEnd)))
        io_digitalwrite(math_number(3), io_state(LOW))
    time_delay(math_number(30))

{"content": "# ============================================
# Blockly ABS File - Claude Code Status Monitor
# ESP32-C3 + 0.96" TFT(ST7735) + Buzzer + Solenoid + Button
# ============================================

arduino_global()
    custom_code("#define TFT_CS   10\n#define TFT_DC   9\n#define TFT_RST  8\n#define TFT_BLK  5\n#define PIN_BUZZER    4\n#define PIN_SOLENOID  3\n#define PIN_BUTTON    2")
    variable_define_scoped(global, "gState", int, math_number(0))
    variable_define_scoped(global, "gLastState", int, math_number(-1))
    variable_define_scoped(global, "gAnimFrame", int, math_number(0))
    variable_define_scoped(global, "gMuted", int, math_number(0))
    variable_define_scoped(global, "gBtnFlag", int, math_number(0))
    variable_define_scoped(global, "gSolenoidEnd", unsigned long, math_number(0))
    custom_code("void IRAM_ATTR onButton() { gBtnFlag = 1; }")

arduino_setup()
    serial_begin(Serial, 115200)
    tft_init(ST7735, math_number(10), math_number(9), math_number(7), math_number(6), math_number(8), math_number(5), math_number(160), math_number(80))
    tft_set_rotation("1")
    tft_fill_screen(tft_color565(math_number(0), math_number(0), math_number(0)))
    tft_set_text_size(math_number(2))
    tft_set_text_color(tft_color565(math_number(0), math_number(255), math_number(128)), tft_color565(math_number(0), math_number(0), math_number(0)))
    tft_print(math_number(5), math_number(20), text("Claude"))
    tft_print(math_number(25), math_number(30), text("Monitor"))
    time_delay(math_number(1500))
    io_pinmode(math_number(3), io_mode(OUTPUT))
    io_digitalwrite(math_number(3), io_state(LOW))
    io_pinmode(math_number(4), io_mode(OUTPUT))
    io_pinmode(math_number(2), io_mode(INPUT_PULLUP))
    custom_code("attachInterrupt(digitalPinToInterrupt(2), onButton, FALLING);")

arduino_loop()
    controls_if(logic_compare(serial_available(Serial), GTE, math_number(1)))
        custom_code("String s = Serial.readStringUntil('\n'); s.trim();\nif(s == \"idle\")      gState = 0;\nelse if(s == \"thinking\") gState = 1;\nelse if(s == \"coding\")   gState = 2;\nelse if(s == \"done\")     gState = 3;\nelse if(s == \"permission\") gState = 4;")
    controls_if(logic_compare(variables_get($gBtnFlag), EQ, math_number(1)))
        variables_set($gBtnFlag, math_number(0))
        time_delay(math_number(40))
        controls_if(logic_compare(io_digitalread(math_number(2)), EQ, io_state(LOW)))
            custom_code("unsigned long start = millis();\nwhile(digitalRead(2) == LOW && millis() - start < 1200) { delay(20); }\nunsigned long held = millis() - start;\nif(held > 700) {\n  gMuted = !gMuted;\n  if(gMuted) { Serial.println(\"muted\"); }\n  else { tone(4, 800, 100); Serial.println(\"unmuted\"); }\n} else {\n  Serial.println(\"btn\");\n  tone(4, 1000, 50);\n}")
    controls_if(logic_compare(variables_get($gState), NEQ, variables_get($gLastState)))
        variables_set($gLastState, variables_get($gState))
        variables_set($gAnimFrame, math_number(0))
        tft_fill_screen(tft_color565(math_number(0), math_number(0), math_number(0)))
        custom_code("if(gState == 3) { gSolenoidEnd = millis() + 300; digitalWrite(3, HIGH); }\nif(gState == 4) { gSolenoidEnd = millis() + 200; digitalWrite(3, HIGH); }")
    controls_if(logic_compare(variables_get($gState), EQ, math_number(0)))
        custom_code("static unsigned long idleT = 0;\nif(millis() - idleT > 600) {\n  idleT = millis(); gAnimFrame = (gAnimFrame + 1) % 4;\n  tft.fillScreen(ST77XX_BLACK);\n  tft.setTextSize(3); tft.setCursor(25, 20); tft.setTextColor(ST77XX_WHITE); tft.print(\"Z\");\n  if(gAnimFrame >= 1) tft.print(\"z\");\n  if(gAnimFrame >= 2) tft.print(\"z\");\n  if(gAnimFrame == 3) tft.print(\".\");\n  tft.setTextSize(1); tft.setCursor(10, 60); tft.setTextColor(ST77XX_CYAN); tft.print(\"[WORK IS OVER]\");\n  if(!gMuted && gAnimFrame == 0) tone(4, 440, 30);\n}")
    controls_if(logic_compare(variables_get($gState), EQ, math_number(1)))
        custom_code("static unsigned long thinkT = 0;\nif(millis() - thinkT > 400) {\n  thinkT = millis(); gAnimFrame = (gAnimFrame + 1) % 6;\n  tft.fillScreen(ST77XX_BLACK); tft.setTextSize(2); tft.setCursor(10, 5); tft.setTextColor(ST77XX_YELLOW); tft.print(\"Thinking\");\n  for(int i = 0; i < gAnimFrame; i++) { tft.drawCircle(80, 50, 8 + i * 6, ST77XX_YELLOW); }\n  if(!gMuted) tone(4, 600 + gAnimFrame * 80, 30);\n}")
    controls_if(logic_compare(variables_get($gState), EQ, math_number(2)))
        custom_code("static unsigned long codeT = 0;\nif(millis() - codeT > 250) {\n  codeT = millis(); gAnimFrame = (gAnimFrame + 1) % 8;\n  tft.fillScreen(ST77XX_BLACK); tft.setTextSize(1); tft.setTextColor(ST77XX_GREEN);\n  for(int i = 0; i < 7; i++) {\n    tft.setCursor(5, 5 + i * 10);\n    tft.print(((gAnimFrame + i) % 4 == 0) ? \"> \" : \"  \");\n    tft.print(i); tft.print(\" line()\");\n  }\n  if(!gMuted && gAnimFrame == 0) tone(4, 1000, 20);\n}")
    controls_if(logic_compare(variables_get($gState), EQ, math_number(3)))
        custom_code("static unsigned long doneT = 0;\nif(millis() - doneT > 500) {\n  doneT = millis(); gAnimFrame = (gAnimFrame + 1) % 3;\n  tft.fillScreen(ST77XX_BLACK); tft.setTextSize(3); tft.setTextColor(ST77XX_GREEN); tft.setCursor(30, 10); tft.print(\"OK!\");\n  if(gAnimFrame == 1) tft.fillCircle(80, 50, 15, ST77XX_GREEN);\n  else tft.drawCircle(80, 50, 15, ST77XX_GREEN);\n  if(!gMuted) tone(4, 1500, 80);\n}")
    controls_if(logic_compare(variables_get($gState), EQ, math_number(4)))
        custom_code("static unsigned long permT = 0;\nif(millis() - permT > 300) {\n  permT = millis(); gAnimFrame = !gAnimFrame;\n  tft.fillScreen(gAnimFrame ? ST77XX_RED : ST77XX_BLACK);\n  tft.setTextSize(2); tft.setTextColor(ST77XX_WHITE);\n  tft.setCursor(5, 15); tft.print(\"PRESS\");\n  tft.setCursor(10, 45); tft.print(\"BUTTON\");\n  if(!gMuted) tone(4, gAnimFrame ? 2000 : 800, 100);\n  gSolenoidEnd = millis() + 150;\n  digitalWrite(3, gAnimFrame);\n}")
    controls_if(logic_compare(time_millis(), GTE, variables_get($gSolenoidEnd)))
        io_digitalwrite(math_number(3), io_state(LOW))
    time_delay(math_number(30))
", "path": "C:\Users\13273\Documents\aily-project\project_jun08a\project.abs", "replaceMode": "whole"}

        custom_code("static unsigned long idleT = 0;\nif(millis() - idleT > 600) {\n  idleT = millis(); gAnimFrame = (gAnimFrame + 1) % 4;\n  tft.fillScreen(ST77XX_BLACK);\n  tft.setTextSize(3); tft.setCursor(25, 20); tft.setTextColor(ST77XX_WHITE); tft.print(\"Z\");\n  if(gAnimFrame >= 1) tft.print(\"z\");\n  if(gAnimFrame >= 2) tft.print(\"z\");\n  if(gAnimFrame == 3) tft.print(\".\");\n  tft.setTextSize(1); tft.setCursor(10, 60); tft.setTextColor(ST77XX_CYAN); tft.print(\"[WORK IS OVER]\");\n  if(!gMuted && gAnimFrame == 0) tone(4, 440, 30);\n}")

    controls_if(logic_compare(variables_get($gState), EQ, math_number(3)))
        custom_code("static unsigned long doneT = 0;\nif(millis() - doneT > 500) {\n  doneT = millis(); gAnimFrame = (gAnimFrame + 1) % 3;\n  tft.fillScreen(ST77XX_BLACK); tft.setTextSize(3); tft.setTextColor(ST77XX_GREEN); tft.setCursor(30, 10); tft.print(\"OK!\");\n  if(gAnimFrame == 1) tft.fillCircle(80, 50, 15, ST77XX_GREEN);\n  else tft.drawCircle(80, 50, 15, ST77XX_GREEN);\n  if(!gMuted) tone(4, 1500, 80);\n}")

[schematicAgent] 连线图已生成并保存成功！✅

## 📋 项目接线总结

根据你的代码分析，项目使用 **ESP32C3** 开发板连接以下 **4 个外设**：

### 🔌 ST7735 TFT 显示屏
| 开发板引脚 | 显示屏引脚 | 说明 |
|-----------|-----------|------|
| 3V3 | VCC | 电源 |
| GND | GND | 接地 |
| GPIO10 | CS | 片选 |
| GPIO9 (SCL) | DC | 数据/命令 |
| GPIO7 (SS) | MOSI | SPI 数据 |
| GPIO6 (MOSI) | SCLK | SPI 时钟 |
| GPIO8 (SDA) | RST | 复位 |
| 3V3 | BL | 背光 |

### 🔔 蜂鸣器
| 开发板引脚 | 蜂鸣器引脚 | 说明 |
|-----------|-----------|------|
| 3V3 | VCC | 电源 |
| GND | GND | 接地 |
| GPIO4 (SCK) | SIG | PWM 信号 (tone) |

### 🔘 按钮
| 开发板引脚 | 按钮引脚 | 说明 |
|-----------|---------|------|
| GND | GND | 接地 |
| GPIO2 | SIG | 数字输入 (INPUT_PULLUP) |

### ⚡ 电磁阀
| 开发板引脚 | 电磁阀引脚 | 说明 |
|-----------|---------|------|
| 3V3 | VCC | 电源 |
| GND | GND | 接地 |
| GPIO3 | SIG | 数字输出 |

> ⚠️ 有 3 条警告（3V3/GND 被多个组件共享属于正常，按钮无独立电源连接因为是 INPUT_PULLUP 模式），均不影响正常使用。

点击右侧工具栏的 **「电路连接」** 按钮即可查看连线图。

TERMINATE

    custom_code("#define TFT_CS 10\n#define TFT_DC 9\n#define TFT_RST 8\n#define TFT_BLK 5\n#define PIN_BUZZER 4\n#define PIN_SOLENOID 3\n#define PIN_BUTTON 2")

arduino_setup()
    serial_begin(Serial, 115200)
    tft_init(ST7735, math_number(10), math_number(9), math_number(7), math_number(6), math_number(8), math_number(5), math_number(160), math_number(80))
    tft_set_rotation("1")
    tft_fill_screen(tft_color565(math_number(0), math_number(0), math_number(0)))

    tft_print(math_number(25), math_number(30), text("Monitor"))
    time_delay(math_number(1500))
    io_pinmode(math_number(3), io_mode(OUTPUT))
    io_digitalwrite(math_number(3), io_state(LOW))
    io_pinmode(math_number(4), io_mode(OUTPUT))
    io_pinmode(math_number(2), io_mode(INPUT_PULLUP))

    controls_if(logic_compare(variables_get($gState), NEQ, variables_get($gLastState)))

response.content:
编译通过。接下来三步：

1. **按接线图连硬件**：面包板或焊接，TFT 用 SPI（GPIO10/9/7/6/8/5），蜂鸣器接 GPIO4，电磁铁接 GPIO3，按钮接 GPIO2
2. **烧录固件**：用 USB 连接 ESP32-C3，在 Aily Blockly 中点击烧录
3. **PC 端脚本**：需要一个脚本监控 Claude Code 状态，通过串口发 `idle`/`thinking`/`coding`/`done`/`permission` 给 ESP32，并监听 `btn` 响应来确认权限

需要我帮你写 PC 端的 Python 串口通信脚本吗？

request.content: 目前我用的是什么模型，帮我查看一下

response.content: 目前无法直接查询模型信息，这个超出了我能获取的系统信息范围。你可以通过界面设置或帮助菜单查看当前使用的模型名称。

ESP32-C3 SuperMini 搜索结果中没有专门的板子配置，但当前项目使用的 `board-esp32c3` (Generic ESP32-C3) 和 SuperMini **完全兼容**，因为它们都是同一芯片。

**ESP32-C3 SuperMini 引脚布局**（典型）：
- GPIO 0-10 可用
- USB CDC（原生 USB 串口）
- 4MB Flash

**当前代码引脚分配**：
| 功能 | GPIO | 说明 |
|------|------|------|
| TFT CS | 10 | ✅ 可用 |
| TFT DC | 9 | ✅ 可用 |
| TFT MOSI | 7 | ✅ 可用 |
| TFT SCLK | 6 | ✅ 可用 |
| TFT RST | 8 | ✅ 可用 |
| TFT BLK | 5 | ✅ 可用 |
| 蜂鸣器 | 4 | ✅ 可用 |
| 电磁铁 | 3 | ✅ 可用 |
| 按钮 | 2 | ✅ 可用 |

引脚配置没问题，可以直接烧录。SuperMini 通过 USB-C 连接电脑，烧录时选择正确的 COM 端口即可。

response.content:
[schematicAgent] 连线图已重新生成并保存成功！✅

## 连线方案总结

根据代码分析，当前项目包含 **ESP32C3** 开发板和以下 **4 个外设**，共 **16 条连线**：

### 1. ST7735 TFT 显示屏 (SPI 接口)
| 开发板引脚 | → | ST7735 引脚 | 类型 |
|-----------|---|------------|------|
| 3V3 | → | VCC | 电源 |
| GND | → | GND | 接地 |
| 3V3 | → | BL | 背光电源 |
| GPIO10 | → | CS | SPI 片选 |
| GPIO9 | → | DC | 数字控制 |
| GPIO7 | → | MOSI | SPI 数据 |
| GPIO6 | → | SCLK | SPI 时钟 |
| GPIO8 | → | RST | 数字复位 |

### 2. 蜂鸣器 (tone)
| 开发板引脚 | → | 蜂鸣器引脚 | 类型 |
|-----------|---|-----------|------|
| 3V3 | → | VCC | 电源 |
| GND | → | GND | 接地 |
| GPIO4 | → | SIG | PWM |

### 3. 按钮 (INPUT_PULLUP, 中断触发)
| 开发板引脚 | → | 按钮引脚 | 类型 |
|-----------|---|---------|------|
| GND | → | GND | 接地 |
| GPIO2 | → | SIG | 数字输入 |

### 4. 电磁阀 (digitalWrite)
| 开发板引脚 | → | 电磁阀引脚 | 类型 |
|-----------|---|---------|------|
| 3V3 | → | VCC | 电源 |
| GND | → | GND | 接地 |
| GPIO3 | → | SIG | 数字输出 |

### ⚠️ 提示
- **3 条警告**均为非致命性提示：3V3/GND 引脚多路复用（正常，一个引脚通过面包板/导线分线给多个组件供电），以及按钮缺少独立电源连接（正常，因为使用内部上拉电阻 `INPUT_PULLUP`）。

引脚分配完全与代码中的 `Adafruit_ST7735(10, 9, 7, 6, 8)` 构造函数、`pinMode(3, OUTPUT)`、`pinMode(4, OUTPUT)`、`pinMode(2, INPUT_PULLUP)` 等一致。请点击右侧工具栏的「电路连接」按钮查看连线图。

TERMINATE

{"path": "C:\Users\13273\Documents\aily-project\project_jun08a\pc_monitor\claude_monitor.py", "content": "#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
Claude Code Status Monitor - PC端串口监控脚本
监控Claude Code终端输出，通过串口发送状态给ESP32，并监听按钮回传
"""

import serial
import serial.tools.list_ports
import threading
import time
import re
import sys
import subprocess
import queue
from datetime import datetime

# 状态定义
STATES = {
    'idle': 0,
    'thinking': 1,
    'coding': 2,
    'done': 3,
    'permission': 4
}

class ClaudeMonitor:
    def __init__(self, port=None, baudrate=115200):
        self.port = port
        self.baudrate = baudrate
        self.serial_conn = None
        self.running = False
        self.current_state = 'idle'
        self.state_queue = queue.Queue()
        self.btn_callback = None
        
    def find_esp32_port(self):
        """自动查找ESP32-C3串口"""
        ports = serial.tools.list_ports.comports()
        for port in ports:
            # ESP32-C3通常显示为USB串口
            if 'USB' in port.description or 'ESP32' in port.description:
                print(f"找到设备: {port.device} - {port.description}")
                return port.device
        return None
    
    def connect(self):
        """连接串口"""
        if not self.port:
            self.port = self.find_esp32_port()
        
        if not self.port:
            print("未找到ESP32设备，请手动指定端口")
            return False
        
        try:
            self.serial_conn = serial.Serial(self.port, self.baudrate, timeout=1)
            print(f"已连接到 {self.port} @ {self.baudrate}")
            time.sleep(2)  # 等待ESP32初始化
            return True
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"连接失败: {e}")
            return False
    
    def disconnect(self):
        """断开串口"""
        if self.serial_conn:
            self.serial_conn.close()
            self.serial_conn = None
        self.running = False
    
    def send_state(self, state):
        """发送状态到ESP32"""
        if self.serial_conn and state in STATES:
            try:
                msg = f"{state}\n"
                self.serial_conn.write(msg.encode())
                print(f"[{datetime.now().strftime('%H:%M:%S')}] 发送状态: {state}")
            except Exception as e:
                print(f"发送失败: {e}")
    
    def read_serial(self):
        """读取ESP32回传数据"""
        while self.running:
            if self.serial_conn:
                try:
                    if self.serial_conn.in_waiting > 0:
                        line = self.serial_conn.readline().decode().strip()
                        if line:
                            print(f"[{datetime.now().strftime('%H:%M:%S')}] 收到: {line}")
                            if line == 'btn' and self.btn_callback:
                                self.btn_callback()
                            elif line == 'muted':
                                print(">>> 蜂鸣器已静音")
                            elif line == 'unmuted':
                                print(">>> 蜂鸣器已取消静音")
                except Exception as e:
                    print(f"读取错误: {e}")
            time.sleep(0.05)
    
    def monitor_claude_output(self):
        """监控Claude Code输出（模拟模式）"""
        print("\n=== Claude Code 监控已启动 ===")
        print("当前为模拟演示模式，状态会自动循环切换")
        print("按 Ctrl+C 停止\n")
        
        # 模拟状态循环演示
        demo_sequence = [
            ('idle', 3),
            ('thinking', 4),
            ('coding', 6),
            ('done', 2),
            ('idle', 2),
            ('permission', 3),
            ('coding', 4),
            ('done', 2),
        ]
        
        idx = 0
        while self.running:
            state, duration = demo_sequence[idx]
            self.send_state(state)
            self.current_state = state
            time.sleep(duration)
            idx = (idx + 1) % len(demo_sequence)
    
    def start(self, btn_callback=None):
        """启动监控"""
        if not self.connect():
            return False
        
        self.running = True
        self.btn_callback = btn_callback
        
        # 启动串口读取线程
        self.read_thread = threading.Thread(target=self.read_serial, daemon=True)
        self.read_thread.start()
        
        # 启动Claude监控线程
        self.monitor_thread = threading.Thread(target=self.monitor_claude_output, daemon=True)
        self.monitor_thread.start()
        
        return True
    
    def stop(self):
        """停止监控"""
        self.running = False
        self.disconnect()
        print("\n监控已停止")


def main():
    """主函数"""
    print("=" * 50)
    print("Claude Code 状态物理反馈器 - PC端监控脚本")
    print("=" * 50)
    
    # 允许手动指定端口
    port = None
    if len(sys.argv) > 1:
        port = sys.argv[1]
    
    monitor = ClaudeMonitor(port=port)
    
    def on_button_press():
        """按钮按下回调 - 模拟权限确认"""
        print("\n>>> [按钮事件] 用户按下按钮，已确认权限!")
        # 这里可以集成实际的权限确认逻辑
        # 例如：发送回车键到Claude Code终端
    
    try:
        if monitor.start(btn_callback=on_button_press):
            # 保持运行
            while True:
                time.sleep(1)
    except KeyboardInterrupt:
        print("\n用户中断")
    finally:
        monitor.stop()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()"}

#include <Arduino.h>

#include <SPI.h>
#include <Adafruit_ST7735.h>
#include <Adafruit_GFX.h>

Adafruit_ST7735 tft = Adafruit_ST7735(10, 9, 7, 6, 8);

void setup() {
  Serial.begin(115200);
  tft.initR(INITR_BLACKTAB);
  // 如果显示异常，可尝试以下初始化参数：
  // tft.initR(INITR_REDTAB);
  // tft.initR(INITR_GREENTAB);
  // tft.initR(INITR_144GREENTAB);

  tft.setRotation(1);
  tft.fillScreen(tft.color565(0, 0, 0));
  tft.setTextSize(1);
  tft.setTextColor(ST77XX_WHITE);
  tft.setCursor(40 , 30 );
  tft.print("Clawd");
  tft.setCursor(35 , 45 );
  tft.print("Monitor");
  delay(1500);
  pinMode(3, OUTPUT);
  digitalWrite(3, LOW);
  pinMode(4, OUTPUT);
  pinMode(2, INPUT_PULLUP);
  attachInterrupt(digitalPinToInterrupt(2), []{ gBtnFlag = 1; }, FALLING);

}

void loop() {

  if (Serial.available() >= 1) {
    String s = Serial.readStringUntil(0x0A); s.trim();
    if(s == "idle")      gState = 0;
    else if(s == "thinking") gState = 1;
    else if(s == "coding")   gState = 2;
    else if(s == "done")     gState = 3;
    else if(s == "permission") gState = 4;
  }
  if (gBtnFlag == 1) {
    gBtnFlag = 0;
    delay(40);
    if(digitalRead(2) == LOW) {
      unsigned long start = millis();
      while(digitalRead(2) == LOW && millis() - start < 1200) { delay(20); }
      unsigned long held = millis() - start;
      if(held > 700) {
        gMuted = !gMuted;
        if(gMuted) { Serial.println("muted"); }
        else { tone(4, 800, 100); Serial.println("unmuted"); }
      } else {
        Serial.println("btn");
        tone(4, 1000, 50);
      }
    }
  }
  if (gState != gLastState) {
    gLastState = gState; gAnimFrame = 0;
    tft.fillScreen(tft.color565(0, 0, 0));
    if(gState == 3) { gSolenoidEnd = millis() + 300; digitalWrite(3, HIGH); }
    if(gState == 4) { gSolenoidEnd = millis() + 200; digitalWrite(3, HIGH); }
  }
  if (gState == 0) {
    static unsigned long t = 0;
    if(millis() - t > 500) {
      t = millis(); gAnimFrame = (gAnimFrame + 1) % 8;
      tft.fillScreen(ST77XX_BLACK);
      int bx = 60, by = 35 + (gAnimFrame % 2 == 0 ? 0 : 2);
      uint16_t col = tft.color565(255, 120, 50);
      tft.fillRect(bx, by, 40, 24, col);
      tft.fillRect(bx - 8, by + 4, 8, 6, col);
      tft.fillRect(bx + 40, by + 4, 8, 6, col);
      tft.fillRect(bx + 8, by + 2, 6, 5, ST77XX_WHITE);
      tft.fillRect(bx + 26, by + 2, 6, 5, ST77XX_WHITE);
      tft.fillRect(bx + 10, by + 3, 3, 3, ST77XX_BLACK);
      tft.fillRect(bx + 28, by + 3, 3, 3, ST77XX_BLACK);
      tft.fillRect(bx + 2, by + 24, 6, 4, col);
      tft.fillRect(bx + 12, by + 24, 6, 4, col);
      tft.fillRect(bx + 22, by + 24, 6, 4, col);
      tft.fillRect(bx + 32, by + 24, 6, 4, col);
      if(gAnimFrame < 4) {
        int zy = 15 - gAnimFrame * 4;
        tft.setTextSize(1); tft.setTextColor(ST77XX_CYAN); tft.setCursor(bx + 50, zy); tft.print("Z");
        if(gAnimFrame >= 1) { tft.setCursor(bx + 58, zy + 8); tft.print("z"); }
        if(gAnimFrame >= 2) { tft.setCursor(bx + 64, zy + 14); tft.print("z"); }
      }
      tft.setTextSize(1); tft.setTextColor(ST77XX_CYAN); tft.setCursor(5, 65); tft.print("sleeping...");
      if(!gMuted && gAnimFrame == 0) tone(4, 330, 40);
    }
  }
  if (gState == 1) {
    static unsigned long t = 0;
    if(millis() - t > 350) {
      t = millis(); gAnimFrame = (gAnimFrame + 1) % 12;
      tft.fillScreen(ST77XX_BLACK);
      int bx = 60, by = 30;
      uint16_t col = tft.color565(255, 120, 50);
      tft.fillRect(bx, by, 40, 24, col);
      tft.fillRect(bx - 8, by + 4, 8, 6, col);
      tft.fillRect(bx + 40, by + 4, 8, 6, col);
      int ey = (gAnimFrame < 6) ? 3 : 4;
      tft.fillRect(bx + 8, by + 2, 6, ey, ST77XX_WHITE);
      tft.fillRect(bx + 26, by + 2, 6, ey, ST77XX_WHITE);
      if(ey == 3) { tft.fillRect(bx + 10, by + 3, 3, 3, ST77XX_BLACK); tft.fillRect(bx + 28, by + 3, 3, 3, ST77XX_BLACK); }
      tft.fillRect(bx + 2, by + 24, 6, 4, col);
      tft.fillRect(bx + 12, by + 24, 6, 4, col);
      tft.fillRect(bx + 22, by + 24, 6, 4, col);
      tft.fillRect(bx + 32, by + 24, 6, 4, col);
      int bub = gAnimFrame % 3;
      tft.drawCircle(bx + 55, by - 5, 8 + bub * 4, ST77XX_YELLOW);
      tft.drawCircle(bx + 55, by - 5, 4 + bub * 2, ST77XX_YELLOW);
      int dots = gAnimFrame % 4;
      tft.setTextSize(2); tft.setTextColor(ST77XX_YELLOW);
      tft.setCursor(bx + 48, by - 12);
      for(int d = 0; d <= dots; d++) tft.print(".");
      tft.setTextSize(1); tft.setTextColor(ST77XX_YELLOW); tft.setCursor(5, 65); tft.print("thinking...");
      if(!gMuted) tone(4, 500 + gAnimFrame * 60, 25);
    }
  }
  if (gState == 2) {
    static unsigned long t = 0;
    if(millis() - t > 200) {
      t = millis(); gAnimFrame = (gAnimFrame + 1) % 20;
      tft.fillScreen(ST77XX_BLACK);
      int bx = 10, by = 5;
      tft.drawRect(bx, by, 70, 50, tft.color565(0, 100, 0));
      tft.fillRect(bx + 1, by + 1, 68, 48, ST77XX_BLACK);
      tft.setTextSize(1); tft.setTextColor(ST77XX_GREEN);
      for(int i = 0; i < 6; i++) {
        int lineIdx = (gAnimFrame / 2 + i) % 10;
        tft.setCursor(bx + 3, by + 3 + i * 8);
        if(lineIdx % 3 == 0) tft.print(">");
        else tft.print(" ");
        const char* lines[] = {"void ", "int x ", "if(x)", "for(", "  x++", "}", "return", "delay", "Serial", "tone"};
        tft.print(lines[lineIdx]);
      }
      tft.setTextSize(1); tft.setTextColor(ST77XX_WHITE);
      int cx = 95, cy = 25 + (gAnimFrame % 2 == 0 ? 0 : 2);
      uint16_t col = tft.color565(255, 120, 50);
      tft.fillRect(cx, cy, 36, 22, col);
      tft.fillRect(cx - 6, cy + 4, 6, 5, col);
      tft.fillRect(cx + 36, cy + 4, 6, 5, col);
      tft.fillRect(cx + 6, cy + 2, 5, 4, ST77XX_WHITE);
      tft.fillRect(cx + 22, cy + 2, 5, 4, ST77XX_WHITE);
      tft.fillRect(cx + 8, cy + 3, 2, 2, ST77XX_BLACK);
      tft.fillRect(cx + 24, cy + 3, 2, 2, ST77XX_BLACK);
      int armOff = (gAnimFrame % 2 == 0) ? 0 : 3;
      tft.fillRect(cx + 36, cy + 10 + armOff, 8, 4, col);
      tft.setTextSize(1); tft.setTextColor(ST77XX_GREEN); tft.setCursor(95, 60); tft.print("coding...");
      if(!gMuted && gAnimFrame == 0) tone(4, 1000, 15);
    }
  }
  if (gState == 3) {
    static unsigned long t = 0;
    if(millis() - t > 300) {
      t = millis(); gAnimFrame = (gAnimFrame + 1) % 10;
      tft.fillScreen(ST77XX_BLACK);
      int bx = 55, jumpY = 0;
      if(gAnimFrame < 4) jumpY = -((4 - gAnimFrame) * 5);
      int by = 30 + jumpY;
      uint16_t col = tft.color565(255, 120, 50);
      tft.fillRect(bx, by, 40, 24, col);
      tft.fillRect(bx - 10, by + 4, 10, 6, col);
      tft.fillRect(bx + 40, by + 4, 10, 6, col);
      int ey = (gAnimFrame < 5) ? 5 : 3;
      tft.fillRect(bx + 8, by + 2, 6, ey, ST77XX_WHITE);
      tft.fillRect(bx + 26, by + 2, 6, ey, ST77XX_WHITE);
      if(ey == 3) { tft.fillRect(bx + 10, by + 3, 3, 3, ST77XX_BLACK); tft.fillRect(bx + 28, by + 3, 3, 3, ST77XX_BLACK); }
      tft.fillRect(bx + 14, by + 12, 12, 3, ST77XX_BLACK);
      tft.fillRect(bx + 2, by + 24, 6, 4, col);
      tft.fillRect(bx + 12, by + 24, 6, 4, col);
      tft.fillRect(bx + 22, by + 24, 6, 4, col);
      tft.fillRect(bx + 32, by + 24, 6, 4, col);
      tft.fillRect(bx + 18, by - 10, 4, 10, tft.color565(255, 50, 50));
      tft.fillCircle(bx + 20, by - 12, 5, tft.color565(255, 50, 50));
      for(int i = 0; i < 8; i++) {
        int cx = 10 + (i * 19 + gAnimFrame * 7) % 150;
        int cy = 5 + (i * 13 + gAnimFrame * 5) % 70;
        uint16_t cc[] = {ST77XX_RED, ST77XX_YELLOW, ST77XX_GREEN, ST77XX_CYAN, ST77XX_MAGENTA};
        tft.fillRect(cx, cy, 3, 3, cc[i % 5]);
      }
      tft.setTextSize(2); tft.setTextColor(ST77XX_GREEN); tft.setCursor(100, 30); tft.print("OK!");
      tft.setTextSize(1); tft.setTextColor(ST77XX_GREEN); tft.setCursor(5, 65); tft.print("done! ^_^");
      if(!gMuted) tone(4, 1200 + gAnimFrame * 50, 60);
    }
  }
  if (gState == 4) {
    static unsigned long t = 0;
    if(millis() - t > 400) {
      t = millis(); gAnimFrame = !gAnimFrame;
      tft.fillScreen(gAnimFrame ? tft.color565(60, 0, 0) : ST77XX_BLACK);
      int bx = 55, by = 25;
      uint16_t col = tft.color565(255, 120, 50);
      tft.fillRect(bx, by, 40, 24, col);
      tft.fillRect(bx - 8, by + 4, 8, 6, col);
      tft.fillRect(bx + 40, by + 4, 8, 6, col);
      tft.fillRect(bx + 8, by + 2, 6, 5, ST77XX_WHITE);
      tft.fillRect(bx + 26, by + 2, 6, 5, ST77XX_WHITE);
      tft.fillRect(bx + 10, by + 3, 3, 3, ST77XX_BLACK);
      tft.fillRect(bx + 28, by + 3, 3, 3, ST77XX_BLACK);
      tft.fillRect(bx + 12, by + 14, 16, 4, ST77XX_BLACK);
      tft.fillRect(bx + 2, by + 24, 6, 4, col);
      tft.fillRect(bx + 12, by + 24, 6, 4, col);
      tft.fillRect(bx + 22, by + 24, 6, 4, col);
      tft.fillRect(bx + 32, by + 24, 6, 4, col);
      tft.drawRect(bx - 20, by - 15, 30, 22, ST77XX_YELLOW);
      tft.fillRect(bx - 19, by - 14, 28, 20, ST77XX_BLACK);
      tft.setTextSize(2); tft.setTextColor(ST77XX_YELLOW); tft.setCursor(bx - 14, by - 12); tft.print("?");
      tft.setTextSize(1); tft.setTextColor(gAnimFrame ? ST77XX_RED : ST77XX_YELLOW);
      tft.setCursor(5, 65); tft.print("[PRESS BTN]");
      if(!gMuted) tone(4, gAnimFrame ? 1800 : 600, 80);
      gSolenoidEnd = millis() + 150;
      digitalWrite(3, gAnimFrame);
    }
  }
  if (millis() >= gSolenoidEnd) {
    digitalWrite(3, LOW);
  }
  delay(30);

      tft.setTextSize(2); tft.setTextColor(ST77XX_GREEN); tft.setCursor(100, 30); tft.print("OK!");
      tft.setTextSize(1); tft.setTextColor(ST77XX_GREEN); tft.setCursor(5, 65); tft.print("done! ^_^");
      if(!gMuted) tone(4, 1200 + gAnimFrame * 50, 60);
    }
  }
  if (gState == 4) {
    static unsigned long t = 0;
    if(millis() - t > 400) {
      t = millis(); gAnimFrame = !gAnimFrame;
      tft.fillScreen(gAnimFrame ? tft.color565(60, 0, 0) : ST77XX_BLACK);
      int bx = 55, by = 25;
      uint16_t col = tft.color565(255, 120, 50);
      tft.fillRect(bx, by, 40, 24, col);
      tft.fillRect(bx - 8, by + 4, 8, 6, col);
      tft.fillRect(bx + 40, by + 4, 8, 6, col);
      tft.fillRect(bx + 8, by + 2, 6, 5, ST77XX_WHITE);
      tft.fillRect(bx + 26, by + 2, 6, 5, ST77XX_WHITE);
      tft.fillRect(bx + 10, by + 3, 3, 3, ST77XX_BLACK);
      tft.fillRect(bx + 28, by + 3, 3, 3, ST77XX_BLACK);
      tft.fillRect(bx + 12, by + 14, 16, 4, ST77XX_BLACK);
      tft.fillRect(bx + 2, by + 24, 6, 4, col);
      tft.fillRect(bx + 12, by + 24, 6, 4, col);
      tft.fillRect(bx + 22, by + 24, 6, 4, col);
      tft.fillRect(bx + 32, by + 24, 6, 4, col);
      tft.drawRect(bx - 20, by - 15, 30, 22, ST77XX_YELLOW);
      tft.fillRect(bx - 19, by - 14, 28, 20, ST77XX_BLACK);
      tft.setTextSize(2); tft.setTextColor(ST77XX_YELLOW); tft.setCursor(bx - 14, by - 12); tft.print("?");
      tft.setTextSize(1); tft.setTextColor(gAnimFrame ? ST77XX_RED : ST77XX_YELLOW);
      tft.setCursor(5, 65); tft.print("[PRESS BTN]");
      if(!gMuted) tone(4, gAnimFrame ? 1800 : 600, 80);
      gSolenoidEnd = millis() + 150;
      digitalWrite(3, gAnimFrame);
    }
  }
  if (millis() >= gSolenoidEnd) {
    digitalWrite(3, LOW);
  }
  delay(30);

}"

<toolResult>#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
Claude Code Status Monitor - PC Side Serial Bridge
===================================================
Monitors Claude Code activity and sends status commands
to ESP32-C3 via serial port. Also listens for button events
from ESP32 (e.g., permission confirm, mute toggle).

Status codes sent to ESP32:
    idle       - AI is resting
    thinking   - AI is reasoning
    coding     - AI is writing code
    done       - Task completed
    permission - Waiting for user permission

Status codes received from ESP32:
    btn        - Button short press (permission confirm)
    muted      - Sound muted
    unmuted    - Sound unmuted
"""

import serial
import serial.tools.list_ports
import time
import json
import threading
import queue
import os
import sys
import argparse
from datetime import datetime


class StatusBridge:
    """Serial bridge between PC and ESP32 status monitor"""
    
    def __init__(self, port=None, baudrate=115200, monitor_mode="cli"):
        self.port = port
        self.baudrate = baudrate
        self.monitor_mode = monitor_mode
        self.ser = None
        self.running = False
        self.rx_queue = queue.Queue()
        self.last_status = None
        self._status_file = os.path.join(os.path.dirname(__file__), ".claude_status")
        
        # CLI mode patterns for detecting Claude Code states
        self.patterns = {
            "thinking": [
                "thinking", "reasoning", "analyzing", "reading", "searching",
                "Thought", "Let me", "Looking at", "I'll", "First"
            ],
            "coding": [
                "writing", "creating", "editing", "applying",
                "replace", "write", "create_file", "edit_file",
                "I'll create", "I'll write", "Let me code"
            ],
            "permission": [
                "permission", "approve", "confirm", "allow",
                "ask_user", "Do you want", "Can I", "May I",
                "Proceed?"
            ],
            "done": [
                "completed", "success", "done", "finished", "all set",
                "Anything else", "that helps"
            ]
        }
    
    def find_port(self):
        """Auto-detect ESP32 serial port"""
        ports = serial.tools.list_ports.comports()
        for p in ports:
            # ESP32 often identified by these VID/PID
            if "USB" in p.description or "340" in p.description or \
               "esp" in p.description.lower() or "CP210" in p.description or \
               "CH9102" in p.description or "CH343" in p.description:
                print(f"[OK] Found: {p.device} - {p.description}")
                return p.device
        
        if ports:
            print("[WARN] No ESP32 auto-detected. Available ports:")
            for p in ports:
                print(f"  {p.device} - {p.description}")
        
        return None
    
    def connect(self):
        """Connect to ESP32 serial port"""
        if not self.port:
            self.port = self.find_port()
            if not self.port:
                print("[ERR] No serial port found. Specify with --port")
                return False
        
        try:
            self.ser = serial.Serial(self.port, self.baudrate, timeout=1)
            time.sleep(1.5)  # ESP32 resets on serial connect
            self.ser.reset_input_buffer()
            print(f"[OK] Connected to {self.port} @ {self.baudrate}")
            return True
        except Exception as e:
            print(f"[ERR] Failed to connect: {e}")
            return False
    
    def send_status(self, status):
        """Send status command to ESP32"""
        if self.ser and self.ser.is_open and status in ("idle", "thinking", "coding", "done", "permission"):
            try:
                self.ser.write(f"{status}\n".encode())
                self.ser.flush()
                self.last_status = status
                ts = datetime.now().strftime("%H:%M:%S")
                print(f"  [{ts}] PC -> HW: {status}")
            except Exception as e:
                print(f"[ERR] Write failed: {e}")
    
    def _reader_thread(self):
        """Background thread to read from serial"""
        while self.running:
            try:
                if self.ser and self.ser.is_open and self.ser.in_waiting:
                    line = self.ser.readline().decode('utf-8', errors='ignore').strip()
                    if line:
                        self.rx_queue.put(line)
                else:
                    time.sleep(0.05)
            except Exception:
                time.sleep(0.1)
    
    def start(self):
        """Start serial communication"""
        if not self.connect():
            return False
        
        self.running = True
        self.reader = threading.Thread(target=self._reader_thread, daemon=True)
        self.reader.start()
        
        # Send initial idle
        self.send_status("idle")
        return True
    
    def stop(self):
        """Stop serial communication"""
        self.running = False
        self.send_status("idle")
        time.sleep(0.2)
        if self.ser and self.ser.is_open:
            self.ser.close()
        print("[OK] Disconnected")
    
    def check_events(self):
        """Check for events from ESP32 (button presses)"""
        events = []
        while not self.rx_queue.empty():
            try:
                msg = self.rx_queue.get_nowait()
                events.append(msg)
                ts = datetime.now().strftime("%H:%M:%S")
                if msg == "btn":
                    print(f"  [{ts}] HW -> PC: BUTTON PRESSED (permission confirm)")
                elif msg == "muted":
                    print(f"  [{ts}] HW -> PC: SOUND MUTED")
                elif msg == "unmuted":
                    print(f"  [{ts}] HW -> PC: SOUND UNMUTED")
            except queue.Empty:
                break
        return events
    
    def detect_claude_state(self, text):
        """Heuristic detection of Claude Code state from output text"""
        text_lower = text.lower()
        
        # Check patterns in priority order
        for pattern in self.patterns["permission"]:
            if pattern.lower() in text_lower:
                return "permission"
        
        for pattern in self.patterns["coding"]:
            if pattern.lower() in text_lower:
                return "coding"
        
        for pattern in self.patterns["thinking"]:
            if pattern.lower() in text_lower:
                return "thinking"
        
        for pattern in self.patterns["done"]:
            if pattern.lower() in text_lower:
                return "done"
        
        return None
    
    def set_status(self, status):
        """Public API to set and send status"""
        if status != self.last_status:
            self.send_status(status)
    
    def write_status_file(self, status):
        """Write status to a file for external tools to read"""
        try:
            with open(self._status_file, 'w') as f:
                f.write(status)
        except:
            pass


def cli_mode(bridge):
    """Command-line interactive mode - manually control status"""
    print("""
╔══════════════════════════════════════╗
║   Claude Monitor - CLI Control       ║
╠══════════════════════════════════════╣
║ Keys:                                ║
║   i = idle (resting)                 ║
║   t = thinking                       ║
║   c = coding                         ║
║   d = done                           ║
║   p = permission                     ║
║   q = quit                           ║
╚══════════════════════════════════════╝
""")
    
    key_map = {
        'i': 'idle', 't': 'thinking', 'c': 'coding',
        'd': 'done', 'p': 'permission'
    }
    
    try:
        import msvcrt  # Windows
        getch = lambda: msvcrt.getch().decode('utf-8', errors='ignore').lower()
    except ImportError:
        try:
            import tty, termios  # Unix
            def getch():
                fd = sys.stdin.fileno()
                old = termios.tcgetattr(fd)
                try:
                    tty.setraw(fd)
                    return sys.stdin.read(1).lower()
                finally:
                    termios.tcsetattr(fd, termios.TCSADRAIN, old)
        except ImportError:
            getch = lambda: input().strip().lower()[0] if input() else ''
    
    while bridge.running:
        bridge.check_events()
        
        if os.name == 'nt':
            import msvcrt
            if msvcrt.kbhit():
                key = getch()
                if key == 'q':
                    break
                status = key_map.get(key)
                if status:
                    bridge.set_status(status)
        else:
            # Unix - use select for non-blocking
            import select
            if select.select([sys.stdin], [], [], 0.1)[0]:
                key = getch()
                if key == 'q':
                    break
                status = key_map.get(key)
                if status:
                    bridge.set_status(status)
        
        time.sleep(0.1)


def pipe_mode(bridge):
    """
    Pipe mode - read from stdin (for piping Claude Code output).
    
    Usage:
        claude status | python bridge.py --mode pipe
    
    Each line from stdin is analyzed for Claude Code state keywords.
    """
    print("[INFO] Pipe mode - reading from stdin...")
    idle_timer = time.time()
    
    try:
        while bridge.running:
            # Check for HW events
            bridge.check_events()
            
            # Read from stdin line by line
            if os.name == 'nt':
                import msvcrt
                if msvcrt.kbhit():
                    line = sys.stdin.readline()
                    if not line:
                        break
                    line = line.strip()
                    if line:
                        detected = bridge.detect_claude_state(line)
                        if detected:
                            bridge.set_status(detected)
                            idle_timer = time.time()
            else:
                import select
                if select.select([sys.stdin], [], [], 0.1)[0]:
                    line = sys.stdin.readline()
                    if not line:
                        break
                    line = line.strip()
                    if line:
                        detected = bridge.detect_claude_state(line)
                        if detected:
                            bridge.set_status(detected)
                            idle_timer = time.time()
            
            # Auto-idle after 5 seconds of no activity
            if time.time() - idle_timer > 5:
                if bridge.last_status != "idle":
                    bridge.set_status("idle")
            
            time.sleep(0.05)
    except KeyboardInterrupt:
        pass


def watch_mode(bridge):
    """
    Watch mode - read status from a file (for integration with other tools).
    Other programs write status to .claude_status file, this bridge reads and forwards.
    """
    status_file = os.path.join(os.path.dirname(__file__), ".claude_status")
    print(f"[INFO] Watch mode - monitoring {status_file}")
    
    last_file_status = None
    
    try:
        while bridge.running:
            bridge.check_events()
            
            try:
                if os.path.exists(status_file):
                    with open(status_file, 'r') as f:
                        status = f.read().strip()
                    if status in ("idle", "thinking", "coding", "done", "permission"):
                        if status != last_file_status:
                            bridge.set_status(status)
                            last_file_status = status
            except:
                pass
            
            time.sleep(0.2)
    except KeyboardInterrupt:
        pass


def simulate_mode():
    """
    Simulator mode - no hardware needed. Shows a GUI preview of the status monitor.
    """
    print("[INFO] Starting SIMULATOR mode (no hardware required)...")
    
    try:
        from simulator import run_simulator
        run_simulator()
    except ImportError:
        print("[ERR] simulator.py not found. Make sure it's in the same directory.")
        sys.exit(1)


def main():
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="Claude Code Status Monitor - PC Bridge")
    parser.add_argument("--port", "-p", help="Serial port (e.g., COM3, /dev/ttyUSB0)")
    parser.add_argument("--baud", "-b", type=int, default=115200, help="Baud rate")
    parser.add_argument("--mode", "-m", default="cli",
                        choices=["cli", "pipe", "watch", "simulate"],
                        help="Operation mode: cli=manual control, pipe=stdin, watch=file, simulate=preview")
    parser.add_argument("--noserial", action="store_true",
                        help="Disable serial (useful for pipe/watch test)")
    args = parser.parse_args()
    
    # Simulator mode doesn't need serial
    if args.mode == "simulate":
        simulate_mode()
        return
    
    bridge = StatusBridge(port=args.port, baudrate=args.baud)
    
    if not args.noserial:
        if not bridge.start():
            print("[WARN] Serial connection failed. Use --noserial for test mode.")
            ans = input("Continue without hardware? (y/n): ").strip().lower()
            if ans != 'y':
                return
            bridge.running = True
    else:
        bridge.running = True
        print("[INFO] No-serial mode - status will be printed only")
    
    try:
        if args.mode == "cli":
            cli_mode(bridge)
        elif args.mode == "pipe":
            pipe_mode(bridge)
        elif args.mode == "watch":
            watch_mode(bridge)
    except KeyboardInterrupt:
        print("\n[INFO] Shutting down...")
    finally:
        bridge.stop()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
</toolResult>

<toolResult>#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
Claude Code Status Monitor - Hardware Simulator
================================================
Preview the status monitor without physical hardware.
Simulates TFT display, buzzer sounds, solenoid tapping, and button.

Run with: python simulator.py
Or via bridge: python bridge.py --mode simulate
"""

import tkinter as tk
from tkinter import ttk, font
import threading
import time
import winsound  # Windows only for buzzer simulation
import math


class HardwareSimulator:
    """Simulates ESP32 hardware: TFT, buzzer, solenoid, button"""
    
    def __init__(self):
        self.root = tk.Tk()
        self.root.title("Claude Monitor - Hardware Simulator")
        self.root.configure(bg='#1a1a1a')
        self.root.resizable(False, False)
        
        # State variables
        self.current_state = "idle"
        self.anim_frame = 0
        self.muted = False
        self.solenoid_active = False
        
        # Animation timers
        self.anim_running = True
        self.last_anim_time = 0
        
        # Create GUI
        self._create_gui()
        
        # Start animation thread
        self.anim_thread = threading.Thread(target=self._animation_loop, daemon=True)
        self.anim_thread.start()
    
    def _create_gui(self):
        """Create the simulator GUI"""
        
        # Main frame
        main_frame = ttk.Frame(self.root, padding=10)
        main_frame.pack(fill=tk.BOTH, expand=True)
        
        # Style
        style = ttk.Style()
        style.configure('TFrame', background='#1a1a1a')
        style.configure('TLabel', background='#1a1a1a', foreground='white')
        style.configure('TButton', padding=5)
        
        # === TFT Display Simulation (160x80 scaled 2x = 320x160) ===
        tft_frame = ttk.LabelFrame(main_frame, text="TFT Display (0.96\" 160x80)", padding=5)
        tft_frame.pack(pady=5)
        
        self.tft_canvas = tk.Canvas(
            tft_frame, 
            width=320, height=160,
            bg='black',
            highlightthickness=2,
            highlightbackground='#333'
        )
        self.tft_canvas.pack()
        
        # === Status Indicator ===
        status_frame = ttk.Frame(main_frame)
        status_frame.pack(fill=tk.X, pady=5)
        
        ttk.Label(status_frame, text="Current State:", font=('Arial', 10)).pack(side=tk.LEFT)
        
        self.status_var = tk.StringVar(value="💤 idle")
        self.status_label = ttk.Label(
            status_frame, 
            textvariable=self.status_var,
            font=('Arial', 12, 'bold'),
            foreground='#00ff88'
        )
        self.status_label.pack(side=tk.LEFT, padx=10)
        
        # === Buzzer Simulation ===
        buzzer_frame = ttk.LabelFrame(main_frame, text="Buzzer", padding=5)
        buzzer_frame.pack(fill=tk.X, pady=5)
        
        self.buzzer_indicator = tk.Canvas(buzzer_frame, width=30, height=30, bg='#1a1a1a', highlightthickness=0)
        self.buzzer_indicator.pack(side=tk.LEFT, padx=5)
        self.buzzer_indicator.create_oval(5, 5, 25, 25, fill='gray', outline='#666', tags='buzzer')
        
        self.mute_var = tk.BooleanVar(value=False)
        self.mute_check = ttk.Checkbutton(buzzer_frame, text="Muted", variable=self.mute_var, command=self._toggle_mute)
        self.mute_check.pack(side=tk.LEFT, padx=10)
        
        ttk.Button(buzzer_frame, text="Test Beep", command=self._test_beep).pack(side=tk.RIGHT)
        
        # === Solenoid Simulation ===
        solenoid_frame = ttk.LabelFrame(main_frame, text="Solenoid (电磁铁)", padding=5)
        solenoid_frame.pack(fill=tk.X, pady=5)
        
        self.solenoid_indicator = tk.Canvas(solenoid_frame, width=60, height=30, bg='#1a1a1a', highlightthickness=0)
        self.solenoid_indicator.pack(side=tk.LEFT, padx=5)
        self.solenoid_indicator.create_rectangle(5, 5, 55, 25, fill='gray', outline='#666', tags='solenoid')
        
        self.solenoid_label = ttk.Label(solenoid_frame, text="OFF", font=('Arial', 10))
        self.solenoid_label.pack(side=tk.LEFT, padx=10)
        
        ttk.Button(solenoid_frame, text="Test Tap", command=self._test_solenoid).pack(side=tk.RIGHT)
        
        # === Button Simulation ===
        button_frame = ttk.LabelFrame(main_frame, text="Button (微动按钮)", padding=5)
        button_frame.pack(fill=tk.X, pady=5)
        
        self.button_canvas = tk.Canvas(button_frame, width=60, height=40, bg='#1a1a1a', highlightthickness=0)
        self.button_canvas.pack(side=tk.LEFT, padx=5)
        self.button_canvas.create_rectangle(10, 10, 50, 30, fill='#444', outline='#888', tags='button')
        self.button_canvas.bind('<Button-1>', self._button_press)
        self.button_canvas.bind('<ButtonRelease-1>', self._button_release)
        
        ttk.Label(button_frame, text="Click to simulate press\n(Hold >0.7s = mute toggle)", font=('Arial', 9)).pack(side=tk.LEFT, padx=10)
        
        self.button_log = ttk.Label(button_frame, text="", font=('Arial', 9))
        self.button_log.pack(side=tk.RIGHT)
        
        # === State Control Buttons ===
        control_frame = ttk.LabelFrame(main_frame, text="Manual State Control", padding=5)
        control_frame.pack(fill=tk.X, pady=5)
        
        states = [
            ("💤 Idle", "idle", '#00ffff'),
            ("🤔 Thinking", "thinking", '#ffff00'),
            ("💻 Coding", "coding", '#00ff00'),
            ("✅ Done", "done", '#00ff00'),
            ("⚠️ Permission", "permission", '#ff0000')
        ]
        
        for text, state, color in states:
            btn = tk.Button(
                control_frame,
                text=text,
                command=lambda s=state: self._set_state(s),
                bg='#333',
                fg=color,
                font=('Arial', 10),
                width=12
            )
            btn.pack(side=tk.LEFT, padx=2)
        
        # === Auto Demo ===
        demo_frame = ttk.Frame(main_frame)
        demo_frame.pack(fill=tk.X, pady=10)
        
        self.demo_var = tk.BooleanVar(value=False)
        ttk.Checkbutton(demo_frame, text="Auto Demo Mode", variable=self.demo_var).pack(side=tk.LEFT)
        
        ttk.Button(demo_frame, text="Quit", command=self._quit).pack(side=tk.RIGHT)
        
        # Instructions
        ttk.Label(
            main_frame,
            text="This simulator shows how the hardware will behave.\nNo ESP32 or components needed!",
            font=('Arial', 9),
            foreground='#888'
        ).pack(pady=5)
    
    def _set_state(self, state):
        """Set current state and trigger animations"""
        self.current_state = state
        self.anim_frame = 0
        
        # Update status label
        state_icons = {
            "idle": "💤 Idle",
            "thinking": "🤔 Thinking",
            "coding": "💻 Coding",
            "done": "✅ Done",
            "permission": "⚠️ Permission"
        }
        self.status_var.set(state_icons.get(state, state))
        
        # Trigger solenoid for done/permission states
        if state == "done":
            self._activate_solenoid(300)
        elif state == "permission":
            self._activate_solenoid(200)
    
    def _toggle_mute(self):
        """Toggle mute state"""
        self.muted = self.mute_var.get()
        if self.muted:
            self.button_log.config(text="🔇 Muted")
        else:
            self.button_log.config(text="🔊 Unmuted")
            self._play_beep(800, 100)
    
    def _test_beep(self):
        """Test buzzer sound"""
        if not self.muted:
            self._play_beep(1000, 200)
            self._flash_buzzer()
    
    def _play_beep(self, freq, duration):
        """Play beep sound (Windows only)"""
        if not self.muted:
            try:
                winsound.Beep(freq, duration)
            except:
                pass  # Non-Windows or muted
    
    def _flash_buzzer(self):
        """Flash buzzer indicator"""
        self.buzzer_indicator.itemconfig('buzzer', fill='#00ff00')
        self.root.after(100, lambda: self.buzzer_indicator.itemconfig('buzzer', fill='gray'))
    
    def _test_solenoid(self):
        """Test solenoid tap"""
        self._activate_solenoid(200)
    
    def _activate_solenoid(self, duration_ms):
        """Activate solenoid for given duration"""
        self.solenoid_active = True
        self.solenoid_indicator.itemconfig('solenoid', fill='#ff6600')
        self.solenoid_label.config(text="ON")
        
        # Play tap sound
        if not self.muted:
            try:
                winsound.Beep(100, duration_ms)  # Low freq = thump
            except:
                pass
        
        self.root.after(duration_ms, self._deactivate_solenoid)
    
    def _deactivate_solenoid(self):
        """Deactivate solenoid"""
        self.solenoid_active = False
        self.solenoid_indicator.itemconfig('solenoid', fill='gray')
        self.solenoid_label.config(text="OFF")
    
    def _button_press(self, event):
        """Button press event"""
        self.button_canvas.itemconfig('button', fill='#00ff00')
        self.button_press_time = time.time()
    
    def _button_release(self, event):
        """Button release event"""
        self.button_canvas.itemconfig('button', fill='#444')
        
        held_duration = time.time() - self.button_press_time
        
        if held_duration > 0.7:
            # Long press = mute toggle
            self.mute_var.set(not self.mute_var.get())
            self._toggle_mute()
        else:
            # Short press = confirm
            self.button_log.config(text="✓ Confirmed!")
            if not self.muted:
                self._play_beep(1000, 50)
            
            # If in permission state, switch to idle
            if self.current_state == "permission":
                self._set_state("idle")
    
    def _animation_loop(self):
        """Background animation loop"""
        while self.anim_running:
            self._update_animation()
            time.sleep(0.05)
    
    def _update_animation(self):
        """Update TFT display animation"""
        # Schedule canvas update in main thread
        self.root.after(0, self._draw_tft)
    
    def _draw_tft(self):
        """Draw TFT display content based on current state"""
        self.tft_canvas.delete('all')
        
        # Clear screen with state-specific background
        if self.current_state == "permission" and self.anim_frame % 2 == 1:
            self.tft_canvas.create_rectangle(0, 0, 320, 160, fill='#ff0000', outline='')
        else:
            self.tft_canvas.create_rectangle(0, 0, 320, 160, fill='black', outline='')
        
        # Draw state-specific animation
        if self.current_state == "idle":
            self._draw_idle_animation()
        elif self.current_state == "thinking":
            self._draw_thinking_animation()
        elif self.current_state == "coding":
            self._draw_coding_animation()
        elif self.current_state == "done":
            self._draw_done_animation()
        elif self.current_state == "permission":
            self._draw_permission_animation()
        
        # Update frame counter
        self.anim_frame += 1
    
    def _draw_idle_animation(self):
        """Draw idle state: Zzz sleeping animation"""
        # Z characters
        z_text = "Z"
        if self.anim_frame % 4 >= 1:
            z_text += "z"
        if self.anim_frame % 4 >= 2:
            z_text += "z"
        if self.anim_frame % 4 == 3:
            z_text += "."
        
        self.tft_canvas.create_text(
            160, 60,
            text=z_text,
            font=('Arial', 36, 'bold'),
            fill='white'
        )
        
        # Subtitle
        self.tft_canvas.create_text(
            160, 130,
            text="[WORK IS OVER]",
            font=('Arial', 12),
            fill='#00ffff'
        )
        
        # Beep on frame 0
        if self.anim_frame % 4 == 0 and not self.muted:
            self._play_beep(440, 30)
            self._flash_buzzer()
    
    def _draw_thinking_animation(self):
        """Draw thinking state: expanding circles"""
        # Title
        self.tft_canvas.create_text(
            160, 20,
            text="Thinking",
            font=('Arial', 18, 'bold'),
            fill='#ffff00'
        )
        
        # Expanding circles
        cx, cy = 160, 90
        num_circles = self.anim_frame % 6
        for i in range(num_circles):
            r = 20 + i * 15
            self.tft_canvas.create_oval(
                cx - r, cy - r, cx + r, cy + r,
                outline='#ffff00',
                width=2
            )
        
        # Beep
        if not self.muted:
            freq = 600 + (self.anim_frame % 6) * 80
            self._play_beep(freq, 30)
            self._flash_buzzer()
    
    def _draw_coding_animation(self):
        """Draw coding state: scrolling code lines"""
        self.tft_canvas.create_text(
            10, 10,
            text="> 0 line()",
            font=('Courier', 10),
            fill='#00ff00',
            anchor='nw'
        )
        
        for i in range(7):
            y = 20 + i * 18
            prefix = "> " if (self.anim_frame + i) % 4 == 0 else "  "
            line_text = f"{prefix}{i} line()"
            self.tft_canvas.create_text(
                10, y,
                text=line_text,
                font=('Courier', 10),
                fill='#00ff00',
                anchor='nw'
            )
        
        # Beep on frame 0
        if self.anim_frame % 8 == 0 and not self.muted:
            self._play_beep(1000, 20)
            self._flash_buzzer()
    
    def _draw_done_animation(self):
        """Draw done state: OK! with pulsing circle"""
        # OK text
        self.tft_canvas.create_text(
            160, 40,
            text="OK!",
            font=('Arial', 28, 'bold'),
            fill='#00ff00'
        )
        
        # Pulsing circle
        cx, cy = 160, 100
        r = 30
        if self.anim_frame % 3 == 1:
            self.tft_canvas.create_oval(cx - r, cy - r, cx + r, cy + r, fill='#00ff00', outline='')
        else:
            self.tft_canvas.create_oval(cx - r, cy - r, cx + r, cy + r, outline='#00ff00', width=3)
        
        # Beep
        if not self.muted:
            self._play_beep(1500, 80)
            self._flash_buzzer()
    
    def _draw_permission_animation(self):
        """Draw permission state: flashing PRESS BUTTON"""
        bg_color = '#ff0000' if self.anim_frame % 2 == 1 else 'black'
        
        self.tft_canvas.create_rectangle(0, 0, 320, 160, fill=bg_color, outline='')
        
        self.tft_canvas.create_text(
            160, 50,
            text="PRESS",
            font=('Arial', 20, 'bold'),
            fill='white'
        )
        
        self.tft_canvas.create_text(
            160, 90,
            text="BUTTON",
            font=('Arial', 20, 'bold'),
            fill='white'
        )
        
        # Beep
        if not self.muted:
            freq = 2000 if self.anim_frame % 2 == 1 else 800
            self._play_beep(freq, 100)
            self._flash_buzzer()
        
        # Solenoid tap
        if self.anim_frame % 2 == 1:
            self._activate_solenoid(150)
    
    def _quit(self):
        """Quit simulator"""
        self.anim_running = False
        self.root.quit()
        self.root.destroy()
    
    def run(self):
        """Run the simulator"""
        # Center window
        self.root.update_idletasks()
        width = self.root.winfo_width()
        height = self.root.winfo_height()
        x = (self.root.winfo_screenwidth() // 2) - (width // 2)
        y = (self.root.winfo_screenheight() // 2) - (height // 2)
        self.root.geometry(f'+{x}+{y}')
        
        self.root.mainloop()


def run_simulator():
    """Entry point for bridge.py"""
    sim = HardwareSimulator()
    sim.run()


if __name__ == "__main__":
    run_simulator()</toolResult>
