        animation: bounce 1s infinite ease-in-out;
      }
      
      /* Ground Shadow Pulse */
      .shadow-anim {
        transform-box: fill-box;
        transform-origin: 50% 50%;
        animation: shadow 1s infinite ease-in-out;
      }

      /* Enthusiastic Waving Arms */
      .arm-l {
        transform-box: fill-box;
        transform-origin: 100% 50%; /* Shoulder joint */
        animation: wave-l 0.15s infinite alternate ease-in-out;
      }
      .arm-r {
        transform-box: fill-box;
        transform-origin: 0% 50%; /* Shoulder joint */
        animation: wave-r 0.15s infinite alternate ease-in-out;
      }

      /* Happy Blinking Eyes */
      .eyes-blink {
        transform-box: fill-box;
        transform-origin: 50% 50%;
        animation: blink 2s infinite linear;
      }

      /* Pixel-Art Sparkle Animations (Frame-by-frame style) */
      .spark-center {
        opacity: 0;
        animation: flash-center 1.5s infinite step-end;
        animation-delay: var(--delay, 0s);
      }
      
      .spark-outer {
        opacity: 0;
        animation: flash-outer 1.5s infinite step-end;
        animation-delay: var(--delay, 0s);
      }

      /* Character Keyframes */
      @keyframes bounce {
        0%, 15%, 100% { transform: translateY(0) scaleY(1); }
        20% { transform: translateY(0) scaleY(0.85); }     /* Anticipation squash */
        40% { transform: translateY(-10px) scaleY(1.05); } /* Fast up + stretch */
        50% { transform: translateY(-12px) scaleY(1); }    /* Hangtime peak */
        60% { transform: translateY(-10px) scaleY(1.05); } /* Fast fall + stretch */
        80% { transform: translateY(0) scaleY(0.85); }     /* Landing squash */
        85% { transform: translateY(0) scaleY(1); }        /* Recover */
      }

      @keyframes shadow {
        0%, 15%, 100% { transform: scale(1); opacity: 0.5; }
        20% { transform: scale(1.1); opacity: 0.6; }
        40% { transform: scale(0.6); opacity: 0.2; }
        50% { transform: scale(0.5); opacity: 0.15; }
        60% { transform: scale(0.6); opacity: 0.2; }
        80% { transform: scale(1.1); opacity: 0.6; }
        85% { transform: scale(1); opacity: 0.5; }
      }

      @keyframes wave-l {
        0% { transform: rotate(45deg); }
        100% { transform: rotate(85deg); }
      }

      @keyframes wave-r {
        0% { transform: rotate(-45deg); }
        100% { transform: rotate(-85deg); }
      }

      @keyframes blink {
        0%, 46%, 54%, 100% { transform: scaleY(1); }
        50% { transform: scaleY(0.1); }
      }

      /* 
        True 8-Bit Sparkle Timeline:
        1. Small center dot appears
        2. Outer arms appear (Full Star)
        3. Center dot disappears (Hollow Ring)
        4. Everything disappears 
      */
      @keyframes flash-center {
        0%  { opacity: 0; }
        10% { opacity: 1; }  /* Small dot */
        30% { opacity: 0; }  /* Disappears, leaving hollow star */
        100%{ opacity: 0; }
      }
      
      @keyframes flash-outer {
        0%  { opacity: 0; }
        20% { opacity: 1; }  /* Outer arms appear to complete the star */
        40% { opacity: 0; }  /* Entire star disappears */
        100%{ opacity: 0; }
      }
    </style>

    <!-- Reusable Pixel Art Sparkle Definition -->
    <g id="px-sparkle">
      <!-- Center pixel -->
      <rect class="spark-center" x="-0.5" y="-0.5" width="1" height="1" />
      <!-- Outer 4 pixels forming the cross -->
      <path class="spark-outer" d="M -0.5,-1.5 h1 v1 h-1 z 
                                   M -0.5,0.5 h1 v1 h-1 z 
                                   M -1.5,-0.5 h1 v1 h-1 z 
                                   M 0.5,-0.5 h1 v1 h-1 z" />
    </g>
  </defs>

  <!-- Ground Shadow -->
  <rect id="ground-shadow" class="shadow-anim" x="3" y="15" width="9" height="1" fill="#000000"/>

  <!-- Pixel-Art Sparkle Particles Group -->

    <use href="#px-sparkle" x="18" y="-4" fill="#FFA000" style="--delay: 0.3s"/>

    <use href="#px-sparkle" x="-2" y="6" fill="#FFD700" style="--delay: 0.7s"/>
  </g>

  <!-- Main Animated Character -->

      <rect id="inner-left-leg" x="5" y="13" width="1" height="2"/>
      <rect id="inner-right-leg" x="9" y="13" width="1" height="2"/>
      <rect id="outer-right-leg" x="11" y="13" width="1" height="2"/>

      <!-- Main Torso -->

      </g>
      <g class="arm-r">
        <rect id="right-arm" x="13" y="9" width="2" height="2"/>
      </g>
    </g>
    
    <!-- Eyes Color Group -->

      <rect id="right-eye" x="10" y="8" width="1" height="2"/>
    </g>

<toolResult><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="-15 -25 45 45" width="500" height="500">
  <defs>
    <style>
      /* ===== Body (KEEP) ===== */
      .body-bounce {
        transform-origin: 7.5px 15px;
        animation: body-bounce 0.35s infinite ease-in-out;
      }
      .breathe {
        transform-origin: 7.5px 13px;
        animation: breathe 3.2s infinite ease-in-out;
      }

      /* ===== Arms (KEEP) ===== */
      .arm-l-type {
        transform-origin: 2px 10px;
        animation: type-l 0.15s infinite ease-in-out;
      }
      .arm-r-type {
        transform-origin: 13px 10px;
        animation: type-r 0.12s infinite ease-in-out;
      }

      /* ===== Eyes ===== */
      .eyes-code {
        transform-origin: 7.5px 9px;
        animation: eye-code 10s infinite ease-in-out;
      }

      /* ===== Code lines: each line grows, holds, then slides up + fades ===== */
      .code-line {
        transform-box: fill-box;
        transform-origin: left center;

      .cl2 { animation: cl2 6s infinite; }

      /* Key press flashes — different periods so they look random */
      .key-flash { opacity: 0; }

      /* Data particles (float up behind screen) */
      .data-bit { opacity: 0; animation: float-data 1.5s infinite linear; }
      .d1 { animation-delay: 0s; }
      .d2 { animation-delay: -0.4s; }
      .d3 { animation-delay: -0.8s; }
      .d4 { animation-delay: -1.2s; }

      /* Shadow */
      .shadow-anim {
        transform-origin: 7.5px 15.5px;
        animation: shadow-bob 0.4s infinite ease-in-out;
      }

      /* ==================== Keyframes ==================== */

      @keyframes body-bounce {
        0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0); }

        100% { transform: rotate(-5deg); }

        0%   { transform: rotate(5deg); }
        25%  { transform: rotate(38deg); }

        75%  { transform: rotate(30deg); }
        100% { transform: rotate(5deg); }
      }

      /* Eyes: long keyboard squint → 2 consecutive scans → keyboard */
      @keyframes eye-code {
        0%   { transform: translate(0, 1px) scaleY(0.6); }
        14%  { transform: translate(0, 1px) scaleY(0.6); }
        15%  { transform: translate(0, 1px) scaleY(0.1); }

        57%  { transform: translate(-1px, -0.5px) scaleY(1); }
        62%  { transform: translate(1.5px, -0.5px) scaleY(1); }
        64%  { transform: translate(-0.5px, -0.3px) scaleY(1); }

         Each line staggers by ~15%. Slide-up gives "scroll" feel.

      @keyframes cl1 {
        0%        { transform: scaleX(0); opacity: 0; }

<toolResult><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="-15 -25 45 45" width="500" height="500">
  <!-- clawd thinking bubble v25 (2026-05-15)

       v25 = v24 + dreamy edge-flow rewrite.
       Lu's call: v24 flow pixels read as broken — codex used
       step-end (hard on/off) + translate jumps + scattered
       positions across different sides, so the eye reads
       "buggy detached pixel" not "edge flow".

       Fix: 4 pale-blue 1x1 pixels per bubble, each sitting
       exactly 1px outside one flat edge (top / right / bottom
       / left of rim). They fade in and out softly via
       ease-in-out opacity only (no transform), staggered 6%
       apart so adjacent pixels overlap during their fades.
       The eye reads this as a single highlight marching
       clockwise around the rim — the dreamy / imagining /
       thought-cloud signature Lu asked for.

       v24 = v23 + "脚站定不动".
       Lu's call: legs jiggling per body-lean reads as restless.
       Fix: lift the 4 leg <rect>s out of #clawd-body so they do
       NOT inherit body-attend rotate/translate or body-breathe
       scale. Torso / arm / eyes still inherit body motion as
       before. The leg-*-think keyframes are no longer
       referenced (kept defined for diff clarity, no perf cost).

       Side note: torso底部边缘旋转时会与脚顶部出现 0.1-0.2px
       的极小错位 (max body-attend rotate ≈ 2.6deg around y=13
       即脚顶部基线), 桌宠尺寸下肉眼不可见。

       v23 from v22 critique: "not cute / not精致".
       Five fixes layered on top of v22 timing:
         1. Bubble tail: chat-style stair removed.
            Now a real "thought bubble chain" — main bubble +
            two recurring small puffs (1px and 0.5px) trailing
            down to clawd's head. This is the manga thought-cloud
            signature; clawd looks like he is thinking, not being
            messaged.
         2. Eyes react: rect eyes during the thinking hold
            switch to ^^ smile eyes for a "got it!" beat
            during the third dot reveal, then blink back to rect
            before the bubble exits. Uses technique 14
            (blink-cover swap from rect to smile).
         3. Inspiration sparkle: a small + pops above the
            bubble exactly when the smile happens, technique 8
            "double-flash" reused as a single emphatic blink.
         4. Chin-rest arm now visible: same-side arm rotates
            ~50deg with a translate so the hand actually reaches
            the cheek/chin area, not the previous +22deg micro-tilt.
         5. Bubble tone switched to white (#FFFFFF), with dots
            in a slightly deeper Clawd blue (#256891) so they read
            clearly inside the bubble.
         6. White bubble gets subtle pale-blue pixels outside the
            rim, stepping around the outer contour for a small
            pixel-flow feel while keeping the interior clean.

       Timing, 12s loop (three slow dot reveals per side):
         0-3%    idle
         3-7%    notice left + left bubble arrives
         7-43%   left thinking, three slow dot reveals
         43-44%  blink (cover swap rect -> smile)
         44-48%  "got it" smile + + flash
         48-49%  blink (cover swap smile -> rect)
         49-52%  left bubble leaves
         52-54%  very short neutral reset
         54-58%  notice right + right bubble arrives
         58-92%  right thinking, three slow dot reveals
         92-93%  blink (cover swap rect -> smile)
         93-96%  "got it" smile + + flash
         96-97%  blink (cover swap smile -> rect)
         97-99%  right bubble leaves
         99-100% short loop-end idle
  -->

  <defs>
    <style>
      #ground-shadow {
        transform-box: view-box;
        transform-origin: 7.5px 15.5px;
        animation: shadow-think 12s infinite ease-in-out;
      }

      .body-breathe {
        transform-box: view-box;
        transform-origin: 7.5px 13px;
        animation: body-breathe 12s infinite ease-in-out;
      }

      .body-attend {
        transform-box: view-box;
        transform-origin: 7.5px 13px;
        animation: body-attend 12s infinite ease-in-out;
      }

      .arm-left,
      .arm-right,
      .leg-left-inner,
      .leg-left-outer,
      .leg-right-inner,
      .leg-right-outer {
        transform-box: fill-box;
        transform-origin: 50% 0%;
      }

      .arm-left {
        transform-origin: 100% 0%;
        animation: arm-left-think 12s infinite ease-in-out;
      }
      .arm-right {
        transform-origin: 0% 0%;
        animation: arm-right-think 12s infinite ease-in-out;
      }
      .leg-right-inner { animation: leg-right-inner-think 12s infinite ease-in-out; }
      .leg-right-outer { animation: leg-right-outer-think 12s infinite ease-in-out; }
      .leg-left-inner  { animation: leg-left-inner-think  12s infinite ease-in-out; }
      .leg-left-outer  { animation: leg-left-outer-think  12s infinite ease-in-out; }

      .eyes {
        transform-box: view-box;
        transform-origin: 7.5px 9px;
        animation: eyes-think 12s infinite ease-in-out;
      }

      .eyes-rect  { animation: eyes-rect-vis  12s infinite step-end; }
      .eyes-smile { opacity: 0; animation: eyes-smile-vis 12s infinite step-end; }

      .left-bubble,
      .right-bubble {
        transform-box: fill-box;
        transform-origin: 50% 100%;
        opacity: 0;
      }
      .left-bubble  { animation: left-bubble-life 12s infinite ease-in-out; }
      .right-bubble { animation: right-bubble-life 12s infinite ease-in-out; }

      .dot { opacity: 0; }
      .left-bubble  .dot1 { animation: left-dot-1  12s infinite step-end; }
      .left-bubble  .dot2 { animation: left-dot-2  12s infinite step-end; }
      .left-bubble  .dot3 { animation: left-dot-3  12s infinite step-end; }
      .right-bubble .dot1 { animation: right-dot-1 12s infinite step-end; }
      .right-bubble .dot2 { animation: right-dot-2 12s infinite step-end; }
      .right-bubble .dot3 { animation: right-dot-3 12s infinite step-end; }

      .bubble-flow {
        opacity: 0;
      }
      .left-bubble  .flow1 { animation: left-flow-1  12s infinite ease-in-out; }
      .left-bubble  .flow2 { animation: left-flow-2  12s infinite ease-in-out; }
      .left-bubble  .flow3 { animation: left-flow-3  12s infinite ease-in-out; }
      .left-bubble  .flow4 { animation: left-flow-4  12s infinite ease-in-out; }
      .right-bubble .flow1 { animation: right-flow-1 12s infinite ease-in-out; }
      .right-bubble .flow2 { animation: right-flow-2 12s infinite ease-in-out; }
      .right-bubble .flow3 { animation: right-flow-3 12s infinite ease-in-out; }
      .right-bubble .flow4 { animation: right-flow-4 12s infinite ease-in-out; }

      .left-spark,
      .right-spark {
        transform-box: fill-box;
        transform-origin: 50% 50%;
        opacity: 0;
      }
      .left-spark  { animation: left-spark-bling  12s infinite ease-out; }
      .right-spark { animation: right-spark-bling 12s infinite ease-out; }

      @keyframes shadow-think {
        0%, 3%, 52%, 99%, 100%      { opacity: 0.5; transform: translateX(0) scaleX(1); }
        15%, 43%                    { opacity: 0.4; transform: translateX(-0.28px) scaleX(0.9); }
        70%, 96%                    { opacity: 0.4; transform: translateX(0.28px) scaleX(0.9); }
      }

      @keyframes body-breathe {
        0%, 3%, 52%, 99%, 100%      { transform: scale(1, 1) translateY(0); }
        15%, 29%, 43%, 70%, 84%, 96% { transform: scale(1.006, 0.994) translateY(0.08px); }
        22%, 36%, 64%, 78%, 90%     { transform: scale(1.014, 0.986) translateY(0.18px); }
        54%                         { transform: scale(0.996, 1.004) translateY(-0.08px); }
      }

      @keyframes body-attend {
        0%, 3%, 52%, 99%, 100%      { transform: translate(0, 0) rotate(0deg); }
        7%                          { transform: translate(-0.3px, 0.08px) rotate(-1.6deg); }
        15%                         { transform: translate(-0.48px, 0.14px) rotate(-2.6deg); }
        30%                         { transform: translate(-0.45px, 0.1px) rotate(-2.3deg); }
        42%                         { transform: translate(-0.4px, 0.08px) rotate(-2.0deg); }
        49%                         { transform: translate(-0.2px, 0.04px) rotate(-0.8deg); }
        51%                         { transform: translate(-0.05px, 0) rotate(-0.2deg); }
        54%                         { transform: translate(0, 0.08px) rotate(0deg); }
        58%                         { transform: translate(0.3px, 0.08px) rotate(1.6deg); }
        70%                         { transform: translate(0.48px, 0.14px) rotate(2.6deg); }
        84%                         { transform: translate(0.45px, 0.1px) rotate(2.3deg); }
        96%                         { transform: translate(0.32px, 0.06px) rotate(1.4deg); }
        98%                         { transform: translate(0.05px, 0) rotate(0.2deg); }
      }

      /*
        v23 chin-rest arm: noticeable lift instead of v22's
        invisible +22deg / -1px microtilt. Same-side arm
        rotates ~52deg + translate so the hand physically
        reaches the cheek line.
      */
      /*
        v23 arm: per Lu's call, restored verbatim from v22.
        v22's micro-tilt feels "still" but does not stutter.
        The other v23 changes (bubble chain / smile eyes /
        sparkle / timing) are kept on top.
      */
      @keyframes arm-left-think {
        0%, 3%, 52%, 99%, 100%      { transform: translate(0, 0) rotate(0deg); }
        7%                          { transform: translate(0.18px, -0.7px) rotate(14deg); }
        15%, 49%                    { transform: translate(0.35px, -1.05px) rotate(22deg); }
        30%                         { transform: translate(0.28px, -0.92px) rotate(26deg); }
        58%, 96%                    { transform: translate(-0.08px, 0.45px) rotate(0deg); }
        84%                         { transform: translate(-0.12px, 0.55px) rotate(0deg); }
      }
      @keyframes arm-right-think {
        0%, 3%, 52%, 99%, 100%      { transform: translate(0, 0) rotate(0deg); }
        7%, 49%                     { transform: translate(0.08px, 0.45px) rotate(0deg); }
        30%                         { transform: translate(0.12px, 0.55px) rotate(0deg); }
        58%                         { transform: translate(-0.18px, -0.7px) rotate(-14deg); }
        70%, 96%                    { transform: translate(-0.35px, -1.05px) rotate(-22deg); }
        84%                         { transform: translate(-0.28px, -0.92px) rotate(-26deg); }
      }

      @keyframes leg-right-inner-think {
        0%, 3%, 39%, 98%, 100%      { transform: rotate(0deg) translateY(0); }
        8%, 34%                     { transform: rotate(7deg) translateY(-0.12px); }
        20%                         { transform: rotate(9deg) translateY(-0.2px); }
        42%, 94%                    { transform: rotate(-4deg) translateY(-0.08px); }
        70%                         { transform: rotate(-5deg) translateY(-0.14px); }
      }
      @keyframes leg-right-outer-think {
        0%, 3%, 39%, 98%, 100%      { transform: rotate(0deg) translateY(0); }
        8%, 34%                     { transform: rotate(10deg) translateY(-0.18px); }
        20%                         { transform: rotate(12deg) translateY(-0.26px); }
        42%, 94%                    { transform: rotate(-5deg) translateY(-0.1px); }
        70%                         { transform: rotate(-6deg) translateY(-0.16px); }
      }
      @keyframes leg-left-inner-think {
        0%, 3%, 39%, 98%, 100%      { transform: rotate(0deg) translateY(0); }
        8%, 34%                     { transform: rotate(4deg) translateY(-0.08px); }
        20%                         { transform: rotate(5deg) translateY(-0.14px); }
        42%, 94%                    { transform: rotate(-7deg) translateY(-0.12px); }
        70%                         { transform: rotate(-9deg) translateY(-0.2px); }
      }
      @keyframes leg-left-outer-think {
        0%, 3%, 39%, 98%, 100%      { transform: rotate(0deg) translateY(0); }
        8%, 34%                     { transform: rotate(5deg) translateY(-0.1px); }
        20%                         { transform: rotate(6deg) translateY(-0.16px); }
        42%, 94%                    { transform: rotate(-10deg) translateY(-0.18px); }
        70%                         { transform: rotate(-12deg) translateY(-0.26px); }
      }

      /*
        v23 eyes: thinking squint + blink-cover swap to ^^ smile
        at 43%/48% (left) and 92%/97% (right).
        scaleY(0.85) during thinking = subtle squint.
        scaleY(0.12) at swap = full blink that hides the
        rect->smile / smile->rect transition.
      */
      @keyframes eyes-think {
        0%, 3%, 52%, 99%, 100%      { transform: translate(0, 0) scaleY(1); }
        5%                          { transform: translate(-0.3px, -0.5px) scaleY(0.95); }
        9%, 42%                     { transform: translate(-0.45px, -0.78px) scaleY(0.85); }
        43%                         { transform: translate(-0.45px, -0.78px) scaleY(0.12); }
        44%, 47%                    { transform: translate(-0.45px, -0.78px) scaleY(1); }
        48%                         { transform: translate(-0.45px, -0.78px) scaleY(0.12); }
        50%                         { transform: translate(-0.15px, -0.25px) scaleY(0.95); }
        54%                         { transform: translate(0, 0) scaleY(0.18); }
        55%                         { transform: translate(0.3px, -0.5px) scaleY(0.95); }
        59%, 88%                    { transform: translate(0.45px, -0.78px) scaleY(0.85); }
        92%                         { transform: translate(0.45px, -0.78px) scaleY(0.12); }
        93%, 96%                    { transform: translate(0.45px, -0.78px) scaleY(1); }
        97%                         { transform: translate(0.45px, -0.78px) scaleY(0.12); }
        98%                         { transform: translate(0.2px, -0.4px) scaleY(0.95); }
        100%                        { transform: translate(0, 0) scaleY(1); }
      }

      @keyframes eyes-rect-vis {
        0%   { opacity: 1; }
        43%  { opacity: 0; }
        48%  { opacity: 1; }
        92%  { opacity: 0; }
        97%  { opacity: 1; }
      }
      @keyframes eyes-smile-vis {
        0%   { opacity: 0; }
        43%  { opacity: 1; }
        48%  { opacity: 0; }
        92%  { opacity: 1; }
        97%  { opacity: 0; }
      }

      @keyframes left-bubble-life {
        0%, 3%    { opacity: 0; transform: translate(-0.2px, 0.7px) scale(0.82); }
        5%        { opacity: 0.75; transform: translate(-0.1px, 0.25px) scale(0.94); }
        7%        { opacity: 1; transform: translate(0, 0) scale(1.04); }
        10%, 43%  { opacity: 1; transform: translate(0, 0) scale(1); }
        46%       { opacity: 1; transform: translate(0, -0.2px) scale(1.02); }
        48%       { opacity: 1; transform: translate(0, -0.18px) scale(1.01); }
        49%       { opacity: 1; transform: translate(0, 0) scale(1); }
        52%       { opacity: 0; transform: translate(0, 0.65px) scale(0.9); }
        53%, 100% { opacity: 0; transform: translate(0, 0.65px) scale(0.9); }
      }

      @keyframes right-bubble-life {
        0%, 53%        { opacity: 0; transform: translate(0.2px, 0.7px) scale(0.82); }
        54%            { opacity: 0.75; transform: translate(0.1px, 0.25px) scale(0.94); }
        58%            { opacity: 1; transform: translate(0, 0) scale(1.04); }
        61%, 92%       { opacity: 1; transform: translate(0, 0) scale(1); }
        94%            { opacity: 1; transform: translate(0, -0.2px) scale(1.02); }
        96%            { opacity: 1; transform: translate(0, -0.18px) scale(1.01); }
        97%            { opacity: 1; transform: translate(0, 0) scale(1); }
        99%            { opacity: 0; transform: translate(0, 0.65px) scale(0.9); }
        100%           { opacity: 0; transform: translate(0, 0.65px) scale(0.9); }
      }

      @keyframes left-dot-1 {
        0%, 7.99%, 17.99%, 19.99%, 29.99%, 31.99%, 48.99%, 100% { opacity: 0; }
        8%, 17.98%, 20%, 29.98%, 32%, 48.98%                    { opacity: 1; }
      }
      @keyframes left-dot-2 {
        0%, 11.99%, 17.99%, 23.99%, 29.99%, 35.99%, 48.99%, 100% { opacity: 0; }
        12%, 17.98%, 24%, 29.98%, 36%, 48.98%                    { opacity: 1; }
      }
      @keyframes left-dot-3 {
        0%, 15.99%, 17.99%, 27.99%, 29.99%, 39.99%, 48.99%, 100% { opacity: 0; }
        16%, 17.98%, 28%, 29.98%, 40%, 48.98%                    { opacity: 1; }
      }
      @keyframes right-dot-1 {
        0%, 58.99%, 68.99%, 70.99%, 80.99%, 82.99%, 98.49%, 100% { opacity: 0; }
        59%, 68.98%, 71%, 80.98%, 83%, 98.48%                    { opacity: 1; }
      }
      @keyframes right-dot-2 {
        0%, 62.99%, 68.99%, 74.99%, 80.99%, 86.99%, 98.49%, 100% { opacity: 0; }
        63%, 68.98%, 75%, 80.98%, 87%, 98.48%                    { opacity: 1; }
      }
      @keyframes right-dot-3 {
        0%, 66.99%, 68.99%, 78.99%, 80.99%, 90.99%, 98.49%, 100% { opacity: 0; }
        67%, 68.98%, 79%, 80.98%, 91%, 98.48%                    { opacity: 1; }
      }

      /*
        v25 edge-flow keyframes.
        Each pixel: opacity 0 -> 0.7 -> 0 over a 12% window,
        with 6% stagger between adjacent pixels so two are
        always overlapping mid-fade. Pure opacity, no transform
        (v24's translate jumps were the broken-pixel feel).
        Window math:
          left thinking phase  = 10-43%
          right thinking phase = 60-92%
        flow1 = top rim, flow2 = right rim,
        flow3 = bottom rim, flow4 = left rim (clockwise).
      */
      @keyframes left-flow-1 {
        0%, 10%, 22%, 100% { opacity: 0; }
        14%, 18%           { opacity: 0.7; }
      }
      @keyframes left-flow-2 {
        0%, 16%, 28%, 100% { opacity: 0; }
        20%, 24%           { opacity: 0.7; }
      }
      @keyframes left-flow-3 {
        0%, 22%, 34%, 100% { opacity: 0; }
        26%, 30%           { opacity: 0.7; }
      }
      @keyframes left-flow-4 {
        0%, 28%, 40%, 100% { opacity: 0; }
        32%, 36%           { opacity: 0.7; }
      }
      @keyframes right-flow-1 {
        0%, 62%, 74%, 100% { opacity: 0; }
        66%, 70%           { opacity: 0.7; }
      }
      @keyframes right-flow-2 {
        0%, 68%, 80%, 100% { opacity: 0; }
        72%, 76%           { opacity: 0.7; }
      }
      @keyframes right-flow-3 {
        0%, 74%, 86%, 100% { opacity: 0; }
        78%, 82%           { opacity: 0.7; }
      }
      @keyframes right-flow-4 {
        0%, 80%, 92%, 100% { opacity: 0; }
        84%, 88%           { opacity: 0.7; }
      }

      /*
        v23 sparkle bling: single emphatic flash at "got it"
        moment (left 28-32% / right 71-82%).
        scale + opacity pulse from technique 8.
      */
      @keyframes left-spark-bling {
        0%, 43%, 49%, 100% { opacity: 0; transform: scale(0.4); }
        44%                { opacity: 0; transform: scale(0.5); }
        45%                { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1.35); }
        46.5%              { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1); }
        48%                { opacity: 0.4; transform: scale(0.7); }
      }
      @keyframes right-spark-bling {
        0%, 91%, 97%, 100% { opacity: 0; transform: scale(0.4); }
        92%                { opacity: 0; transform: scale(0.5); }
        93%                { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1.35); }
        94.5%              { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1); }
        96%                { opacity: 0.4; transform: scale(0.7); }
      }
    </style>
  </defs>

  <rect id="ground-shadow" x="3" y="15" width="9" height="1" fill="#000000" opacity="0.5"/>

  <!--
    v24: legs are lifted out of #clawd-body so they do not inherit
    body-attend (rotate/translate toward bubble) or body-breathe
    (scale). Rendered before #master-group so the torso (which is
    inside master-group) draws on top of the leg tops as before.
  -->
  <g id="legs-static" fill="#DE886D">
    <rect id="outer-left-leg"  x="3"  y="13" width="1" height="2"/>
    <rect id="inner-left-leg"  x="5"  y="13" width="1" height="2"/>
    <rect id="inner-right-leg" x="9"  y="13" width="1" height="2"/>
    <rect id="outer-right-leg" x="11" y="13" width="1" height="2"/>
  </g>

  <g id="master-group">
    <g class="body-breathe">
      <g id="clawd-body" class="body-attend">
        <g id="body-color-group" fill="#DE886D">
          <rect id="torso" x="2" y="6" width="11" height="7"/>
          <rect class="arm-left"  id="left-arm"  x="0"  y="9" width="2" height="2"/>
          <rect class="arm-right" id="right-arm" x="13" y="9" width="2" height="2"/>
        </g>

        <g class="eyes" id="eyes-color-group">
          <g class="eyes-rect" fill="#000000">
            <rect id="left-eye"  x="4"  y="8" width="1" height="2"/>
            <rect id="right-eye" x="10" y="8" width="1" height="2"/>
          </g>
          <g class="eyes-smile" fill="none" stroke="#000000" stroke-width="0.7" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
            <polyline points="3.5,9 4.5,8 5.5,9"/>
            <polyline points="9.5,9 10.5,8 11.5,9"/>
          </g>
        </g>
      </g>
    </g>

    <!--
      Left thought bubble.
      v23: bubble path lifted by 1px (path y -3..4 -> -4..3) so
      there is a 3px gap to clawd's head. Old chat-tail
      (0,4)(1,4)(1,5) deleted. New chain: 1x1 puff at (1,4) +
      0.5x0.5 puff at (2,5.5) trailing toward clawd's head top
      (y=6).
    -->
    <g class="left-bubble">
      <path d="M-1 -4 H6 V-3 H7 V2 H6 V3 H-1 V2 H-2 V-3 H-1 Z" fill="#FFFFFF"/>
      <!-- v25 rim-flow pixels: clockwise top -> right -> bottom -> left -->
      <rect class="bubble-flow flow1" x="3"  y="-5" width="1" height="1" fill="#BFEAFF"/>
      <rect class="bubble-flow flow2" x="8"  y="0"  width="1" height="1" fill="#BFEAFF"/>
      <rect class="bubble-flow flow3" x="4"  y="4"  width="1" height="1" fill="#BFEAFF"/>
      <rect class="bubble-flow flow4" x="-3" y="0"  width="1" height="1" fill="#BFEAFF"/>
      <rect x="1"   y="4"   width="1"   height="1"   fill="#FFFFFF"/>
      <rect x="2"   y="5.5" width="0.5" height="0.5" fill="#FFFFFF"/>
      <rect class="dot dot1" x="0" y="-1" width="1" height="1" fill="#256891"/>
      <rect class="dot dot2" x="2" y="-1" width="1" height="1" fill="#256891"/>
      <rect class="dot dot3" x="4" y="-1" width="1" height="1" fill="#256891"/>
    </g>

    <g class="right-bubble">
      <path d="M9 -4 H16 V-3 H17 V2 H16 V3 H9 V2 H8 V-3 H9 Z" fill="#FFFFFF"/>
      <!-- v25 rim-flow pixels: clockwise top -> right -> bottom -> left -->
      <rect class="bubble-flow flow1" x="12" y="-5" width="1" height="1" fill="#BFEAFF"/>
      <rect class="bubble-flow flow2" x="18" y="0"  width="1" height="1" fill="#BFEAFF"/>
      <rect class="bubble-flow flow3" x="15" y="4"  width="1" height="1" fill="#BFEAFF"/>
      <rect class="bubble-flow flow4" x="7"  y="0"  width="1" height="1" fill="#BFEAFF"/>
      <rect x="13"   y="4"   width="1"   height="1"   fill="#FFFFFF"/>
      <rect x="12.5" y="5.5" width="0.5" height="0.5" fill="#FFFFFF"/>
      <rect class="dot dot1" x="10" y="-1" width="1" height="1" fill="#256891"/>
      <rect class="dot dot2" x="12" y="-1" width="1" height="1" fill="#256891"/>
      <rect class="dot dot3" x="14" y="-1" width="1" height="1" fill="#256891"/>
    </g>

    <!--
      v23 inspiration sparkles. Pixel + (5 small rects) above
      each bubble, bling at the "got it" moment.
      Color #FFE066 (per technique 12 anti-boss-gold rule).
    -->
    <g class="left-spark">
      <rect x="6"   y="-7"   width="1"   height="0.6" fill="#FFE066"/>

```cpp
// Clawd pixel crab - faithful reproduction from SVG
// Color: #DE886D = tft.color565(222, 136, 109)

// Eyes: x4,y8,w1,h2 & x10,y8,w1,h2 (black)
// Legs: x3,y13,w1,h2 & x5,y13,w1,h2 & x9,y13,w1,h2 & x11,y13,w1,h2
// Shadow: x3,y15,w9,h1 (black, 50% opacity)

#define S 3  // scale factor
#define OX 57  // x offset to center crab
#define OY 25  // y offset
#define CRAB_COLOR tft.color565(222, 136, 109)  // #DE886D

  uint16_t c = CRAB_COLOR;
  // Shadow
  tft.fillRect(OX + 3*S, OY + 15*S, 9*S, 1*S, tft.color565(0, 0, 0));
  // Legs

  tft.fillRect(OX + 5*S, OY + 13*S, 1*S, 2*S, c);
  tft.fillRect(OX + 9*S, OY + 13*S, 1*S, 2*S, c);
  tft.fillRect(OX + 11*S, OY + 13*S, 1*S, 2*S, c);
  // Torso
  tft.fillRect(OX + 2*S, OY + (6+yOff)*S, 11*S, 7*S, c);
  // Arms
  tft.fillRect(OX + 0*S, OY + (9+yOff)*S, 2*S, 2*S, c);
  tft.fillRect(OX + 13*S, OY + (9+yOff)*S, 2*S, 2*S, c);
}

void drawCrabEyes(int yOff = 0, bool closed = false) {
  if (closed) {
    // Horizontal line eyes
    tft.fillRect(OX + 4*S, OY + (9+yOff)*S, 1*S, 1*S, ST77XX_BLACK);

    tft.fillRect(OX + 10*S, OY + (8+yOff)*S, 1*S, 2*S, ST77XX_BLACK);
  }
}
```

```cpp
}
```

```cpp
// Pin definitions
#define PIN_BTN 2
#define PIN_SOL 3
#define PIN_BUZ 4

// Drawing constants  
#define PX 3     // pixel scale
#define OX 57    // x offset to center on 160px
#define OY 22    // y offset

// Crab color #DE886D = RGB(222,136,109)
uint16_t CRAB;

void clawd(int yo=0, int armDY=0, bool blink=false, bool bigEyes=false) {
  // Ground shadow
  tft.fillRect(OX+3*PX, OY+15*PX, 9*PX, PX, 0x18C3);
  
  // Legs (y=13, h=2) - always static
  tft.fillRect(OX+3*PX,  OY+13*PX, PX, 2*PX, CRAB);
  tft.fillRect(OX+5*PX,  OY+13*PX, PX, 2*PX, CRAB);
  tft.fillRect(OX+9*PX,  OY+13*PX, PX, 2*PX, CRAB);
  tft.fillRect(OX+11*PX, OY+13*PX, PX, 2*PX, CRAB);
  
  // Torso (y=6+yo, h=7)
  tft.fillRect(OX+2*PX, OY+(6+yo)*PX, 11*PX, 7*PX, CRAB);
  
  // Arms (y=9+yo+armDY)
  tft.fillRect(OX+0,     OY+(9+yo)*PX, 2*PX, (2+abs(armDY))*PX, CRAB);
  tft.fillRect(OX+13*PX, OY+(9+yo)*PX, 2*PX, (2+abs(armDY))*PX, CRAB);
  
  // Eyes
  if(blink) {
    tft.fillRect(OX+4*PX,  OY+(9+yo)*PX, PX, PX, ST77XX_BLACK);
    tft.fillRect(OX+10*PX, OY+(9+yo)*PX, PX, PX, ST77XX_BLACK);
  } else if(bigEyes) {
    tft.fillRect(OX+4*PX,  OY+(7+yo)*PX, PX, 4*PX, ST77XX_WHITE);
    tft.fillRect(OX+10*PX, OY+(7+yo)*PX, PX, 4*PX, ST77XX_WHITE);
    tft.fillRect(OX+4*PX,  OY+(8+yo)*PX, PX, 2*PX, ST77XX_BLACK);
    tft.fillRect(OX+10*PX, OY+(8+yo)*PX, PX, 2*PX, ST77XX_BLACK);
  } else {
    tft.fillRect(OX+4*PX,  OY+(8+yo)*PX, PX, 2*PX, ST77XX_BLACK);
    tft.fillRect(OX+10*PX, OY+(8+yo)*PX, PX, 2*PX, ST77XX_BLACK);
  }
}
```

Let me write the C++ code that would go in each section:

=== GLOBAL SECTION ===
```cpp
#define PIN_BTN 2
#define PIN_SOL 3
#define PIN_BUZ 4
#define PX 3
#define OX 57
#define OY 20

int gState = 0, gLastState = -1, gFrame = 0, gMuted = 0;
volatile int gBtnFlag = 0;
unsigned long gSolEnd = 0;
uint16_t cCrab, cShadow, cDark;

// Draw crab body + legs + arms
// yo = body y offset (breathing/typing), al/ar = arm lift offset
void clawdBody(int yo, int al, int ar) {
  // Shadow
  tft.fillRect(OX+3*PX, OY+15*PX, 9*PX, PX, cShadow);
  // Legs
  tft.fillRect(OX+3*PX,  OY+13*PX, PX, 2*PX, cCrab);
  tft.fillRect(OX+5*PX,  OY+13*PX, PX, 2*PX, cCrab);
  tft.fillRect(OX+9*PX,  OY+13*PX, PX, 2*PX, cCrab);
  tft.fillRect(OX+11*PX, OY+13*PX, PX, 2*PX, cCrab);
  // Torso
  tft.fillRect(OX+2*PX, OY+(6+yo)*PX, 11*PX, 7*PX, cCrab);
  // Arms
  tft.fillRect(OX+0,     OY+(9+yo-al)*PX, 2*PX, 2*PX, cCrab);
  tft.fillRect(OX+13*PX, OY+(9+yo-ar)*PX, 2*PX, 2*PX, cCrab);
}

// Draw eyes: mode 0=normal, 1=blink, 2=smile
void clawdEyes(int yo, int mode) {
  if(mode == 1) { // blink
    tft.fillRect(OX+4*PX,  OY+(9+yo)*PX, PX, PX, ST77XX_BLACK);
    tft.fillRect(OX+10*PX, OY+(9+yo)*PX, PX, PX, ST77XX_BLACK);
  } else if(mode == 2) { // smile ^^
    // Just show normal eyes for now - smile is hard with fillRect
    tft.fillRect(OX+4*PX,  OY+(8+yo)*PX, PX, 2*PX, ST77XX_BLACK);
    tft.fillRect(OX+10*PX, OY+(8+yo)*PX, PX, 2*PX, ST77XX_BLACK);
  } else { // normal
    tft.fillRect(OX+4*PX,  OY+(8+yo)*PX, PX, 2*PX, ST77XX_BLACK);
    tft.fillRect(OX+10*PX, OY+(8+yo)*PX, PX, 2*PX, ST77XX_BLACK);
  }
}

// Draw thought bubble (white rect with blue dots)
void drawBubble(int bx, int by, int dots) {
  // Main bubble: rounded rect approximation
  uint16_t white = ST77XX_WHITE;
  tft.fillRect(bx+PX, by, 5*PX, 7*PX, white);
  tft.fillRect(bx, by+PX, 7*PX, 5*PX, white);
  // Tail (small circles)
  tft.fillRect(bx+1*PX, by+7*PX, PX, PX, white);
  tft.fillRect(bx+2*PX, by+8*PX, PX, PX, white);
  // Blue dots inside
  uint16_t blue = tft.color565(37, 104, 145); // #256891
  for(int i = 0; i < dots; i++) {
    tft.fillRect(bx + (1 + i*2)*PX, by + 2*PX, PX, PX, blue);
  }
}

// Draw mini terminal screen
void drawScreen(int sx, int sy, int frame) {
  // Screen body
  tft.fillRect(sx, sy, 13*PX, 10*PX, tft.color565(30,30,46)); // #1E1E2E
  // Title bar
  tft.fillRect(sx, sy, 13*PX, PX+PX/2, tft.color565(45,45,61)); // #2D2D3D
  // Traffic lights
  tft.fillRect(sx+PX/2, sy+PX/2, PX/2, PX/3, ST77XX_RED);
  tft.fillRect(sx+2*PX, sy+PX/2, PX/2, PX/3, 0xFFE0); // yellow
  tft.fillRect(sx+3*PX+PX/2, sy+PX/2, PX/2, PX/3, ST77XX_GREEN);
  
  // Code lines
  uint16_t green = tft.color565(76,175,80);
  uint16_t cyan = tft.color565(64,196,255);
  uint16_t yellow = tft.color565(255,193,7);
  
  // Animated scrolling code lines
  int phase = (frame / 8) % 5;
  for(int i = 0; i < 4; i++) {
    int lineIdx = (phase + i) % 5;
    int lx = sx + PX/2;
    int ly = sy + 2*PX + i * 2*PX;
    int widths[] = {5*PX, 8*PX, 4*PX, 6*PX, 3*PX};
    uint16_t colors[] = {green, green, cyan, yellow, green};
    int indents[] = {0, PX, PX, 0, PX};
    if(lineIdx < 4) {
      tft.fillRect(lx + indents[lineIdx], ly, widths[lineIdx], PX*2/3, colors[lineIdx]);
    }
  }
}

// Draw keyboard
void drawKeyboard(int kx, int ky) {
  uint16_t kb = tft.color565(69,90,100); // #455A64
  uint16_t key = tft.color565(120,144,156); // #78909C
  tft.fillRect(kx, ky, 16*PX, 3*PX, kb);
  // Key row 1
  for(int i = 0; i < 7; i++) {
    tft.fillRect(kx + i*2*PX + PX/3, ky + PX/3, PX, PX*2/3, key);
  }
  // Key row 2
  for(int i = 0; i < 12; i++) {
    tft.fillRect(kx + i*PX + PX*2/3, ky + PX + PX/3, PX*2/3, PX*2/3, key);
  }
}

// Draw pixel sparkle
void drawSparkle(int x, int y, uint16_t color) {
  tft.fillRect(x, y-PX, PX, PX*3, color); // vertical
  tft.fillRect(x-PX, y, PX*3, PX, color); // horizontal
}

// Status text
void drawStatus(const char* text, uint16_t color) {
  tft.setTextSize(1);
  tft.setTextColor(color);
  tft.setCursor(5, 72);
  tft.print(text);
}
```

- `custom_code2("gState")` references a C++ variable defined in custom_code

For the thinking state:
```cpp
static unsigned long t = 0;
if(millis() - t > 300) {
  t = millis();
  gFrame = (gFrame + 1) % 40;
  tft.fillScreen(ST77XX_BLACK);
  
  // Alternate left/right thinking every 20 frames
  bool leftSide = (gFrame < 20);
  int phase = gFrame % 20;
  
  // Body
  int armL = leftSide ? 2 : 0;  // left arm up when thinking left
  int armR = leftSide ? 0 : 2;  // right arm up when thinking right
  cBody(0, armL, armR);
  cEyes(0, false);
  
  // Thought bubble
  int bx = leftSide ? OX - 8*PX : OX + 8*PX;
  int by = OY - 4*PX;
  // White bubble
  tft.fillRect(bx+PX, by, 5*PX, 7*PX, ST77XX_WHITE);
  tft.fillRect(bx, by+PX, 7*PX, 5*PX, ST77XX_WHITE);
  // Tail
  tft.fillRect(bx+PX, by+7*PX, PX, PX, ST77XX_WHITE);
  tft.fillRect(bx+2*PX, by+8*PX, PX, PX, ST77XX_WHITE);
  
  // Blue dots (appear one by one)
  uint16_t blue = tft.color565(37, 104, 145);
  int dots = phase / 5;  // 0 dots, then 1, 2, 3
  if(dots > 3) dots = 3;
  for(int i = 0; i < dots; i++) {
    tft.fillRect(bx + (1 + i*2)*PX, by + 2*PX, PX, PX, blue);
  }
  
  // Sparkle at "got it" moment
  if(phase >= 16 && phase <= 18) {
    uint16_t spark = tft.color565(255, 224, 102);
    int sx = leftSide ? bx - 2*PX : bx + 8*PX;
    int sy = by - 3*PX;
    tft.fillRect(sx, sy, PX, 3*PX, spark);
    tft.fillRect(sx-PX, sy+PX, 3*PX, PX, spark);
  }
  
  // Smile eyes at "got it"
  if(phase == 17) {
    cEyes(0, true); // blink covers the transition
  }
  
  // Status
  tft.setTextSize(1);
  tft.setTextColor(tft.color565(255,255,0));
  tft.setCursor(5, 73);
  tft.print("thinking...");
  
  if(!gMuted) tone(PIN_BUZ, 500 + gFrame * 30, 25);
}
```

```cpp
static unsigned long t = 0;

  int bodyOff = (gFrame % 2);
  int armAnim = (gFrame % 2) ? 1 : -1;

  cEyes(bodyOff, false);
  
  // Keyboard
  int kx = OX - PX/2;
  int ky = OY + 12*PX;
  uint16_t kbCol = tft.color565(69, 90, 100);
  uint16_t keyCol = tft.color565(120, 144, 156);
  tft.fillRect(kx, ky, 16*PX, 3*PX, kbCol);
  // Key rows
  for(int r = 0; r < 3; r++) {
    int keys = (r == 0) ? 7 : 12;
    for(int k = 0; k < keys; k++) {
      int kw = (r == 0 && k == 2) ? 6*PX : PX;
      tft.fillRect(kx + k*2*PX + PX/3, ky + r*PX + PX/3, kw, PX*2/3, keyCol);
    }
  }
  // Key flash
  int flashKey = gFrame % 6;
  int fkx = kx + flashKey * 2*PX + PX/3;
  tft.fillRect(fkx, ky + PX + PX/3, PX*2/3, PX*2/3, tft.color565(176, 190, 197));
  
  // Status
  tft.setTextSize(1);
  tft.setTextColor(ST77XX_GREEN);
  tft.setCursor(5, 73);
  tft.print("typing...");
  
  if(!gMuted && gFrame % 3 == 0) tone(PIN_BUZ, 800, 20);
}
```

```cpp
static unsigned long t = 0;
if(millis() - t > 200) {
  t = millis();
  gFrame = (gFrame + 1) % 20;
  tft.fillScreen(ST77XX_BLACK);
  
  // Bounce: 0-4 down(squash), 5-10 up(stretch), 10-14 hang, 15-19 land
  int bouncePhase = gFrame % 10;
  int yOff = 0;
  if(bouncePhase < 2) yOff = 1;      // squash
  else if(bouncePhase < 5) yOff = -3; // up
  else if(bouncePhase < 7) yOff = -2; // hang
  else yOff = 0;                       // land
  
  int armUp = (bouncePhase >= 2 && bouncePhase < 7) ? 3 : 0;
  cBody(yOff, armUp, armUp);
  cEyes(yOff, bouncePhase == 5); // blink at peak
  
  // Sparkle particles
  uint16_t sparkCols[] = {
    tft.color565(255,215,0),   // gold
    tft.color565(255,160,0),   // orange
    tft.color565(255,245,157), // light yellow
    tft.color565(255,193,7),   // amber
    tft.color565(255,245,157), // light yellow
  };
  for(int i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
    int phase = (gFrame + i * 4) % 20;
    if(phase < 12) {  // sparkle visible for part of cycle
      int sx = OX + ((i * 31 + gFrame * 7) % 42) * PX - 6*PX;
      int sy = OY + ((i * 17 + gFrame * 3) % 20) * PX - 5*PX;
      // Plus shape
      tft.fillRect(sx, sy-PX, PX, 3*PX, sparkCols[i]);
      tft.fillRect(sx-PX, sy, 3*PX, PX, sparkCols[i]);
    }
  }
  
  // "OK!" text
  if(bouncePhase >= 2) {
    tft.setTextSize(2);
    tft.setTextColor(ST77XX_GREEN);
    tft.setCursor(120, 10);
    tft.print("OK!");
  }
  
  // Status
  tft.setTextSize(1);
  tft.setTextColor(ST77XX_GREEN);
  tft.setCursor(5, 73);
  tft.print("done! ^_^");
  
  if(!gMuted) tone(PIN_BUZ, 1000 + gFrame * 50, 50);
}
```

```cpp
// Color definitions matching the original SVG
#define CRAB_COLOR  tft.color565(222, 136, 109)  // #DE886D
#define SHADOW_CLR  tft.color565(0, 0, 0)        // black
#define EYE_COLOR   0x0000                        // black
#define SCREEN_BG   tft.color565(30, 30, 46)      // #1E1E2E
#define SCREEN_BAR  tft.color565(45, 45, 61)      // #2D2D3D
#define CODE_GREEN  tft.color565(76, 175, 80)     // #4CAF50
#define CODE_BLUE   tft.color565(64, 196, 255)    // #40C4FF
#define CODE_YELLOW tft.color565(255, 193, 7)     // #FFC107
#define KBD_COLOR   tft.color565(69, 90, 100)     // #455A64
#define KBD_KEY     tft.color565(120, 144, 156)   // #78909C
#define DOT_BLUE    tft.color565(37, 104, 145)    // #256891
#define SPARK_GOLD  tft.color565(255, 224, 102)   // #FFE066
#define BUBBLE_WHITE 0xFFFF                       // white
#define DATA_BLUE   tft.color565(64, 196, 255)    // #40C4FF

#define S 2  // Scale factor

// Draw base crab at (ox, oy) with optional parameters
void drawCrabBase(int ox, int oy, int eyeH = 2, int legH = 4, int armAngle = 0) {
    uint16_t cc = CRAB_COLOR;
    // Shadow
    tft.fillRect(ox + 3*S, oy + 15*S, 9*S, 1*S, SHADOW_CLR);
    // Legs
    tft.fillRect(ox + 3*S,  oy + 11*S, 1*S, legH*S, cc);
    tft.fillRect(ox + 5*S,  oy + 11*S, 1*S, legH*S, cc);
    tft.fillRect(ox + 9*S,  oy + 11*S, 1*S, legH*S, cc);
    tft.fillRect(ox + 11*S, oy + 11*S, 1*S, legH*S, cc);
    // Torso
    tft.fillRect(ox + 2*S, oy + 6*S, 11*S, 7*S, cc);
    // Left arm
    tft.fillRect(ox + 0, oy + 9*S, 2*S, 2*S, cc);
    // Right arm
    tft.fillRect(ox + 13*S, oy + 9*S, 2*S, 2*S, cc);
    // Eyes
    tft.fillRect(ox + 4*S, oy + 8*S, 1*S, eyeH*S, EYE_COLOR);
    tft.fillRect(ox + 10*S, oy + 8*S, 1*S, eyeH*S, EYE_COLOR);
}
```

```cpp
// All colors and functions
#define S 2  // pixel scale

// These will be initialized in setup after tft is ready
uint16_t cCrab, cScreenBg, cScreenBar, cCodeGreen, cCodeBlue, cCodeYellow;
uint16_t cKbd, cKbdKey, cDotBlue, cSpark, cDataBlue, cTrafficRed, cTrafficYellow, cTrafficGreen;

int gState = 0, gLastState = -1, gFrame = 0, gMuted = 0;
volatile int gBtnFlag = 0;
unsigned long gSolEnd = 0;

void drawShadow(int ox, int oy) {
    tft.fillRect(ox + 6, oy + 30, 18, 2, 0x4208); // dark gray
}

void drawLegs(int ox, int oy, int offset = 0) {
    int ly = oy + 22 + offset;
    tft.fillRect(ox + 6,  ly, 2, 8, cCrab);
    tft.fillRect(ox + 10, ly, 2, 8, cCrab);
    tft.fillRect(ox + 18, ly, 2, 8, cCrab);
    tft.fillRect(ox + 22, ly, 2, 8, cCrab);
}

void drawTorso(int ox, int oy) {
    tft.fillRect(ox + 4, oy + 12, 22, 14, cCrab);
}

void drawArms(int ox, int oy, int leftDy = 0, int rightDy = 0) {
    tft.fillRect(ox + 0,  oy + 18 + leftDy,  4, 4, cCrab);
    tft.fillRect(ox + 26, oy + 18 + rightDy, 4, 4, cCrab);
}

void drawEyes(int ox, int oy, int h = 4) {
    tft.fillRect(ox + 8,  oy + 16, 2, h, 0x0000);
    tft.fillRect(ox + 20, oy + 16, 2, h, 0x0000);
}

void drawCrab(int ox, int oy, int eyeH = 4, int legOff = 0, int armLDy = 0, int armRDy = 0) {
    drawShadow(ox, oy);
    drawLegs(ox, oy, legOff);
    drawTorso(ox, oy);
    drawArms(ox, oy, armLDy, armRDy);
    drawEyes(ox, oy, eyeH);
}
```

Here's my plan:

```abs
arduino_global()
    custom_code("
#define S 3
#define OX 57
#define OY 20
uint16_t CC; // crab color, initialized in setup

// Draw base crab at standard position
void drawBaseCrab(bool showEyes = true, int eyeH = 6, int jumpOff = 0) {
    int y = OY + jumpOff;
    // Shadow (doesn't jump)
    tft.fillRect(OX+3*S, OY+15*S, 9*S, S, 0x4208);
    // Legs
    tft.fillRect(OX+3*S, y+11*S, S, 4*S, CC);
    tft.fillRect(OX+5*S, y+11*S, S, 4*S, CC);
    tft.fillRect(OX+9*S, y+11*S, S, 4*S, CC);
    tft.fillRect(OX+11*S, y+11*S, S, 4*S, CC);
    // Torso
    tft.fillRect(OX+2*S, y+6*S, 11*S, 7*S, CC);
    // Arms
    tft.fillRect(OX+0, y+9*S, 2*S, 2*S, CC);
    tft.fillRect(OX+13*S, y+9*S, 2*S, 2*S, CC);
    // Eyes
    if(showEyes) {
        tft.fillRect(OX+4*S, y+8*S, S, eyeH, 0x0000);
        tft.fillRect(OX+10*S, y+8*S, S, eyeH, 0x0000);
    }
}

// ... more functions
")
```

For the ABS, here's the structure:

```
arduino_global()
    // Pin definitions and state variables
    custom_code("#define PIN_BTN 2\n#define PIN_BUZZ 4\n#define PIN_SOL 3\n#define S 2")
    variable_define_scoped(...)

arduino_setup()
    serial_begin(Serial, 115200)
    tft_init(...)
    tft_set_rotation(1)
    // Compute colors, init pins
    custom_code("...")

arduino_loop()
    // Serial input
    controls_if(...)
        custom_code("...")
    // Button
    controls_if(...)
        custom_code("...")
    // State change
    controls_if(...)
        custom_code("...")
    // State 0: idle
    controls_if(...)
        custom_code("...")
    // State 1: thinking
    controls_if(...)
        custom_code("...")
    // ... etc
```

{"content":"# ============================================

arduino_global()
    custom_code("#define S 2\n#define OX 65\n#define OY 16\n#define PIN_SOL 3\n#define PIN_BUZZ 4\n#define PIN_BTN 2\nuint16_t CC;\nint gState=0, gPrev=-1, gFrm=0, gMut=0, gBtn=0;\nunsigned long gSolT=0;")

arduino_setup()
    serial_begin(Serial, 115200)
    tft_init(ST7735, math_number(10), math_number(9), math_number(7), math_number(6), math_number(8), math_number(5), math_number(160), math_number(80))
    tft_set_rotation("1")
    tft_fill_screen(tft_color565(math_number(0), math_number(0), math_number(0)))
    custom_code("CC = tft.color565(222, 136, 109);\npinMode(PIN_SOL, OUTPUT);\npinMode(PIN_BUZZ, OUTPUT);\npinMode(PIN_BTN, INPUT_PULLUP);\nattachInterrupt(digitalPinToInterrupt(PIN_BTN), []{ gBtn = 1; }, FALLING);\ntft.setTextSize(1); tft.setTextColor(CC);\ntft.setCursor(50, 35); tft.print(\"Clawd\");\ntft.setCursor(45, 48); tft.print(\"Monitor\");\ndelay(1200);")

arduino_loop()
    controls_if(logic_compare(serial_available(Serial), GTE, math_number(1)))
        custom_code("String s = Serial.readStringUntil('\\n'); s.trim();\nif(s==\"idle\") gState=0;\nelse if(s==\"thinking\") gState=1;\nelse if(s==\"coding\") gState=2;\nelse if(s==\"done\") gState=3;\nelse if(s==\"permission\") gState=4;")
    controls_if(logic_compare(custom_code2("gBtn"), EQ, math_number(1)))
        custom_code("gBtn=0; delay(40);\nif(digitalRead(PIN_BTN)==LOW){\n  unsigned long t0=millis();\n  while(digitalRead(PIN_BTN)==LOW && millis()-t0<1200) delay(20);\n  if(millis()-t0>700){gMut=!gMut; Serial.println(gMut?\"muted\":\"unmuted\");}\n  else{Serial.println(\"btn\"); if(!gMut) tone(PIN_BUZZ,1000,50);}\n}")
    controls_if(logic_compare(custom_code2("gState"), NEQ, custom_code2("gPrev")))
        custom_code("gPrev=gState; gFrm=0;\nif(gState==3){gSolT=millis()+300; digitalWrite(PIN_SOL,HIGH);}\nif(gState==4){gSolT=millis()+200; digitalWrite(PIN_SOL,HIGH);}")
    controls_if(logic_compare(custom_code2("gState"), EQ, math_number(0)))
        custom_code("static unsigned long t=0;\nif(millis()-t>300){\n  t=millis(); gFrm=(gFrm+1)%20;\n  tft.fillScreen(0x0000);\n  int yO=(gFrm%6<3)?0:1;\n  bool blink=(gFrm%20>=16 && gFrm%20<=17);\n  tft.fillRect(71,46,18,2,0x4208);\n  tft.fillRect(71,38,2,8,CC); tft.fillRect(75,38,2,8,CC);\n  tft.fillRect(83,38,2,8,CC); tft.fillRect(87,38,2,8,CC);\n  tft.fillRect(69,28+yO,22,14,CC);\n  tft.fillRect(65,34+yO,4,4,CC); tft.fillRect(91,34+yO,4,4,CC);\n  if(!blink){tft.fillRect(73,32+yO,2,4,0); tft.fillRect(85,32+yO,2,4,0);}\n  if(gFrm%10==0){tft.drawCircle(95,28,3,0x04DF); tft.drawCircle(95,28,1,0x04DF);}\n  tft.setTextSize(1); tft.setTextColor(0x04DF); tft.setCursor(5,70); tft.print(\"idle\");\n  if(!gMut && gFrm%10==0) tone(PIN_BUZZ,350,30);\n}")
    controls_if(logic_compare(custom_code2("gState"), EQ, math_number(1)))
        custom_code("static unsigned long t=0;\nif(millis()-t>500){\n  t=millis(); gFrm=(gFrm+1)%12;\n  tft.fillScreen(0x0000);\n  int xO=(gFrm<6)?-2:2;\n  int ox=OX+xO;\n  tft.fillRect(ox+6,46,18,2,0x4208);\n  tft.fillRect(ox+6,38,2,8,CC); tft.fillRect(ox+10,38,2,8,CC);\n  tft.fillRect(ox+18,38,2,8,CC); tft.fillRect(ox+22,38,2,8,CC);\n  tft.fillRect(ox+4,28,22,14,CC);\n  int armOff=(gFrm<6)?-2:0;\n  tft.fillRect(ox+0,34+armOff,4,4,CC); tft.fillRect(ox+26,34,4,4,CC);\n  tft.fillRect(ox+8,32,2,3,0); tft.fillRect(ox+20,32,2,3,0);\n  int bx=ox-10, by=2;\n  tft.fillRoundRect(bx,by,18,16,3,0xFFFF);\n  tft.fillRect(ox+2,22,2,2,0xFFFF);\n  tft.fillRect(ox+4,25,1,1,0xFFFF);\n  uint16_t dotC=tft.color565(37,104,145);\n  if(gFrm%6>=1) tft.fillRect(bx+2,by+6,2,2,dotC);\n  if(gFrm%6>=3) tft.fillRect(bx+6,by+6,2,2,dotC);\n  if(gFrm%6>=5) tft.fillRect(bx+10,by+6,2,2,dotC);\n  if(gFrm%6>=5){\n    uint16_t sc=tft.color565(255,224,102);\n    tft.fillRect(ox+12,0,2,2,sc);\n    tft.fillRect(ox+12,-2,2,2,sc); tft.fillRect(ox+12,2,2,2,sc);\n    tft.fillRect(ox+10,0,2,2,sc); tft.fillRect(ox+14,0,2,2,sc);\n  }\n  tft.setTextSize(1); tft.setTextColor(0xFFE0); tft.setCursor(5,70); tft.print(\"thinking\");\n  if(!gMut) tone(PIN_BUZZ,500+gFrm*40,20);\n}")
    controls_if(logic_compare(custom_code2("gState"), EQ, math_number(2)))
        custom_code("static unsigned long t=0;\nif(millis()-t>200){\n  t=millis(); gFrm=(gFrm+1)%24;\n  tft.fillScreen(0x0000);\n  int yO=(gFrm%4<2)?0:1;\n  uint16_t sbg=tft.color565(30,30,46);\n  uint16_t sbr=tft.color565(45,45,61);\n  tft.fillRect(66,4,27,22,sbg);\n  tft.fillRect(66,4,27,2,sbr);\n  tft.fillRect(67,5,2,1,0xF800); tft.fillRect(70,5,2,1,0xFFE0); tft.fillRect(73,5,2,1,0x07E0);\n  uint16_t cg=tft.color565(76,175,80);\n  uint16_t cb=tft.color565(64,196,255);\n  uint16_t cy=tft.color565(255,193,7);\n  int li=gFrm/4;\n  tft.fillRect(67,8,10,1,cg); tft.fillRect(69,11,16,1,cg);\n  tft.fillRect(69,14,(9+li)%16,1,cb); tft.fillRect(67,17,(4+li)%8,1,cy);\n  uint16_t db=tft.color565(64,196,255);\n  if(gFrm%6<3) tft.fillRect(71,1,2,2,db);\n  if(gFrm%6>=3) tft.fillRect(83,0,2,2,db);\n  tft.fillRect(71,46,18,2,0x4208);\n  tft.fillRect(71,38,2,8,CC); tft.fillRect(75,38,2,8,CC);\n  tft.fillRect(83,38,2,8,CC); tft.fillRect(87,38,2,8,CC);\n  tft.fillRect(69,28+yO,22,14,CC);\n  uint16_t kc=tft.color565(69,90,100);\n  uint16_t kk=tft.color565(120,144,156);\n  tft.fillRect(64,40,32,6,kc);\n  tft.fillRect(66,41,28,1,kk);\n  tft.fillRect(66,43,28,1,kk);\n  int aL=(gFrm%2==0)?-2:0;\n  int aR=(gFrm%2==1)?-2:0;\n  tft.fillRect(65,34+yO+aL,4,4,CC); tft.fillRect(91,34+yO+aR,4,4,CC);\n  tft.fillRect(73,32+yO,2,3,0); tft.fillRect(85,32+yO,2,3,0);\n  tft.setTextSize(1); tft.setTextColor(0x07E0); tft.setCursor(5,70); tft.print(\"typing\");\n  if(!gMut && gFrm%4==0) tone(PIN_BUZZ,800,15);\n}")

    tft.fillRect(55,12,2,2,gold); tft.fillRect(59,12,2,2,gold);
    tft.fillRect(101,8,2,2,amb); tft.fillRect(101,6,2,2,amb); tft.fillRect(101,10,2,2,amb);
    tft.fillRect(99,8,2,2,amb); tft.fillRect(103,8,2,2,amb);
  } else {
    tft.fillRect(105,36,2,2,ly); tft.fillRect(105,34,2,2,ly); tft.fillRect(105,38,2,2,ly);
    tft.fillRect(103,36,2,2,ly); tft.fillRect(107,36,2,2,ly);
    tft.fillRect(53,40,2,2,amb); tft.fillRect(53,38,2,2,amb); tft.fillRect(53,42,2,2,amb);
    tft.fillRect(51,40,2,2,amb); tft.fillRect(55,40,2,2,amb);
  }
  tft.fillRect(71,46,18,2,0x4208);
  tft.fillRect(69,28+jump,22,14,CC);
  tft.fillRect(71,38+jump,2,4,CC); tft.fillRect(75,38+jump,2,4,CC);
  tft.fillRect(83,38+jump,2,4,CC); tft.fillRect(87,38+jump,2,4,CC);
  tft.fillRect(65,34+jump,4,4,CC); tft.fillRect(91,34+jump,4,4,CC);
  bool hblink=(gFrm%8==4);
  if(!hblink){tft.fillRect(73,32+jump,2,4,0); tft.fillRect(85,32+jump,2,4,0);}
  tft.setTextSize(1); tft.setTextColor(0x07E0); tft.setCursor(5,70); tft.print("done!");
  if(!gMut) tone(PIN_BUZZ,1000+gFrm*60,40);
}")
    controls_if()
        @IF0: logic_compare(variables_get($gState), EQ, math_number(4))
        @DO0:
            custom_code("static unsigned long t=0;
if(millis()-t>400){
  t=millis(); gFrm=!gFrm;
  tft.fillScreen(gFrm ? tft.color565(60,0,0) : 0x0000);
  tft.fillRect(71,46,18,2,0x4208);
  tft.fillRect(71,38,2,8,CC); tft.fillRect(75,38,2,8,CC);
  tft.fillRect(83,38,2,8,CC); tft.fillRect(87,38,2,8,CC);
  tft.fillRect(69,28,22,14,CC);
  tft.fillRect(65,34,4,4,CC); tft.fillRect(91,34,4,4,CC);
  tft.fillRect(73,32,2,4,0); tft.fillRect(85,32,2,4,0);
  tft.fillRoundRect(80,2,18,16,3,0xFFE0);
  tft.fillRoundRect(82,4,14,12,2,0x0000);
  tft.setTextSize(2); tft.setTextColor(0xFFE0); tft.setCursor(85,5); tft.print("?");
  uint16_t tc=gFrm ? 0xF800 : 0xFFE0;
  tft.setTextSize(1); tft.setTextColor(tc); tft.setCursor(5,70); tft.print("[BTN]");
  if(!gMut) tone(PIN_BUZZ, gFrm?1500:500, 80);
  gSolT=millis()+150; digitalWrite(PIN_SOL, gFrm);
}")
    controls_if()
        @IF0: logic_compare(time_millis(), GTE, variables_get($gSolT))
        @DO0:
            io_digitalwrite(math_number(3), io_state(LOW))
    time_delay(math_number(30))</toolResult>

<toolResult>#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
Clawd Pixel Crab Monitor - Hardware Simulator
================================================
Preview the Clawd pixel crab animations without physical hardware.
Matches the ESP32 firmware animations pixel-for-pixel (scaled 2x).
Based on: https://github.com/rullerzhou-afk/clawd-on-desk

Run with: python simulator.py
Or via bridge: python bridge.py --mode simulate
"""

import tkinter as tk
from tkinter import ttk
import threading
import time
import math
import sys

try:
    import winsound
    HAS_WINSOUND = True
except ImportError:
    HAS_WINSOUND = False

# Clawd crab color palette (matching tft.color565 values)
SHELL_COLOR = '#FF6432'    # tft.color565(255, 100, 50) - orange-red shell
LIGHT_COLOR = '#FF9650'    # tft.color565(255, 150, 80) - light belly
DARK_COLOR  = '#C85028'    # tft.color565(200, 80, 40)  - dark accents

# ST77XX color equivalents
BLACK   = '#000000'
WHITE   = '#FFFFFF'
RED     = '#FF0000'
GREEN   = '#00FF00'
CYAN    = '#00FFFF'
YELLOW  = '#FFFF00'
MAGENTA = '#FF00FF'

SCALE = 2

class HardwareSimulator:
    def __init__(self):
        self.root = tk.Tk()
        self.root.title("🦀 Clawd Pixel Crab Monitor - Hardware Simulator")
        self.root.configure(bg='#1a1a1a')
        self.root.resizable(False, False)

        self.current_state = "idle"
        self.anim_frame = 0
        self.muted = False
        self.solenoid_active = False
        self.anim_running = True
        self.button_press_time = 0
        self.demo_active = False

        self._create_gui()
        self.anim_thread = threading.Thread(target=self._animation_loop, daemon=True)
        self.anim_thread.start()

    # ─── Drawing primitives ───

    def _rect(self, x, y, w, h, color):
        sx, sy = x * SCALE, y * SCALE
        self.canvas.create_rectangle(sx, sy, sx + w * SCALE, sy + h * SCALE, fill=color, outline='')

    def _draw_rect(self, x, y, w, h, color):
        sx, sy = x * SCALE, y * SCALE
        self.canvas.create_rectangle(sx, sy, sx + w * SCALE, sy + h * SCALE, outline=color, width=SCALE)

    def _circle(self, cx, cy, r, color):
        sx, sy = cx * SCALE, cy * SCALE
        sr = r * SCALE
        self.canvas.create_oval(sx - sr, sy - sr, sx + sr, sy + sr, outline=color, width=SCALE)

    def _text(self, x, y, txt, color, size=1):
        sx, sy = x * SCALE, y * SCALE
        fs = max(8, size * 10 * SCALE)
        font = ('Courier', fs, 'bold') if size >= 2 else ('Courier', fs)
        self.canvas.create_text(sx, sy, text=txt, fill=color, font=font, anchor='nw')

    def _clear(self, color=BLACK):
        self.canvas.create_rectangle(0, 0, 160 * SCALE, 80 * SCALE, fill=color, outline='')

    # ─── Clawd Crab Drawing ───

    def _draw_crab(self, cx, cy, eyes='normal', claw_anim=0, leg_anim=0, jump=0):
        """
        Draw Clawd pixel crab at (cx, cy).
        eyes: 'normal', 'blink', 'wide', 'sad'
        claw_anim: -2..2 claw offset
        leg_anim: 0..1 leg offset
        jump: vertical offset for done state
        """
        cy += jump
        shell = SHELL_COLOR
        light = LIGHT_COLOR
        dark  = DARK_COLOR

        # Shell body (16x12)
        self._rect(cx - 8, cy - 6, 16, 12, shell)
        # Belly highlight (12x8)
        self._rect(cx - 6, cy - 4, 12, 8, light)
        # Center shell line (8x4)
        self._rect(cx - 4, cy - 2, 8, 4, shell)

        # Eyes
        ey = cy - 5
        if eyes == 'blink':
            # Closed eyes - horizontal line
            self._rect(cx - 5, ey + 1, 3, 1, WHITE)
            self._rect(cx + 2, ey + 1, 3, 1, WHITE)
        elif eyes == 'wide':
            # Big eyes for permission
            self._rect(cx - 5, ey, 4, 4, WHITE)
            self._rect(cx + 1, ey, 4, 4, WHITE)
            self._rect(cx - 4, ey + 1, 2, 2, BLACK)
            self._rect(cx + 2, ey + 1, 2, 2, BLACK)
        else:
            # Normal eyes
            self._rect(cx - 5, ey, 3, 3, WHITE)
            self._rect(cx + 2, ey, 3, 3, WHITE)
            self._rect(cx - 4, ey + 1, 2, 2, BLACK)
            self._rect(cx + 3, ey + 1, 2, 2, BLACK)

        # Claws (with animation)
        cl_y = cy + 2 + abs(claw_anim) // 2
        # Left claw
        self._rect(cx - 12 + claw_anim, cl_y, 4, 3, shell)
        self._rect(cx - 10 + claw_anim, cl_y + 1, 2, 2, dark)
        # Right claw
        self._rect(cx + 8 - claw_anim, cl_y, 4, 3, shell)
        self._rect(cx + 10 - claw_anim, cl_y + 1, 2, 2, dark)

        # Legs (4 pairs)
        for i in range(4):
            lx = cx - 6 + i * 4
            ly = cy + 6 + (leg_anim if i % 2 == 0 else 0)
            self._rect(lx, ly, 2, 3, shell)

    # ─── State Animations (matching ESP32) ───

    def _draw_idle(self):
        f = self.anim_frame % 10
        self._clear()

        # Crab with occasional blink
        eyes = 'blink' if f % 4 == 0 else 'normal'
        leg_anim = 1 if f % 2 == 0 else 0
        self._draw_crab(70, 40, eyes=eyes, leg_anim=leg_anim)

        # Occasional bubble
        if f % 5 == 0:
            self._circle(85, 32, 4, CYAN)
            self._circle(85, 32, 2, CYAN)

        self._text(5, 65, "idle...", CYAN, 1)
        if f % 5 == 0 and not self.muted:
            self._beep(350, 30)

    def _draw_thinking(self):
        f = self.anim_frame % 12
        self._clear()

        self._draw_crab(70, 40, eyes='normal')

        # Thought bubble
        bub_r = 6 + (f % 3) * 3
        self._circle(90, 30, bub_r, YELLOW)
        self._circle(90, 30, bub_r - 3, YELLOW)

        # Animated dots
        dots = "." * ((f % 4) + 1)
        self._text(88, 25, dots, YELLOW, 1)

        self._text(5, 65, "thinking...", YELLOW, 1)
        if not self.muted:
            self._beep(500 + f * 50, 25)

    def _draw_coding(self):
        f = self.anim_frame % 16
        self._clear()

        # Crab with typing claws
        claw_off = -2 if f % 2 == 0 else 2
        leg_anim = (f) % 2
        self._draw_crab(70, 40, claw_anim=claw_off, leg_anim=leg_anim)

        # Mini terminal window
        bx, by = 10, 5
        self._draw_rect(bx, by, 50, 35, '#006400')
        self._rect(bx + 1, by + 1, 48, 33, BLACK)

        code_lines = ["> edit", "  save", "> build", "  test", "> run", "  done"]
        for i in range(4):
            li = (f // 2 + i) % 6
            self._text(bx + 3, by + 3 + i * 8, code_lines[li], GREEN, 1)

        self._text(5, 65, "typing...", GREEN, 1)
        if f % 4 == 0 and not self.muted:
            self._beep(800, 20)

    def _draw_done(self):
        f = self.anim_frame % 12
        self._clear()

        # Jump animation
        jump = -((4 - f) * 3) if f < 4 else 0
        eyes = 'wide' if f < 4 else 'normal'
        claw_up = -3 if f < 4 else 0
        leg_jump = -2 if f < 4 else 0

        self._draw_crab(70, 40, eyes=eyes, claw_anim=claw_up, leg_anim=0, jump=jump)

        # Confetti
        colors = [RED, YELLOW, GREEN, CYAN, MAGENTA]
        for i in range(8):
            sx = 10 + (i * 18 + f * 5) % 140
            sy = 5 + (i * 10 + f * 3) % 70
            self._rect(sx, sy, 3, 3, colors[i % 5])

        self._text(100, 25, "OK!", GREEN, 2)
        self._text(5, 65, "done! ^_^", GREEN, 1)
        if not self.muted:
            self._beep(1000 + f * 80, 50)
        if f == 0:
            self._solenoid(300)

    def _draw_permission(self):
        f = self.anim_frame % 2
        bg = '#3C0000' if f else BLACK
        self._clear(bg)

        self._draw_crab(70, 40, eyes='wide')

        # Question mark dialog
        qx, qy = 85, 25
        self._draw_rect(qx, qy, 20, 15, YELLOW)
        self._rect(qx + 1, qy + 1, 18, 13, BLACK)
        self._text(qx + 5, qy + 1, "?", YELLOW, 2)

        txt_color = RED if f else YELLOW
        self._text(5, 65, "[PRESS BTN]", txt_color, 1)

        if not self.muted:
            self._beep(1500 if f else 500, 80)
        if f:
            self._solenoid(150)

    # ─── Sound & Solenoid ───

    def _beep(self, freq, dur):
        if self.muted or not HAS_WINSOUND:
            return
        try:
            threading.Thread(target=lambda: winsound.Beep(freq, dur), daemon=True).start()
        except:
            pass
        self.buzzer.itemconfig('bz', fill='#00ff00')
        self.root.after(100, lambda: self.buzzer.itemconfig('bz', fill='gray'))

    def _solenoid(self, ms):
        if self.solenoid_active:
            return
        self.solenoid_active = True
        self.solenoid_cv.itemconfig('sol', fill='#ff6600')
        self.solenoid_lb.config(text="ON ⚡")
        self.root.after(ms, self._solenoid_off)

    def _solenoid_off(self):
        self.solenoid_active = False
        self.solenoid_cv.itemconfig('sol', fill='gray')
        self.solenoid_lb.config(text="OFF")

    # ─── Button ───

    def _btn_down(self, e):
        self.btn_cv.itemconfig('btn', fill='#00ff00')
        self.button_press_time = time.time()

    def _btn_up(self, e):
        self.btn_cv.itemconfig('btn', fill='#444')
        held = time.time() - self.button_press_time
        if held > 0.7:
            self.muted = not self.muted
            self.mute_var.set(self.muted)
            self.btn_log.config(text="🔇 Muted" if self.muted else "🔊 Unmuted")
            if not self.muted:
                self._beep(800, 100)
        else:
            self.btn_log.config(text="✓ Confirmed!")
            if not self.muted:
                self._beep(1000, 50)
            if self.current_state == "permission":
                self._set_state("idle")

    # ─── State Control ───

    def _set_state(self, state):
        self.current_state = state
        self.anim_frame = 0
        icons = {"idle": "💤 Idle", "thinking": "🤔 Thinking", "coding": "💻 Typing",
                 "done": "✅ Done", "permission": "⚠️ Permission"}
        self.status_var.set(icons.get(state, state))
        if state == "done":
            self._solenoid(300)
        elif state == "permission":
            self._solenoid(200)

    def _toggle_mute(self):
        self.muted = self.mute_var.get()
        self.btn_log.config(text="🔇 Muted" if self.muted else "🔊 Unmuted")

    # ─── Animation Loop ───

    def _animation_loop(self):
        delays = {"idle": 0.4, "thinking": 0.35, "coding": 0.2, "done": 0.25, "permission": 0.4}
        while self.anim_running:
            self.root.after(0, self._render)
            time.sleep(delays.get(self.current_state, 0.05))

    def _render(self):
        self.canvas.delete('all')
        draw = {"idle": self._draw_idle, "thinking": self._draw_thinking,
                "coding": self._draw_coding, "done": self._draw_done,
                "permission": self._draw_permission}
        fn = draw.get(self.current_state)
        if fn:
            fn()
        self.anim_frame += 1

    # ─── Demo Mode ───

    def _toggle_demo(self):
        self.demo_active = self.demo_var.get()
        if self.demo_active:
            self._demo_step(0)

    def _demo_step(self, idx):
        seq = [("idle", 3), ("thinking", 4), ("coding", 5), ("done", 3),
               ("idle", 2), ("permission", 4), ("coding", 4), ("done", 3)]
        if not self.demo_active or not self.anim_running:
            return
        state, dur = seq[idx % len(seq)]
        self._set_state(state)
        self.root.after(int(dur * 1000), lambda: self._demo_step(idx + 1))

    # ─── GUI ───

    def _create_gui(self):
        style = ttk.Style()
        style.configure('TFrame', background='#1a1a1a')
        style.configure('TLabel', background='#1a1a1a', foreground='white')
        style.configure('TLabelframe', background='#1a1a1a', foreground='white')
        style.configure('TLabelframe.Label', background='#1a1a1a', foreground='white')

        main = ttk.Frame(self.root, padding=8)
        main.pack(fill=tk.BOTH, expand=True)

        # Title
        ttk.Label(main, text="🦀 Clawd Pixel Crab — ESP32 Monitor Simulator",
                   font=('Arial', 11, 'bold'), foreground='#FF6432').pack(pady=(0, 5))

        # TFT Display
        tft_frame = ttk.LabelFrame(main, text="📺 TFT 160×80 (×2)", padding=3)
        tft_frame.pack()
        self.canvas = tk.Canvas(tft_frame, width=160 * SCALE, height=80 * SCALE,
                                bg='black', highlightthickness=2, highlightbackground='#444')
        self.canvas.pack()

        # Status
        sf = ttk.Frame(main)
        sf.pack(fill=tk.X, pady=4)
        ttk.Label(sf, text="State:", font=('Arial', 10)).pack(side=tk.LEFT)
        self.status_var = tk.StringVar(value="💤 Idle")
        ttk.Label(sf, textvariable=self.status_var, font=('Arial', 11, 'bold'),
                  foreground='#00ff88').pack(side=tk.LEFT, padx=8)

        # Hardware row
        hw = ttk.Frame(main)
        hw.pack(fill=tk.X, pady=3)

        # Buzzer
        bz_f = ttk.LabelFrame(hw, text="🔊", padding=2)
        bz_f.pack(side=tk.LEFT, padx=4)
        self.buzzer = tk.Canvas(bz_f, width=20, height=20, bg='#1a1a1a', highlightthickness=0)
        self.buzzer.pack()
        self.buzzer.create_oval(2, 2, 18, 18, fill='gray', outline='#666', tags='bz')

        # Solenoid
        sol_f = ttk.LabelFrame(hw, text="⚡", padding=2)
        sol_f.pack(side=tk.LEFT, padx=4)
        self.solenoid_cv = tk.Canvas(sol_f, width=40, height=18, bg='#1a1a1a', highlightthickness=0)
        self.solenoid_cv.pack()
        self.solenoid_cv.create_rectangle(2, 2, 38, 16, fill='gray', outline='#666', tags='sol')
        self.solenoid_lb = ttk.Label(sol_f, text="OFF", font=('Arial', 8))
        self.solenoid_lb.pack()

        # Mute
        self.mute_var = tk.BooleanVar(value=False)
        ttk.Checkbutton(hw, text="🔇 Mute", variable=self.mute_var,
                        command=self._toggle_mute).pack(side=tk.LEFT, padx=8)

        # Button
        btn_f = ttk.LabelFrame(hw, text="🔘 Button", padding=2)
        btn_f.pack(side=tk.LEFT, padx=4)
        self.btn_cv = tk.Canvas(btn_f, width=40, height=24, bg='#1a1a1a', highlightthickness=0)
        self.btn_cv.pack()
        self.btn_cv.create_rectangle(8, 4, 32, 20, fill='#444', outline='#888', tags='btn')
        self.btn_cv.bind('<Button-1>', self._btn_down)
        self.btn_cv.bind('<ButtonRelease-1>', self._btn_up)
        self.btn_log = ttk.Label(btn_f, text="click", font=('Arial', 7))
        self.btn_log.pack()

        # State buttons
        ctrl = ttk.LabelFrame(main, text="🎮 State Control", padding=4)
        ctrl.pack(fill=tk.X, pady=4)

        states = [("💤 Idle", "idle", '#00cccc'), ("🤔 Thinking", "thinking", '#cccc00'),
                  ("💻 Typing", "coding", '#00cc00'), ("✅ Done", "done", '#00cc00'),
                  ("⚠️ Permission", "permission", '#cc4444')]
        for txt, st, fg in states:
            tk.Button(ctrl, text=txt, command=lambda s=st: self._set_state(s),
                      bg='#2a2a2a', fg=fg, font=('Arial', 9), width=13,
                      activebackground='#444', activeforeground=fg, relief=tk.RAISED, bd=2
                     ).pack(side=tk.LEFT, padx=1)

        # Bottom
        bot = ttk.Frame(main)
        bot.pack(fill=tk.X, pady=6)
        self.demo_var = tk.BooleanVar(value=False)
        ttk.Checkbutton(bot, text="🔄 Auto Demo", variable=self.demo_var,
                        command=self._toggle_demo).pack(side=tk.LEFT)
        ttk.Button(bot, text="❌ Quit", command=self._quit).pack(side=tk.RIGHT)

        ttk.Label(main, text="Clawd pixel crab — matches ESP32 firmware pixel-for-pixel",
                  font=('Arial', 8), foreground='#666').pack()

    def _quit(self):
        self.anim_running = False
        self.root.quit()
        self.root.destroy()

    def run(self):
        self.root.update_idletasks()
        w, h = self.root.winfo_width(), self.root.winfo_height()
        x = (self.root.winfo_screenwidth() - w) // 2
        y = (self.root.winfo_screenheight() - h) // 2
        self.root.geometry(f'+{x}+{y}')
        self.root.mainloop()

def run_simulator():
    HardwareSimulator().run()

if __name__ == "__main__":
    run_simulator()

```python
#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
Clawd Pixel Crab Monitor - Hardware Simulator
Preview the Clawd pixel crab animations without physical hardware.
Matches the ESP32 firmware animations pixel-for-pixel (scaled 2x).
Based on: https://github.com/rullerzhou-afk/clawd-on-desk
"""

import tkinter as tk
from tkinter import ttk
import threading
import time
import sys

try:
    import winsound
    HAS_WINSOUND = True
except ImportError:
    HAS_WINSOUND = False

# Colors matching ESP32 RGB565 values
CC      = '#DE886D'  # tft.color565(222, 136, 109) - Clawd salmon
BLACK   = '#000000'
WHITE   = '#FFFFFF'
SHADOW  = '#424242'  # 0x4208 - shadow
CYAN    = '#0ADFE0'  # 0x04DF
YELLOW  = '#FFE000'  # 0xFFE0
RED     = '#F80000'  # 0xF800
GREEN   = '#07E007'  # 0x07E0
DOTC    = '#256891'  # tft.color565(37,104,145)
SPARKC  = '#FFE066'  # tft.color565(255,224,102)
SCR_BG  = '#1E1E2E'  # tft.color565(30,30,46)
SCR_BR  = '#2D2D3D'  # tft.color565(45,45,61)
CODE_G  = '#4CAF50'  # tft.color565(76,175,80)
CODE_B  = '#40C4FF'  # tft.color565(64,196,255)
CODE_Y  = '#FFC107'  # tft.color565(255,193,7)
KB_C    = '#455A64'  # tft.color565(69,90,100)
KB_K    = '#78909C'  # tft.color565(120,144,156)
GOLD    = '#FFD700'  # tft.color565(255,215,0)
AMBER   = '#FFC107'  # tft.color565(255,193,7)
LYELLOW = '#FFF99D'  # tft.color565(255,249,157)
PERM_BG = '#3C0000'  # tft.color565(60,0,0)

SCALE = 2

class HardwareSimulator:
    def __init__(self):
        self.root = tk.Tk()
        self.root.title("🦀 Clawd Pixel Crab Monitor - Hardware Simulator")
        self.root.configure(bg='#1a1a1a')
        self.root.resizable(False, False)
        self.current_state = "idle"
        self.anim_frame = 0
        self.muted = False
        self.solenoid_active = False
        self.anim_running = True
        self.button_press_time = 0
        self.demo_active = False
        self._create_gui()
        self.anim_thread = threading.Thread(target=self._animation_loop, daemon=True)
        self.anim_thread.start()

    def _rect(self, x, y, w, h, color):
        sx, sy = x * SCALE, y * SCALE
        self.canvas.create_rectangle(sx, sy, sx + w * SCALE, sy + h * SCALE, fill=color, outline='')

    def _round_rect(self, x, y, w, h, r, color):
        sx, sy = x * SCALE, y * SCALE
        sw, sh = w * SCALE, h * SCALE
        sr = r * SCALE
        self.canvas.create_rectangle(sx + sr, sy, sx + sw - sr, sy + sh, fill=color, outline='')
        self.canvas.create_rectangle(sx, sy + sr, sx + sw, sy + sh - sr, fill=color, outline='')
        self.canvas.create_oval(sx, sy, sx + 2*sr, sy + 2*sr, fill=color, outline='')
        self.canvas.create_oval(sx + sw - 2*sr, sy, sx + sw, sy + 2*sr, fill=color, outline='')
        self.canvas.create_oval(sx, sy + sh - 2*sr, sx + 2*sr, sy + sh, fill=color, outline='')
        self.canvas.create_oval(sx + sw - 2*sr, sy + sh - 2*sr, sx + sw, sy + sh, fill=color, outline='')

    def _circle(self, cx, cy, r, color):
        sx, sy = cx * SCALE, cy * SCALE
        sr = r * SCALE
        self.canvas.create_oval(sx - sr, sy - sr, sx + sr, sy + sr, outline=color, width=SCALE)

    def _text(self, x, y, txt, color, size=1):
        sx, sy = x * SCALE, y * SCALE
        fs = max(8, size * 8 * SCALE)
        font = ('Courier', fs, 'bold') if size >= 2 else ('Courier', fs)
        self.canvas.create_text(sx, sy, text=txt, fill=color, font=font, anchor='nw')

    def _clear(self, color=BLACK):
        self.canvas.create_rectangle(0, 0, 160 * SCALE, 80 * SCALE, fill=color, outline='')

    # ─── Base Crab Drawing (from SVG) ───
    # SVG coords: torso(2,6)11x7, eyes(4,8)+(10,8)1x2, arms(0,9)+(13,9)2x2
    #             legs(3,11)+(5,11)+(9,11)+(11,11)1x4, shadow(3,15)9x1
    # Screen: ox+rect*SCALE where ox=65, oy=16 (but we use direct screen coords)

    def _draw_crab_base(self, ox, oy, eyes=True, yOff=0):
        """Draw crab base at screen coords (ox, oy) matching SVG pixel data"""
        o = oy + yOff
        # Shadow
        self._rect(ox+6, 46, 18, 2, SHADOW)
        # Legs (1x4 each, S=2 → 2x8)
        self._rect(ox+6, 38, 2, 8, CC)
        self._rect(ox+10, 38, 2, 8, CC)
        self._rect(ox+18, 38, 2, 8, CC)
        self._rect(ox+22, 38, 2, 8, CC)
        # Torso (11x7, S=2 → 22x14)
        self._rect(ox+4, 28+yOff, 22, 14, CC)
        # Arms (2x2, S=2 → 4x4)
        self._rect(ox, 34+yOff, 4, 4, CC)
        self._rect(ox+26, 34+yOff, 4, 4, CC)
        # Eyes (1x2, S=2 → 2x4)
        if eyes:
            self._rect(ox+8, 32+yOff, 2, 4, BLACK)
            self._rect(ox+20, 32+yOff, 2, 4, BLACK)

    # ─── State Animations (matching ESP32 exactly) ───

    def _draw_idle(self):
        f = self.anim_frame % 20
        self._clear()
        yO = 1 if (f % 6 < 3) else 0
        blink = (f >= 16 and f <= 17)
        # Shadow
        self._rect(71, 46, 18, 2, SHADOW)
        # Legs
        self._rect(71, 38, 2, 8, CC)
        self._rect(75, 38, 2, 8, CC)
        self._rect(83, 38, 2, 8, CC)
        self._rect(87, 38, 2, 8, CC)
        # Torso
        self._rect(69, 28 + yO, 22, 14, CC)
        # Arms
        self._rect(65, 34 + yO, 4, 4, CC)
        self._rect(91, 34 + yO, 4, 4, CC)
        # Eyes
        if not blink:
            self._rect(73, 32 + yO, 2, 4, BLACK)
            self._rect(85, 32 + yO, 2, 4, BLACK)
        # Occasional bubble
        if f % 10 == 0:
            self._circle(95, 28, 3, CYAN)
            self._circle(95, 28, 1, CYAN)
        self._text(5, 70, "idle", CYAN, 1)
        if f % 10 == 0 and not self.muted:
            self._beep(350, 30)

    def _draw_thinking(self):
        f = self.anim_frame % 12
        self._clear()
        xO = -4 if (f < 6) else 4
        ox = 65 + xO

        self._rect(ox + 6, 46, 18, 2, SHADOW)
        # Legs
        self._rect(ox + 6, 38, 2, 8, CC)
        self._rect(ox + 10, 38, 2, 8, CC)
        self._rect(ox + 18, 38, 2, 8, CC)
        self._rect(ox + 22, 38, 2, 8, CC)

        self._rect(ox + 4, 28, 22, 14, CC)

        self._rect(ox + 26, 34, 4, 4, CC)

        self._rect(ox + 8, 32, 2, 3, BLACK)
        self._rect(ox + 20, 32, 2, 3, BLACK)

        bx = ox - 8
        by = 2
        self._round_rect(bx, by, 18, 16, 3, WHITE)
        # Chain puffs
        self._rect(ox + 4, 22, 2, 2, WHITE)
        self._rect(ox + 8, 25, 1, 1, WHITE)
        # Dots
        phase = f % 6
        if phase >= 1:
            self._rect(bx + 2, by + 6, 2, 2, DOTC)
        if phase >= 3:
            self._rect(bx + 6, by + 6, 2, 2, DOTC)
        if phase >= 5:
            self._rect(bx + 10, by + 6, 2, 2, DOTC)

            self._rect(ox + 12, 0, 2, 2, SPARKC)
            self._rect(ox + 12, 2, 2, 2, SPARKC)
            self._rect(ox + 12, -2, 2, 2, SPARKC)  # off-screen, but draw anyway
            self._rect(ox + 10, 0, 2, 2, SPARKC)
            self._rect(ox + 14, 0, 2, 2, SPARKC)
        self._text(5, 70, "thinking", YELLOW, 1)
        if not self.muted:

    def _draw_coding(self):

        self._rect(67, 5, 2, 1, RED)
        self._rect(70, 5, 2, 1, YELLOW)
        self._rect(73, 5, 2, 1, GREEN)

        li = f // 4
        self._rect(67, 8, 10, 1, CODE_G)
        self._rect(69, 11, 16, 1, CODE_G)
        self._rect(69, 14, (9 + li) % 16, 1, CODE_B)
        self._rect(67, 17, (4 + li) % 8, 1, CODE_Y)

        if f % 6 < 3:
            self._rect(71, 1, 2, 2, CODE_B)
        else:
            self._rect(83, 0, 2, 2, CODE_B)
```
