```python
        self._rect(71, 46, 18, 2, SHADOW)
        # Legs
        self._rect(71, 38, 2, 8, CC)
        self._rect(75, 38, 2, 8, CC)
        self._rect(83, 38, 2, 8, CC)
        self._rect(87, 38, 2, 8, CC)
        # Torso
        self._rect(69, 28 + yO, 22, 14, CC)
        # Keyboard
        self._rect(64, 40, 32, 6, KB_C)
        self._rect(66, 41, 28, 1, KB_K)
        self._rect(66, 43, 28, 1, KB_K)
        # Arms typing
        aL = -2 if (f % 2 == 0) else 0
        aR = -2 if (f % 2 == 1) else 0
        self._rect(65, 34 + yO + aL, 4, 4, CC)
        self._rect(91, 34 + yO + aR, 4, 4, CC)
        # Eyes squint at screen
        self._rect(73, 32 + yO, 2, 3, BLACK)
        self._rect(85, 32 + yO, 2, 3, BLACK)
        self._text(5, 70, "typing", GREEN, 1)
        if f % 4 == 0 and not self.muted:
            self._beep(800, 15)

    def _draw_done(self):
        f = self.anim_frame % 16
        self._clear()
        phase = f % 8
        jump = 0
        if phase >= 1 and phase <= 3:
            jump = -(phase * (4 - phase)) * 2
        # Sparkles
        if f % 4 < 2:
            # + sparkle at (57,12)
            self._rect(57, 12, 2, 2, GOLD)
            self._rect(57, 10, 2, 2, GOLD)
            self._rect(57, 14, 2, 2, GOLD)
            self._rect(55, 12, 2, 2, GOLD)
            self._rect(59, 12, 2, 2, GOLD)
            # + sparkle at (101,8)
            self._rect(101, 8, 2, 2, AMBER)
            self._rect(101, 6, 2, 2, AMBER)
            self._rect(101, 10, 2, 2, AMBER)
            self._rect(99, 8, 2, 2, AMBER)
            self._rect(103, 8, 2, 2, AMBER)
        else:
            # + sparkle at (105,36)
            self._rect(105, 36, 2, 2, LYELLOW)
            self._rect(105, 34, 2, 2, LYELLOW)
            self._rect(105, 38, 2, 2, LYELLOW)
            self._rect(103, 36, 2, 2, LYELLOW)
            self._rect(107, 36, 2, 2, LYELLOW)
            # + sparkle at (53,40)
            self._rect(53, 40, 2, 2, AMBER)
            self._rect(53, 38, 2, 2, AMBER)
            self._rect(53, 42, 2, 2, AMBER)
            self._rect(51, 40, 2, 2, AMBER)
            self._rect(55, 40, 2, 2, AMBER)
        # Shadow (stays on ground)
        self._rect(71, 46, 18, 2, SHADOW)
        # Legs (4x4, shorter in happy)
        self._rect(71, 38 + jump, 2, 4, CC)
        self._rect(75, 38 + jump, 2, 4, CC)
        self._rect(83, 38 + jump, 2, 4, CC)
        self._rect(87, 38 + jump, 2, 4, CC)

        self._rect(91, 34 + jump, 4, 4, CC)
```

        self._text(5, 70, "done!", GREEN, 1)

    def _draw_permission(self):
        f = self.anim_frame % 2
        bg = PERM_BG if f else BLACK
        self._clear(bg)

        # Legs
        self._rect(71, 38, 2, 8, CC); self._rect(75, 38, 2, 8, CC)
        self._rect(83, 38, 2, 8, CC); self._rect(87, 38, 2, 8, CC)
        # Torso
        self._rect(69, 28, 22, 14, CC)
        # Arms
        self._rect(65, 34, 4, 4, CC); self._rect(91, 34, 4, 4, CC)
        # Eyes wide
        self._rect(73, 32, 2, 4, BLACK); self._rect(85, 32, 2, 4, BLACK)
        # Question bubble
        self._round_rect(80, 2, 18, 16, 3, YELLOW)
        self._round_rect(82, 4, 14, 12, 2, BLACK)
        self._text(85, 5, "?", YELLOW, 2)
        tc = RED if f else YELLOW
        self._text(5, 70, "[BTN]", tc, 1)
        if not self.muted:
            self._beep(1500 if f else 500, 80)
        if f:
            self._solenoid(150)

    # ─── Sound & Solenoid ───

    def _beep(self, freq, dur):
        if self.muted or not HAS_WINSOUND:
            return
        try:
            threading.Thread(target=lambda: winsound.Beep(freq, dur), daemon=True).start()
        except:
            pass
        self.buzzer.itemconfig('bz', fill='#00ff00')
        self.root.after(100, lambda: self.buzzer.itemconfig('bz', fill='gray'))

    def _solenoid(self, ms):
        if self.solenoid_active:
            return
        self.solenoid_active = True
        self.solenoid_cv.itemconfig('sol', fill='#ff6600')
        self.solenoid_lb.config(text="ON ⚡")
        self.root.after(ms, self._solenoid_off)

    def _solenoid_off(self):
        self.solenoid_active = False
        self.solenoid_cv.itemconfig('sol', fill='gray')
        self.solenoid_lb.config(text="OFF")

    # ─── Button ───

    def _btn_down(self, e):
        self.btn_cv.itemconfig('btn', fill='#00ff00')
        self.button_press_time = time.time()

    def _btn_up(self, e):
        self.btn_cv.itemconfig('btn', fill='#444')
        held = time.time() - self.button_press_time
        if held > 0.7:
            self.muted = not self.muted
            self.mute_var.set(self.muted)
            self.btn_log.config(text="🔇 Muted" if self.muted else "🔊 Unmuted")
            if not self.muted:
                self._beep(800, 100)
        else:
            self.btn_log.config(text="✓ Confirmed!")
            if not self.muted:
                self._beep(1000, 50)
            if self.current_state == "permission":
                self._set_state("idle")

    # ─── State Control ───

    def _set_state(self, state):
        self.current_state = state
        self.anim_frame = 0
        icons = {"idle": "💤 Idle", "thinking": "🤔 Thinking", "coding": "💻 Typing",
                 "done": "✅ Done", "permission": "⚠️ Permission"}
        self.status_var.set(icons.get(state, state))
        if state == "done":
            self._solenoid(300)
        elif state == "permission":
            self._solenoid(200)

    def _toggle_mute(self):
        self.muted = self.mute_var.get()
        self.btn_log.config(text="🔇 Muted" if self.muted else "🔊 Unmuted")

    # ─── Animation Loop ───

    def _animation_loop(self):
        delays = {"idle": 0.3, "thinking": 0.5, "coding": 0.2, "done": 0.18, "permission": 0.4}
        while self.anim_running:
            self.root.after(0, self._render)
            time.sleep(delays.get(self.current_state, 0.05))

    def _render(self):
        self.canvas.delete('all')
        draw = {"idle": self._draw_idle, "thinking": self._draw_thinking,
                "coding": self._draw_coding, "done": self._draw_done,
                "permission": self._draw_permission}
        fn = draw.get(self.current_state)
        if fn:
            fn()
        self.anim_frame += 1

    # ─── Demo Mode ───

    def _toggle_demo(self):
        self.demo_active = self.demo_var.get()
        if self.demo_active:
            self._demo_step(0)

    def _demo_step(self, idx):
        seq = [("idle", 3), ("thinking", 4), ("coding", 5), ("done", 3),
               ("idle", 2), ("permission", 4), ("coding", 4), ("done", 3)]
        if not self.demo_active or not self.anim_running:
            return
        state, dur = seq[idx % len(seq)]
        self._set_state(state)
        self.root.after(int(dur * 1000), lambda: self._demo_step(idx + 1))

    # ─── GUI ───

    def _create_gui(self):
        style = ttk.Style()
        style.configure('TFrame', background='#1a1a1a')
        style.configure('TLabel', background='#1a1a1a', foreground='white')
        style.configure('TLabelframe', background='#1a1a1a', foreground='white')
        style.configure('TLabelframe.Label', background='#1a1a1a', foreground='white')

        main = ttk.Frame(self.root, padding=8)
        main.pack(fill=tk.BOTH, expand=True)

        # Title
        ttk.Label(main, text="🦀 Clawd Pixel Crab — ESP32 Monitor Simulator",
                   font=('Arial', 11, 'bold'), foreground='#DE886D').pack(pady=(0, 5))

        # TFT Display
        tft_frame = ttk.LabelFrame(main, text="📺 TFT 160×80 (×2)", padding=3)
        tft_frame.pack()
        self.canvas = tk.Canvas(tft_frame, width=160*SCALE, height=80*SCALE,
                                bg='black', highlightthickness=2, highlightbackground='#444')
        self.canvas.pack()

        # Status
        sf = ttk.Frame(main)
        sf.pack(fill=tk.X, pady=4)
        ttk.Label(sf, text="State:", font=('Arial', 10)).pack(side=tk.LEFT)
        self.status_var = tk.StringVar(value="💤 Idle")
        ttk.Label(sf, textvariable=self.status_var, font=('Arial', 11, 'bold'),
                  foreground='#DE886D').pack(side=tk.LEFT, padx=8)

        # Hardware row
        hw = ttk.Frame(main)
        hw.pack(fill=tk.X, pady=3)

        # Buzzer
        bz_f = ttk.LabelFrame(hw, text="🔊", padding=2)
        bz_f.pack(side=tk.LEFT, padx=4)
        self.buzzer = tk.Canvas(bz_f, width=20, height=20, bg='#1a1a1a', highlightthickness=0)
        self.buzzer.pack()
        self.buzzer.create_oval(2, 2, 18, 18, fill='gray', outline='#666', tags='bz')

        # Solenoid
        sol_f = ttk.LabelFrame(hw, text="⚡", padding=2)
        sol_f.pack(side=tk.LEFT, padx=4)
        self.solenoid_cv = tk.Canvas(sol_f, width=40, height=18, bg='#1a1a1a', highlightthickness=0)
        self.solenoid_cv.pack()
        self.solenoid_cv.create_rectangle(2, 2, 38, 16, fill='gray', outline='#666', tags='sol')
        self.solenoid_lb = ttk.Label(sol_f, text="OFF", font=('Arial', 8))
        self.solenoid_lb.pack()

        # Mute
        self.mute_var = tk.BooleanVar(value=False)
        ttk.Checkbutton(hw, text="🔇 Mute", variable=self.mute_var,
                        command=self._toggle_mute).pack(side=tk.LEFT, padx=8)

        # Button
        btn_f = ttk.LabelFrame(hw, text="🔘 Button", padding=2)
        btn_f.pack(side=tk.LEFT, padx=4)
        self.btn_cv = tk.Canvas(btn_f, width=40, height=24, bg='#1a1a1a', highlightthickness=0)
        self.btn_cv.pack()
        self.btn_cv.create_rectangle(8, 4, 32, 20, fill='#444', outline='#888', tags='btn')
        self.btn_cv.bind('<Button-1>', self._btn_down)
        self.btn_cv.bind('<ButtonRelease-1>', self._btn_up)
        self.btn_log = ttk.Label(btn_f, text="click", font=('Arial', 7))
        self.btn_log.pack()

        # State buttons
        ctrl = ttk.LabelFrame(main, text="🎮 State Control", padding=4)
        ctrl.pack(fill=tk.X, pady=4)

        states = [("💤 Idle", "idle", CYAN), ("🤔 Thinking", "thinking", YELLOW),
                  ("💻 Typing", "coding", GREEN), ("✅ Done", "done", GREEN),
                  ("⚠️ Permission", "permission", RED)]
        for txt, st, fg in states:
            tk.Button(ctrl, text=txt, command=lambda s=st: self._set_state(s),
                      bg='#2a2a2a', fg=fg, font=('Arial', 9), width=13,
                      activebackground='#444', activeforeground=fg, relief=tk.RAISED, bd=2
                     ).pack(side=tk.LEFT, padx=1)

        # Bottom
        bot = ttk.Frame(main)
        bot.pack(fill=tk.X, pady=6)
        self.demo_var = tk.BooleanVar(value=False)
        ttk.Checkbutton(bot, text="🔄 Auto Demo", variable=self.demo_var,
                        command=self._toggle_demo).pack(side=tk.LEFT)
        ttk.Button(bot, text="❌ Quit", command=self._quit).pack(side=tk.RIGHT)

        ttk.Label(main, text="SVG-accurate Clawd pixel crab — matches ESP32 firmware",
                  font=('Arial', 8), foreground='#666').pack()

    def _quit(self):
        self.anim_running = False
        self.root.quit()
        self.root.destroy()

    def run(self):
        self.root.update_idletasks()
        w, h = self.root.winfo_width(), self.root.winfo_height()
        x = (self.root.winfo_screenwidth() - w) // 2
        y = (self.root.winfo_screenheight() - h) // 2
        self.root.geometry(f'+{x}+{y}')
        self.root.mainloop()

def run_simulator():
    HardwareSimulator().run()

if __name__ == "__main__":
    run_simulator()","path":"E:\硬件开发\project_jun08a_new\simulator.py","replaceMode":"whole"}

toolCallRounds.summary:
<think>The user wants me to create a detailed structured summary of the conversation history. Let me analyze all the context carefully.</think>## 对话结构化摘要

### 项目基本信息
- **项目路径**: `E:\硬件开发\project_jun08a_new`
- **开发板**: `board-esp32c3` (ESP32-C3)
- **已安装库**: `lib-adafruit-gfx`, `lib-arduinojson`, `lib-core-custom`, `lib-adafruit-st7735`
- **显示屏**: ST7735 TFT, 160×80, 旋转模式1(横屏)
- **引脚分配**: TFT(CS=10,DC=9,MOSI=7,CLK=6,RST=8,BL=5), 蜂鸣器=4, 电磁阀=3, 按钮=2

### 任务目标
参考 GitHub 项目 [clawd-on-desk](https://github.com/rullerzhou-afk/clawd-on-desk) 的 **Clawd 像素螃蟹** 主题，为 ESP32 硬件设备制作像素动画监控器，要求 90%+ 还原度。

### 已完成工作

#### 1. SVG 动画文件下载 (✅)
- 从 `assets/svg/` 目录下载了 17 个 SVG 文件到 `E:\硬件开发\clawd_svgs\`
- 关键文件: `clawd-idle-follow.svg`, `clawd-happy.svg`, `clawd-working-typing.svg`, `clawd-working-thinking.svg`, `clawd-error.svg`

#### 2. SVG 像素数据分析 (✅)
- **螃蟹主体色**: `#DE886D` (rgb 222,136,109) → `tft.color565(222,136,109)`
- **身体结构** (精确坐标):
  - 躯干: `rect(2,6)` 11×7
  - 双眼: `rect(4,8)` / `rect(10,8)` 各 1×2 (黑色)
  - 左钳: `rect(0,9)` 2×2 / 右钳: `rect(13,9)` 2×2
  - 4条腿: `rect(3,11)/(5,11)/(9,11)/(11,11)` 各 1×4
  - 阴影: `rect(3,15)` 9×1 (黑色半透明)

#### 3. ESP32 固件代码 (✅ 编译通过)
- **文件**: `project.abs` + `.temp/sketch/sketch.ino`
- **全局变量**: `CC`(unsigned int,颜色), `gState`(状态), `gPrev`(前一状态), `gFrm`(帧), `gMut`(静音), `gBtn`(按钮), `gSolT`(电磁阀计时)
- **5个动画状态**:
  - `gState=0`: **idle** — 呼吸缩放+眨眼(4s周期)+偶尔冒蓝色气泡
  - `gState=1`: **thinking** — 身体倾斜+白色思考气泡+3个蓝色点逐个出现+✨灵感闪光
  - `gState=2`: **typing/coding** — 代码屏幕(红黄绿3色按钮+代码行)+键盘+蓝色数据粒子+手臂交替
  - `gState=3`: **done** — 抛物线弹跳+金色星花✨闪烁+OK!文字
  - `gState=4`: **permission** — 红色背景闪烁+问号气泡+[BTN]提示+蜂鸣器+电磁阀
- **关键修复**: `#define` 宏在 `custom_code` 中会被丢弃，必须用 `variable_define_scoped` 声明变量，用字面数字替代 `#define` 宏引用
- **最终编译成功的方式**: 
  - `arduino_global()` 里用 `variable_define_scoped(global, ...)` 声明所有变量
  - `custom_code` 只用于放置注释
  - 代码中 `PIN_SOL=3`, `PIN_BUZZ=4`, `PIN_BTN=2` 全部用字面数字

#### 4. 模拟器更新 (✅)
- **文件**: `E:\硬件开发\project_jun08a_new\simulator.py`
- 已同步更新为 SVG 精确像素数据，颜色改为 `#DE886D`
- 支持 5 个状态按钮 + Auto Demo 模式
- 已成功启动运行 (GUI程序，超时属正常)

### 当前状态
- **所有 5 项 TODO 已完成** ✅
- 固件编译通过，模拟器已同步
- 用户刚刚查看了模拟器运行效果

### 关键技术发现
1. **ABS 语法限制**: `custom_code` 中的 `#define` 不会被渲染到生成的 `.ino` 文件中；必须使用 `variable_define_scoped(global, ...)` 声明全局变量
2. **类型限制**: `variable_define_scoped` 不支持 `uint16_t`，需用 `unsigned int`
3. **SVG 结构**: Clawd 螃蟹约 15×16 像素，viewBox `-15 -25 45 45`，SVG中通过 CSS animation 实现呼吸/眨眼/弹跳等效果，ESP32 端需用 `millis()` 手动实现帧切换

<toolResult>            fq = melody[f % 16]
            if fq > 0:
                self._beep(fq, 150)

    def _draw_permission(self):
        f = self.anim_frame % 2
        bg = YELLOW if f else BLACK
        self._clear(bg)
        # Shadow
        self._rect(71, 46, 18, 2, SHADOW)
        # Legs
        self._rect(71, 38, 2, 8, CC); self._rect(75, 38, 2, 8, CC)
        self._rect(83, 38, 2, 8, CC); self._rect(87, 38, 2, 8, CC)
        # Torso
        self._rect(69, 28, 22, 14, CC)
        # Arms
        self._rect(65, 34, 4, 4, CC); self._rect(91, 34, 4, 4, CC)
        # Eyes wide
        self._rect(73, 32, 2, 4, BLACK); self._rect(85, 32, 2, 4, BLACK)
        # Question bubble
        self._round_rect(80, 2, 18, 16, 3, YELLOW)
        self._round_rect(82, 4, 14, 12, 2, BLACK)
        self._text(85, 5, "?", YELLOW, 2)
        tc = RED if f else YELLOW
        self._text(5, 70, "[BTN]", tc, 1)


    # ─── Sound & Solenoid ───

    def _beep(self, freq, dur):
        if self.muted or not HAS_WINSOUND:
            return
        try:
            threading.Thread(target=lambda: winsound.Beep(freq, dur), daemon=True).start()
        except:
            pass
        self.buzzer.itemconfig('bz', fill='#00ff00')
        self.root.after(100, lambda: self.buzzer.itemconfig('bz', fill='gray'))

    def _solenoid(self, ms):
        if self.solenoid_active:
            return
        self.solenoid_active = True
        self.solenoid_cv.itemconfig('sol', fill='#ff6600')
        self.solenoid_lb.config(text="ON ⚡")
        self.root.after(ms, self._solenoid_off)

    def _solenoid_off(self):
        self.solenoid_active = False
        self.solenoid_cv.itemconfig('sol', fill='gray')
        self.solenoid_lb.config(text="OFF")

    # ─── Button ───

    def _btn_down(self, e):
        self.btn_cv.itemconfig('btn', fill='#00ff00')
        self.button_press_time = time.time()

    def _btn_up(self, e):
        self.btn_cv.itemconfig('btn', fill='#444')
        held = time.time() - self.button_press_time
        if held > 0.7:
            self.muted = not self.muted
            self.mute_var.set(self.muted)
            self.btn_log.config(text="🔇 Muted" if self.muted else "🔊 Unmuted")
            if not self.muted:
                self._beep(800, 100)
        else:
            self.btn_log.config(text="✓ Confirmed!")
            if not self.muted:
                self._beep(1000, 50)
            if self.current_state == "permission":
                self._set_state("idle")

    # ─── State Control ───

    def _set_state(self, state):
        self.current_state = state
        self.anim_frame = 0
        icons = {"idle": "💤 Idle", "thinking": "🤔 Thinking", "coding": "💻 Typing",
                 "done": "✅ Done", "permission": "⚠️ Permission"}
        self.status_var.set(icons.get(state, state))
        if state == "done":
            self._solenoid(300)
        elif state == "permission":
            self._solenoid(200)

    def _toggle_mute(self):
        self.muted = self.mute_var.get()
        self.btn_log.config(text="🔇 Muted" if self.muted else "🔊 Unmuted")

    # ─── Animation Loop ───

    def _animation_loop(self):
        delays = {"idle": 0.3, "thinking": 0.5, "coding": 0.2, "done": 0.18, "permission": 0.4}
        while self.anim_running:
            self.root.after(0, self._render)
            time.sleep(delays.get(self.current_state, 0.05))

    def _render(self):
        self.canvas.delete('all')
        draw = {"idle": self._draw_idle, "thinking": self._draw_thinking,
                "coding": self._draw_coding, "done": self._draw_done,
                "permission": self._draw_permission}
        fn = draw.get(self.current_state)
        if fn:
            fn()
        self.anim_frame += 1

    # ─── Demo Mode ───

    def _toggle_demo(self):
        self.demo_active = self.demo_var.get()
        if self.demo_active:
            self._demo_step(0)

    def _demo_step(self, idx):
        seq = [("idle", 3), ("thinking", 4), ("coding", 5), ("done", 3),
               ("idle", 2), ("permission", 4), ("coding", 4), ("done", 3)]
        if not self.demo_active or not self.anim_running:
            return
        state, dur = seq[idx % len(seq)]
        self._set_state(state)
        self.root.after(int(dur * 1000), lambda: self._demo_step(idx + 1))

    # ─── GUI ───

    def _create_gui(self):
        style = ttk.Style()
        style.configure('TFrame', background='#1a1a1a')
        style.configure('TLabel', background='#1a1a1a', foreground='white')
        style.configure('TLabelframe', background='#1a1a1a', foreground='white')
        style.configure('TLabelframe.Label', background='#1a1a1a', foreground='white')

        main = ttk.Frame(self.root, padding=8)
        main.pack(fill=tk.BOTH, expand=True)

        # Title
        ttk.Label(main, text="🦀 Clawd Pixel Crab — ESP32 Monitor Simulator",
                   font=('Arial', 11, 'bold'), foreground='#DE886D').pack(pady=(0, 5))

        # TFT Display
        tft_frame = ttk.LabelFrame(main, text="📺 TFT 160×80 (×2)", padding=3)
        tft_frame.pack()
        self.canvas = tk.Canvas(tft_frame, width=160*SCALE, height=80*SCALE,
                                bg='black', highlightthickness=2, highlightbackground='#444')
        self.canvas.pack()

        # Status
        sf = ttk.Frame(main)
        sf.pack(fill=tk.X, pady=4)
        ttk.Label(sf, text="State:", font=('Arial', 10)).pack(side=tk.LEFT)
        self.status_var = tk.StringVar(value="💤 Idle")
        ttk.Label(sf, textvariable=self.status_var, font=('Arial', 11, 'bold'),
                  foreground='#DE886D').pack(side=tk.LEFT, padx=8)

        # Hardware row
        hw = ttk.Frame(main)
        hw.pack(fill=tk.X, pady=3)

        # Buzzer
        bz_f = ttk.LabelFrame(hw, text="🔊", padding=2)
        bz_f.pack(side=tk.LEFT, padx=4)
        self.buzzer = tk.Canvas(bz_f, width=20, height=20, bg='#1a1a1a', highlightthickness=0)
        self.buzzer.pack()
        self.buzzer.create_oval(2, 2, 18, 18, fill='gray', outline='#666', tags='bz')

        # Solenoid
        sol_f = ttk.LabelFrame(hw, text="⚡", padding=2)
        sol_f.pack(side=tk.LEFT, padx=4)
        self.solenoid_cv = tk.Canvas(sol_f, width=40, height=18, bg='#1a1a1a', highlightthickness=0)
        self.solenoid_cv.pack()
        self.solenoid_cv.create_rectangle(2, 2, 38, 16, fill='gray', outline='#666', tags='sol')
        self.solenoid_lb = ttk.Label(sol_f, text="OFF", font=('Arial', 8))
        self.solenoid_lb.pack()

        # Mute
        self.mute_var = tk.BooleanVar(value=False)
        ttk.Checkbutton(hw, text="🔇 Mute", variable=self.mute_var,
                        command=self._toggle_mute).pack(side=tk.LEFT, padx=8)

        # Button
        btn_f = ttk.LabelFrame(hw, text="🔘 Button", padding=2)
        btn_f.pack(side=tk.LEFT, padx=4)
        self.btn_cv = tk.Canvas(btn_f, width=40, height=24, bg='#1a1a1a', highlightthickness=0)
        self.btn_cv.pack()
        self.btn_cv.create_rectangle(8, 4, 32, 20, fill='#444', outline='#888', tags='btn')
        self.btn_cv.bind('<Button-1>', self._btn_down)
        self.btn_cv.bind('<ButtonRelease-1>', self._btn_up)
        self.btn_log = ttk.Label(btn_f, text="click", font=('Arial', 7))
        self.btn_log.pack()

        # State buttons
        ctrl = ttk.LabelFrame(main, text="🎮 State Control", padding=4)
        ctrl.pack(fill=tk.X, pady=4)

        states = [("💤 Idle", "idle", CYAN), ("🤔 Thinking", "thinking", YELLOW),
                  ("💻 Typing", "coding", GREEN), ("✅ Done", "done", GREEN),
                  ("⚠️ Permission", "permission", RED)]
        for txt, st, fg in states:
            tk.Button(ctrl, text=txt, command=lambda s=st: self._set_state(s),
                      bg='#2a2a2a', fg=fg, font=('Arial', 9), width=13,
                      activebackground='#444', activeforeground=fg, relief=tk.RAISED, bd=2
                     ).pack(side=tk.LEFT, padx=1)

        # Bottom
        bot = ttk.Frame(main)
        bot.pack(fill=tk.X, pady=6)
        self.demo_var = tk.BooleanVar(value=False)
        ttk.Checkbutton(bot, text="🔄 Auto Demo", variable=self.demo_var,
                        command=self._toggle_demo).pack(side=tk.LEFT)
        ttk.Button(bot, text="❌ Quit", command=self._quit).pack(side=tk.RIGHT)

        ttk.Label(main, text="SVG-accurate Clawd pixel crab — matches ESP32 firmware",
                  font=('Arial', 8), foreground='#666').pack()

    def _quit(self):
        self.anim_running = False
        self.root.quit()
        self.root.destroy()

    def run(self):
        self.root.update_idletasks()
        w, h = self.root.winfo_width(), self.root.winfo_height()
        x = (self.root.winfo_screenwidth() - w) // 2
        y = (self.root.winfo_screenheight() - h) // 2
        self.root.geometry(f'+{x}+{y}')
        self.root.mainloop()

def run_simulator():
    HardwareSimulator().run()

if __name__ == "__main__":
    run_simulator()</toolResult>

<toolResult>#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
Clawd Pixel Crab Monitor - Hardware Simulator
Preview Clawd pixel crab animations without hardware.
Matches ESP32 firmware pixel-for-pixel (scaled 2x).
SVG source: https://github.com/rullerzhou-afk/clawd-on-desk

Run: python simulator.py
"""

import tkinter as tk
from tkinter import ttk
import threading
import time
import sys

try:
    import winsound
    HAS_WINSOUND = True
except ImportError:
    HAS_WINSOUND = False

# ─── Colors matching ESP32 RGB565 ───
CC      = '#DE886D'   # tft.color565(222,136,109) Clawd salmon
BLACK   = '#000000'
WHITE   = '#FFFFFF'
SHADOW  = '#424242'   # 0x4208
CYAN    = '#0ADFE0'   # 0x04DF
YELLOW  = '#FFE000'   # 0xFFE0
RED     = '#F80000'   # 0xF800
GREEN   = '#07E007'   # 0x07E0
DOTC    = '#256891'   # tft.color565(37,104,145) thought dots
SPARKC  = '#FFE066'   # tft.color565(255,224,102) sparkle
SCR_BG  = '#1E1E2E'   # tft.color565(30,30,46) screen bg
SCR_BR  = '#2D2D3D'   # tft.color565(45,45,61) screen border
CODE_G  = '#4CAF50'   # tft.color565(76,175,80)
CODE_B  = '#40C4FF'   # tft.color565(64,196,255)
CODE_Y  = '#FFC107'   # tft.color565(255,193,7)
KB_C    = '#455A64'   # tft.color565(69,90,100)
KB_K    = '#78909C'   # tft.color565(120,144,156)</toolResult>

call_7e816176e7834ffd82f58943.content:
<toolResult>#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""
Clawd Pixel Crab Monitor - Hardware Simulator
Preview Clawd pixel crab animations without hardware.
Matches ESP32 firmware pixel-for-pixel (scaled 2x).
SVG source: https://github.com/rullerzhou-afk/clawd-on-desk

Run: python simulator.py
"""

import tkinter as tk
from tkinter import ttk
import threading
import time
import sys

try:
    import winsound
    HAS_WINSOUND = True
except ImportError:
    HAS_WINSOUND = False

# ─── Colors matching ESP32 RGB565 ───
CC      = '#DE886D'   # tft.color565(222,136,109) Clawd salmon
BLACK   = '#000000'
WHITE   = '#FFFFFF'
SHADOW  = '#424242'   # 0x4208
CYAN    = '#0ADFE0'   # 0x04DF
YELLOW  = '#FFE000'   # 0xFFE0
GOLD_BG = '#C8A000'   # RGB(200,160,0) warm gold - permission bg
RED     = '#F80000'   # 0xF800
GREEN   = '#07E007'   # 0x07E0
DOTC    = '#256891'   # tft.color565(37,104,145) thought dots
SPARKC  = '#FFE066'   # tft.color565(255,224,102) sparkle
SCR_BG  = '#1E1E2E'   # tft.color565(30,30,46) screen bg
SCR_BR  = '#2D2D3D'   # tft.color565(45,45,61) screen border
CODE_G  = '#4CAF50'   # tft.color565(76,175,80)
CODE_B  = '#40C4FF'   # tft.color565(64,196,255)
CODE_Y  = '#FFC107'   # tft.color565(255,193,7)
KB_C    = '#455A64'   # tft.color565(69,90,100)
KB_K    = '#78909C'   # tft.color565(120,144,156)
GOLD    = '#FFD700'   # tft.color565(255,215,0)
AMBER   = '#FFC107'   # tft.color565(255,193,7)
LYELLOW = '#FFF99D'   # tft.color565(255,249,157)
PERM_BG = '#3C0000'   # tft.color565(60,0,0)

SCALE = 2

class HardwareSimulator:
    def __init__(self):
        self.root = tk.Tk()
        self.root.title("🦀 Clawd Pixel Crab Monitor - Hardware Simulator")
        self.root.configure(bg='#1a1a1a')
        self.root.resizable(False, False)

        self.current_state = "idle"
        self.anim_frame = 0
        self.muted = False
        self.solenoid_active = False
        self.anim_running = True
        self.button_press_time = 0
        self.demo_active = False

        self._create_gui()
        self.anim_thread = threading.Thread(target=self._animation_loop, daemon=True)
        self.anim_thread.start()

    # ─── Drawing primitives ───

    def _rect(self, x, y, w, h, color):
        sx, sy = x * SCALE, y * SCALE
        self.canvas.create_rectangle(sx, sy, sx + w * SCALE, sy + h * SCALE, fill=color, outline='')

    def _round_rect(self, x, y, w, h, r, color):
        sx, sy, sw, sh, sr = x*SCALE, y*SCALE, w*SCALE, h*SCALE, r*SCALE
        self.canvas.create_rectangle(sx+sr, sy, sx+sw-sr, sy+sh, fill=color, outline='')
        self.canvas.create_rectangle(sx, sy+sr, sx+sw, sy+sh-sr, fill=color, outline='')
        for cx, cy in [(sx+sr,sy+sr),(sx+sw-sr,sy+sr),(sx+sr,sy+sh-sr),(sx+sw-sr,sy+sh-sr)]:
            self.canvas.create_oval(cx-sr, cy-sr, cx+sr, cy+sr, fill=color, outline='')

    def _circle(self, cx, cy, r, color):
        sx, sy, sr = cx*SCALE, cy*SCALE, r*SCALE
        self.canvas.create_oval(sx-sr, sy-sr, sx+sr, sy+sr, outline=color, width=SCALE)

    def _text(self, x, y, txt, color, size=1):
        sx, sy = x*SCALE, y*SCALE
        fs = max(8, size * 8 * SCALE)
        font = ('Courier', fs, 'bold') if size >= 2 else ('Courier', fs)
        self.canvas.create_text(sx, sy, text=txt, fill=color, font=font, anchor='nw')

    def _clear(self, color=BLACK):
        self.canvas.create_rectangle(0, 0, 160*SCALE, 80*SCALE, fill=color, outline='')

    # ─── State Animations (matching ESP32 firmware exactly) ───

    def _draw_idle(self):
        f = self.anim_frame % 20
        self._clear()
        yO = 1 if (f % 6 < 3) else 0
        blink = (16 <= f % 20 <= 17)
        # Shadow
        self._rect(71, 46, 18, 2, SHADOW)
        # Legs
        self._rect(71, 38, 2, 8, CC); self._rect(75, 38, 2, 8, CC)
        self._rect(83, 38, 2, 8, CC); self._rect(87, 38, 2, 8, CC)
        # Torso
        self._rect(69, 28+yO, 22, 14, CC)
        # Arms
        self._rect(65, 34+yO, 4, 4, CC); self._rect(91, 34+yO, 4, 4, CC)
        # Eyes
        if not blink:
            self._rect(73, 32+yO, 2, 4, BLACK); self._rect(85, 32+yO, 2, 4, BLACK)
        # Occasional bubble
        if f % 10 == 0:
            self._circle(95, 28, 3, CYAN); self._circle(95, 28, 1, CYAN)
        self._text(5, 70, "idle", CYAN, 1)
        if f % 10 == 0 and not self.muted:
            self._beep(350, 30)

    def _draw_thinking(self):
        f = self.anim_frame % 12
        self._clear()
        xO = -4 if (f < 6) else 4
        ox = 65 + xO
        # Shadow
        self._rect(ox+6, 46, 18, 2, SHADOW)
        # Legs
        self._rect(ox+6, 38, 2, 8, CC); self._rect(ox+10, 38, 2, 8, CC)
        self._rect(ox+18, 38, 2, 8, CC); self._rect(ox+22, 38, 2, 8, CC)
        # Torso
        self._rect(ox+4, 28, 22, 14, CC)
        # Arms
        armOff = -4 if (f < 6) else 0
        self._rect(ox, 34+armOff, 4, 4, CC); self._rect(ox+26, 34, 4, 4, CC)
        # Eyes squint
        self._rect(ox+8, 32, 2, 3, BLACK); self._rect(ox+20, 32, 2, 3, BLACK)
        # Thought bubble
        bx, by = ox-8, 2
        self._round_rect(bx, by, 18, 16, 3, WHITE)
        # Chain puffs
        self._rect(ox+4, 22, 2, 2, WHITE); self._rect(ox+8, 25, 1, 1, WHITE)
        # Dots appear one by one
        phase = f % 6
        if phase >= 1: self._rect(bx+2, by+6, 2, 2, DOTC)
        if phase >= 3: self._rect(bx+6, by+6, 2, 2, DOTC)
        if phase >= 5:
            self._rect(bx+10, by+6, 2, 2, DOTC)
            # Sparkle +++
            self._rect(ox+12, 0, 2, 2, SPARKC)
            self._rect(ox+12, 2, 2, 2, SPARKC)
            self._rect(ox+10, 0, 2, 2, SPARKC)
            self._rect(ox+14, 0, 2, 2, SPARKC)
        self._text(5, 70, "thinking", YELLOW, 1)

    def _draw_coding(self):
        f = self.anim_frame % 24
        self._clear()
        yO = 2 if (f % 4 >= 2) else 0
        # Screen background
        self._rect(66, 4, 27, 22, SCR_BG)
        self._rect(66, 4, 27, 2, SCR_BR)
        # Traffic lights
        self._rect(67, 5, 2, 1, RED); self._rect(70, 5, 2, 1, YELLOW); self._rect(73, 5, 2, 1, GREEN)
        # Code lines
        li = f // 4
        self._rect(67, 8, 10, 1, CODE_G)
        self._rect(69, 11, 16, 1, CODE_G)
        self._rect(69, 14, (9+li)%16, 1, CODE_B)
        self._rect(67, 17, (4+li)%8, 1, CODE_Y)
        # Data particles
        if f % 6 < 3: self._rect(71, 1, 2, 2, CODE_B)
        else:         self._rect(83, 0, 2, 2, CODE_B)
        # Shadow
        self._rect(71, 46, 18, 2, SHADOW)
        # Legs
        self._rect(71, 38, 2, 8, CC); self._rect(75, 38, 2, 8, CC)
        self._rect(83, 38, 2, 8, CC); self._rect(87, 38, 2, 8, CC)
        # Torso
        self._rect(69, 28+yO, 22, 14, CC)
        # Keyboard
        self._rect(64, 40, 32, 6, KB_C)
        self._rect(66, 41, 28, 1, KB_K)
        self._rect(66, 43, 28, 1, KB_K)
        # Arms typing
        aL = -2 if (f % 2 == 0) else 0
        aR = -2 if (f % 2 == 1) else 0
        self._rect(65, 34+yO+aL, 4, 4, CC)
        self._rect(91, 34+yO+aR, 4, 4, CC)
        # Eyes squint at screen
        self._rect(73, 32+yO, 2, 3, BLACK); self._rect(85, 32+yO, 2, 3, BLACK)
        self._text(5, 70, "typing", GREEN, 1)

    def _draw_done(self):
        f = self.anim_frame % 16
        self._clear()
        phase = f % 8
        jump = 0
        if 1 <= phase <= 3:
            jump = -(phase * (4 - phase)) * 2
        # Sparkles (alternating sets)
        if f % 4 < 2:
            self._rect(57, 12, 2, 2, GOLD); self._rect(57, 10, 2, 2, GOLD)
            self._rect(57, 14, 2, 2, GOLD); self._rect(55, 12, 2, 2, GOLD)
            self._rect(59, 12, 2, 2, GOLD)
            self._rect(101, 8, 2, 2, AMBER); self._rect(101, 6, 2, 2, AMBER)
            self._rect(101, 10, 2, 2, AMBER); self._rect(99, 8, 2, 2, AMBER)
            self._rect(103, 8, 2, 2, AMBER)
        else:
            self._rect(105, 36, 2, 2, LYELLOW); self._rect(105, 34, 2, 2, LYELLOW)
            self._rect(105, 38, 2, 2, LYELLOW); self._rect(103, 36, 2, 2, LYELLOW)
            self._rect(107, 36, 2, 2, LYELLOW)
            self._rect(53, 40, 2, 2, AMBER); self._rect(53, 38, 2, 2, AMBER)
            self._rect(53, 42, 2, 2, AMBER); self._rect(51, 40, 2, 2, AMBER)
            self._rect(55, 40, 2, 2, AMBER)
        # Shadow
        self._rect(71, 46, 18, 2, SHADOW)
        # Torso
        self._rect(69, 28+jump, 22, 14, CC)
        # Legs (shorter 4px in happy)
        self._rect(71, 38+jump, 2, 4, CC); self._rect(75, 38+jump, 2, 4, CC)
        self._rect(83, 38+jump, 2, 4, CC); self._rect(87, 38+jump, 2, 4, CC)
        # Arms
        self._rect(65, 34+jump, 4, 4, CC); self._rect(91, 34+jump, 4, 4, CC)
        # Eyes
        if f % 8 != 4:
            self._rect(73, 32+jump, 2, 4, BLACK); self._rect(85, 32+jump, 2, 4, BLACK)
        self._text(5, 70, "done!", GREEN, 1)
        # Victory melody - one cycle only
        if self.anim_frame < 16:
            melody = [523,659,784,1047, 0,1319,1568,2093, 0,1047,1568, 0,2093, 0, 0, 0]
            if not self.muted:
                fq = melody[self.anim_frame]
                if fq > 0:
                    self._beep(fq, 150)

    def _draw_permission(self):
        f = self.anim_frame % 2
        bg = GOLD_BG if f else BLACK
        self._clear(bg)
        # Shadow
        self._rect(71, 46, 18, 2, SHADOW)
        # Legs
        self._rect(71, 38, 2, 8, CC); self._rect(75, 38, 2, 8, CC)
        self._rect(83, 38, 2, 8, CC); self._rect(87, 38, 2, 8, CC)
        # Torso
        self._rect(69, 28, 22, 14, CC)
        # Arms
        self._rect(65, 34, 4, 4, CC); self._rect(91, 34, 4, 4, CC)
        # Eyes wide
        self._rect(73, 32, 2, 4, BLACK); self._rect(85, 32, 2, 4, BLACK)
        # Question bubble
        self._round_rect(80, 2, 18, 16, 3, YELLOW)
        self._round_rect(82, 4, 14, 12, 2, BLACK)
        self._text(85, 5, "?", YELLOW, 2)
        tc = RED if f else YELLOW
        self._text(5, 70, "Waiting", tc, 1)


    # ─── Sound & Solenoid ───

    def _beep(self, freq, dur):
        if self.muted or not HAS_WINSOUND:
            return
        try:
            threading.Thread(target=lambda: winsound.Beep(freq, dur), daemon=True).start()
        except:
            pass
        self.buzzer.itemconfig('bz', fill='#00ff00')
        self.root.after(100, lambda: self.buzzer.itemconfig('bz', fill='gray'))

    def _solenoid(self, ms):
        if self.solenoid_active:
            return
        self.solenoid_active = True
        self.solenoid_cv.itemconfig('sol', fill='#ff6600')
        self.solenoid_lb.config(text="ON ⚡")
        self.root.after(ms, self._solenoid_off)

    def _solenoid_off(self):
        self.solenoid_active = False
        self.solenoid_cv.itemconfig('sol', fill='gray')
        self.solenoid_lb.config(text="OFF")

    # ─── Button ───

    def _btn_down(self, e):
        self.btn_cv.itemconfig('btn', fill='#00ff00')
        self.button_press_time = time.time()

    def _btn_up(self, e):
        self.btn_cv.itemconfig('btn', fill='#444')
        held = time.time() - self.button_press_time
        if held > 0.7:
            self.muted = not self.muted
            self.mute_var.set(self.muted)
            self.btn_log.config(text="🔇 Muted" if self.muted else "🔊 Unmuted")
            if not self.muted:
                self._beep(800, 100)
        else:
            self.btn_log.config(text="✓ Confirmed!")
            if not self.muted:
                self._beep(1000, 50)
            if self.current_state == "permission":
                self._set_state("idle")

    # ─── State Control ───

    def _set_state(self, state):
        self.current_state = state
        self.anim_frame = 0
        icons = {"idle": "💤 Idle", "thinking": "🤔 Thinking", "coding": "💻 Typing",
                 "done": "✅ Done", "permission": "⏳ Waiting"}
        self.status_var.set(icons.get(state, state))
        if state == "done":
            self._solenoid(300)
        elif state == "permission":
            self._solenoid(200)

    def _toggle_mute(self):
        self.muted = self.mute_var.get()
        self.btn_log.config(text="🔇 Muted" if self.muted else "🔊 Unmuted")

    # ─── Animation Loop ───

    def _animation_loop(self):
        delays = {"idle": 0.3, "thinking": 0.5, "coding": 0.2, "done": 0.18, "permission": 0.4}
        while self.anim_running:
            self.root.after(0, self._render)
            time.sleep(delays.get(self.current_state, 0.05))

    def _render(self):
        self.canvas.delete('all')
        draw = {"idle": self._draw_idle, "thinking": self._draw_thinking,
                "coding": self._draw_coding, "done": self._draw_done,
                "permission": self._draw_permission}
        fn = draw.get(self.current_state)
        if fn:
            fn()
        self.anim_frame += 1

    # ─── Demo Mode ───

    def _toggle_demo(self):
        self.demo_active = self.demo_var.get()
        if self.demo_active:
            self._demo_step(0)

    def _demo_step(self, idx):
        seq = [("idle", 3), ("thinking", 4), ("coding", 5), ("done", 3),
               ("idle", 2), ("permission", 4), ("coding", 4), ("done", 3)]
        if not self.demo_active or not self.anim_running:
            return
        state, dur = seq[idx % len(seq)]
        self._set_state(state)
        self.root.after(int(dur * 1000), lambda: self._demo_step(idx + 1))

    # ─── GUI ───

    def _create_gui(self):
        style = ttk.Style()
        style.configure('TFrame', background='#1a1a1a')
        style.configure('TLabel', background='#1a1a1a', foreground='white')
        style.configure('TLabelframe', background='#1a1a1a', foreground='white')
        style.configure('TLabelframe.Label', background='#1a1a1a', foreground='white')

        main = ttk.Frame(self.root, padding=8)
        main.pack(fill=tk.BOTH, expand=True)

        # Title
        ttk.Label(main, text="🦀 Clawd Pixel Crab — ESP32 Monitor Simulator",
                   font=('Arial', 11, 'bold'), foreground='#DE886D').pack(pady=(0, 5))

        # TFT Display
        tft_frame = ttk.LabelFrame(main, text="📺 TFT 160×80 (×2)", padding=3)
        tft_frame.pack()
        self.canvas = tk.Canvas(tft_frame, width=160*SCALE, height=80*SCALE,
                                bg='black', highlightthickness=2, highlightbackground='#444')
        self.canvas.pack()

        # Status
        sf = ttk.Frame(main)
        sf.pack(fill=tk.X, pady=4)
        ttk.Label(sf, text="State:", font=('Arial', 10)).pack(side=tk.LEFT)
        self.status_var = tk.StringVar(value="💤 Idle")
        ttk.Label(sf, textvariable=self.status_var, font=('Arial', 11, 'bold'),
                  foreground='#DE886D').pack(side=tk.LEFT, padx=8)

        # Hardware row
        hw = ttk.Frame(main)
        hw.pack(fill=tk.X, pady=3)

        # Buzzer
        bz_f = ttk.LabelFrame(hw, text="🔊", padding=2)
        bz_f.pack(side=tk.LEFT, padx=4)
        self.buzzer = tk.Canvas(bz_f, width=20, height=20, bg='#1a1a1a', highlightthickness=0)
        self.buzzer.pack()
        self.buzzer.create_oval(2, 2, 18, 18, fill='gray', outline='#666', tags='bz')

        # Solenoid
        sol_f = ttk.LabelFrame(hw, text="⚡", padding=2)
        sol_f.pack(side=tk.LEFT, padx=4)
        self.solenoid_cv = tk.Canvas(sol_f, width=40, height=18, bg='#1a1a1a', highlightthickness=0)
        self.solenoid_cv.pack()
        self.solenoid_cv.create_rectangle(2, 2, 38, 16, fill='gray', outline='#666', tags='sol')
        self.solenoid_lb = ttk.Label(sol_f, text="OFF", font=('Arial', 8))
        self.solenoid_lb.pack()

        # Mute
        self.mute_var = tk.BooleanVar(value=False)
        ttk.Checkbutton(hw, text="🔇 Mute", variable=self.mute_var,
                        command=self._toggle_mute).pack(side=tk.LEFT, padx=8)

        # Button
        btn_f = ttk.LabelFrame(hw, text="🔘 Button", padding=2)
        btn_f.pack(side=tk.LEFT, padx=4)
        self.btn_cv = tk.Canvas(btn_f, width=40, height=24, bg='#1a1a1a', highlightthickness=0)
        self.btn_cv.pack()
        self.btn_cv.create_rectangle(8, 4, 32, 20, fill='#444', outline='#888', tags='btn')
        self.btn_cv.bind('<Button-1>', self._btn_down)
        self.btn_cv.bind('<ButtonRelease-1>', self._btn_up)
        self.btn_log = ttk.Label(btn_f, text="click", font=('Arial', 7))
        self.btn_log.pack()

        # State buttons
        ctrl = ttk.LabelFrame(main, text="🎮 State Control", padding=4)
        ctrl.pack(fill=tk.X, pady=4)

        states = [("💤 Idle", "idle", CYAN), ("🤔 Thinking", "thinking", YELLOW),
                  ("💻 Typing", "coding", GREEN), ("✅ Done", "done", GREEN),
                  ("⏳ Waiting", "permission", '#C8A000')]
        for txt, st, fg in states:
            tk.Button(ctrl, text=txt, command=lambda s=st: self._set_state(s),
                      bg='#2a2a2a', fg=fg, font=('Arial', 9), width=13,
                      activebackground='#444', activeforeground=fg, relief=tk.RAISED, bd=2
                     ).pack(side=tk.LEFT, padx=1)

        # Bottom
        bot = ttk.Frame(main)
        bot.pack(fill=tk.X, pady=6)
        self.demo_var = tk.BooleanVar(value=False)
        ttk.Checkbutton(bot, text="🔄 Auto Demo", variable=self.demo_var,
                        command=self._toggle_demo).pack(side=tk.LEFT)
        ttk.Button(bot, text="❌ Quit", command=self._quit).pack(side=tk.RIGHT)

        ttk.Label(main, text="SVG-accurate Clawd pixel crab — matches ESP32 firmware",
                  font=('Arial', 8), foreground='#666').pack()

    def _quit(self):
        self.anim_running = False
        self.root.quit()
        self.root.destroy()

    def run(self):
        self.root.update_idletasks()
        w, h = self.root.winfo_width(), self.root.winfo_height()
        x = (self.root.winfo_screenwidth() - w) // 2
        y = (self.root.winfo_screenheight() - h) // 2
        self.root.geometry(f'+{x}+{y}')
        self.root.mainloop()

def run_simulator():
    HardwareSimulator().run()

if __name__ == "__main__":
    run_simulator()</toolResult>

**Reading → Thinking transition (6 frames at 500ms each = 3 seconds):**

Frame 5 (tF=4): Body starts to sway (beginning of thinking)
Frame 6 (tF=5): Nearly in thinking pose, thought bubble starting to form

**Sleeping → Thinking transition (6 frames at 500ms each = 3 seconds):**
The crab was sleeping, now it needs to wake up and start thinking.

Frame 1 (tF=0): Eyes closed, Zzz still visible, body starts to straighten
Frame 2 (tF=1): Eyes partially open (half height), Zzz fading
Frame 3 (tF=2): Eyes fully open, body moving up
Frame 4 (tF=3): Full awake position, stretch (arms up briefly)
Frame 5 (tF=4): Arms back to normal, body starts to sway
Frame 6 (tF=5): Nearly in thinking pose

```python
def __init__(self):
    ...
    self.idle_start_time = None
    self.idle_sub = 0  # 0=normal, 1=reading, 2=sleeping
    self.trans_frames = 0  # transition frames remaining
    self.trans_from = 0  # which idle sub we're transitioning from

def _set_state(self, state):
    self.current_state = state
    self.anim_frame = 0
    if state == "idle":
        self.idle_start_time = time.time()
        self.idle_sub = 0
    elif state == "thinking":
        if self.idle_sub != 0:
            self.trans_frames = 4
            self.trans_from = self.idle_sub
        else:
            self.trans_frames = 0
    ...
```

For the _draw_idle in the simulator:
```python
def _draw_idle(self):
    # Check for sub-state transition after 60s
    if self.idle_sub == 0 and self.idle_start_time is not None:
        if time.time() - self.idle_start_time > 60:
            self.idle_sub = 1 if (int(time.time() * 10) % 2 == 0) else 2
            self.anim_frame = 0
    
    if self.idle_sub == 0:
        self._draw_idle_normal()
    elif self.idle_sub == 1:
        self._draw_reading()
    elif self.idle_sub == 2:
        self._draw_sleeping()

def _draw_idle_normal(self):
    f = self.anim_frame % 20
    self._clear()
    yO = 1 if (f % 6 < 3) else 0
    blink = (16 <= f % 20 <= 17)
    self._rect(71, 46, 18, 2, SHADOW)
    self._rect(71, 38, 2, 8, CC); self._rect(75, 38, 2, 8, CC)
    self._rect(83, 38, 2, 8, CC); self._rect(87, 38, 2, 8, CC)
    self._rect(69, 28+yO, 22, 14, CC)
    self._rect(65, 34+yO, 4, 4, CC); self._rect(91, 34+yO, 4, 4, CC)
    if not blink:
        self._rect(73, 32+yO, 2, 4, BLACK); self._rect(85, 32+yO, 2, 4, BLACK)
    self._text(5, 70, "idle", CYAN, 1)
    # No bubbles, no sound

def _draw_reading(self):
    f = self.anim_frame % 16
    self._clear()
    yO = 1 if (f % 8 < 4) else 0
    # Warm glow
    self._rect(55, 24, 50, 32, '#1A1208')
    # Shadow
    self._rect(69, 50, 22, 2, SHADOW)
    # Legs
    self._rect(71, 42, 2, 8, CC); self._rect(75, 42, 2, 8, CC)
    self._rect(83, 42, 2, 8, CC); self._rect(87, 42, 2, 8, CC)
    # Torso
    self._rect(69, 28+yO, 22, 14, CC)
    # Open book
    PG = '#F0E6D2'   # cream page
    CV = '#781E1E'    # dark red cover
    SP = '#5A1414'    # spine
    # Left page with cover
    self._rect(54, 36+yO, 15, 11, CV)
    self._rect(55, 37+yO, 13, 9, PG)
    # Right page with cover
    self._rect(91, 36+yO, 15, 11, CV)
    self._rect(92, 37+yO, 13, 9, PG)
    # Spine
    self._rect(69, 36+yO, 22, 11, SP)
    # Text lines (animated page turn)
    pgTurn = (f // 4) % 3
    TG = '#4CAF50'
    TB = '#40C4FF'
    TY = '#FFC107'
    # Left page text
    self._rect(57, 39+yO, 8, 1, TG); self._rect(57, 41+yo, 6, 1, TB); self._rect(57, 43+yO, 7, 1, TY)
    # Right page text
    self._rect(94, 39+yO, 8, 1, TB); self._rect(94, 41+yO, 6, 1, TG); self._rect(94, 43+yO, 7, 1, TY)
    # Page turn corner
    if pgTurn == 1: self._rect(66, 37+yO, 2, 3, PG)
    if pgTurn == 2: self._rect(92, 37+yO, 2, 3, PG)
    # Arms holding book
    self._rect(57, 38+yO, 4, 4, CC); self._rect(99, 38+yO, 4, 4, CC)
    # Eyes (mostly down, occasionally up)
    lookUp = (f % 16 == 8)
    if lookUp:
        self._rect(73, 32+yO, 2, 4, BLACK); self._rect(85, 32+yo, 2, 4, BLACK)
    else:
        self._rect(73, 33+yO, 2, 3, BLACK); self._rect(85, 33+yO, 2, 3, BLACK)
    # Reading light sparkle
    if f % 6 < 3:
        self._rect(80, 26+yO, 2, 2, '#FFFFC8')
    self._text(5, 70, "idle", CYAN, 1)

def _draw_sleeping(self):
    f = self.anim_frame % 20
    self._clear()
    yO = 1 if (f % 10 < 5) else 0
    # Night sky
    NC = '#0A0A23'
    self._rect(0, 0, 160, 25, NC)
    # Stars
    if f % 7 < 3: self._rect(20, 5, 1, 1, WHITE)
    if f % 11 < 4: self._rect(140, 8, 1, 1, WHITE)
    if f % 9 < 3: self._rect(45, 12, 1, 1, WHITE)
    if f % 13 < 4: self._rect(120, 3, 1, 1, WHITE)
    # Moon
    self._circle_fill(148, 8, 4, '#FFFFC8')
    self._circle_fill(150, 7, 3, NC)
    # Shadow
    self._rect(69, 48, 24, 2, SHADOW)
    # Legs
    self._rect(69, 40, 2, 8, CC); self._rect(73, 40, 2, 8, CC)
    self._rect(85, 40, 2, 8, CC); self._rect(89, 40, 2, 8, CC)
    # Torso (slumped 2px)
    self._rect(67, 30+yO, 26, 14, CC)
    # Arms (drooped)
    self._rect(63, 37+yO, 4, 4, CC); self._rect(93, 37+yO, 4, 4, CC)
    # Eyes closed
    self._rect(72, 35+yO, 3, 1, BLACK); self._rect(84, 35+yO, 3, 1, BLACK)
    # Zzz
    ZC = '#6495ED'
    zp = f % 15
    if zp >= 2:
        self._text(96, 24, "z", ZC, 1)
    if zp >= 5:
        self._text(102, 18, "z", ZC, 1)
    if zp >= 9:
        self._text(108, 12, "Z", ZC, 1)
    self._text(5, 70, "idle", CYAN, 1)
```

```python
def _circle_fill(self, cx, cy, r, color):
    sx, sy, sr = cx*SCALE, cy*SCALE, r*SCALE
    self.canvas.create_oval(sx-sr, sy-sr, sx+sr, sy+sr, fill=color, outline='')
```

```python
def _draw_thinking(self):
    if self.trans_frames > 0:
        self._draw_thinking_transition()
        self.trans_frames -= 1
        if self.trans_frames == 0:
            self.idle_sub = 0
            self.anim_frame = 0
        return
    
    # Normal thinking code...
    f = self.anim_frame % 12
    ...

def _draw_thinking_transition(self):
    tF = 4 - self.trans_frames  # 0-3
    self._clear()
    
    if self.trans_from == 1:
        # Reading → thinking: book slides down, crab looks up
        # Intermediate crab position
        xO = -tF  # gradually moving to thinking sway position
        ox = 65 + xO
        self._rect(ox+6, 46, 18, 2, SHADOW)
        self._rect(ox+6, 38, 2, 8, CC); self._rect(ox+10, 38, 2, 8, CC)
        self._rect(ox+18, 38, 2, 8, CC); self._rect(ox+22, 38, 2, 8, CC)
        self._rect(ox+4, 28, 22, 14, CC)
        self._rect(ox, 34, 4, 4, CC); self._rect(ox+26, 34, 4, 4, CC)
        # Eyes opening
        self._rect(ox+8, 32, 2, 3, BLACK); self._rect(ox+20, 32, 2, 3, BLACK)
        # Book sliding down
        if tF < 3:
            by = 36 + tF * 5
            if by < 55:
                self._rect(54, by, 15, 11, '#781E1E')
                self._rect(55, by+1, 13, 9, '#F0E6D2')
                self._rect(91, by, 15, 11, '#781E1E')
                self._rect(92, by+1, 13, 9, '#F0E6D2')
                self._rect(69, by, 22, 11, '#5A1414')
    
    elif self.trans_from == 2:
        # Sleeping → thinking: wake up, eyes open
        xO = -tF
        ox = 65 + xO
        self._rect(ox+6, 46, 18, 2, SHADOW)
        self._rect(ox+6, 38, 2, 8, CC); self._rect(ox+10, 38, 2, 8, CC)
        self._rect(ox+18, 38, 2, 8, CC); self._rect(ox+22, 38, 2, 8, CC)
        self._rect(ox+4, 28, 22, 14, CC)
        self._rect(ox, 34, 4, 4, CC); self._rect(ox+26, 34, 4, 4, CC)
        # Eyes progressively opening
        if tF >= 2:
            self._rect(ox+8, 32, 2, 3, BLACK); self._rect(ox+20, 32, 2, 3, BLACK)
        else:
            self._rect(ox+8, 34, 3, 1, BLACK); self._rect(ox+20, 34, 3, 1, BLACK)
    
    self._text(5, 70, "thinking", YELLOW, 1)
```

```
if(gState == 1) { gTrans = gIdleSub; } // set transition based on what we were doing in idle
if(gState == 3) { ... solenoid ... }
if(gState == 4) { ... solenoid ... }
```

Let me write the complete new idle custom_code for the ABS file:

```cpp
static unsigned long t=0;
if(millis()-t>300){
  t=millis();
  // Check if should transition to reading/sleeping
  if(gIdleSub==0 && millis()-gIdleT>60000){
    gIdleSub = random(2)+1; // 1=reading, 2=sleeping
  }
  
  if(gIdleSub==1){
    // === READING ===
    gFrm=(gFrm+1)%16;
    tft.fillScreen(0x0000);
    int yO=(gFrm%6<3)?0:1;
    uint16_t bk=tft.color565(120,70,40);   // book cover brown
    uint16_t pg=tft.color565(245,235,220);  // page cream
    uint16_t ln=tft.color565(60,60,60);     // text line gray
    // Shadow
    tft.fillRect(71,48,18,2,0x4208);
    // Legs (partially behind book)
    tft.fillRect(71,40,2,4,CC); tft.fillRect(75,40,2,4,CC);
    tft.fillRect(83,40,2,4,CC); tft.fillRect(87,40,2,4,CC);
    // Book cover
    tft.fillRect(66,44,28,6,bk);
    // Pages
    tft.fillRect(68,45,24,4,pg);
    // Spine
    tft.fillRect(79,44,2,6,tft.color565(80,50,25));
    // Text lines on pages
    tft.fillRect(70,46,7,1,ln); tft.fillRect(70,48,5,1,ln);
    tft.fillRect(82,46,8,1,ln); tft.fillRect(82,48,6,1,ln);
    // Page turn animation
    if(gFrm%8>=6){
      tft.fillRect(80,40,10,4,pg);
      tft.fillRect(80,40,1,4,bk);
    }
    // Torso
    tft.fillRect(69,28+yO,22,14,CC);
    // Arms holding book (lower)
    tft.fillRect(65,40,4,4,CC); tft.fillRect(91,40,4,4,CC);
    // Eyes squinting (focused)
    tft.fillRect(73,33+yO,2,2,0); tft.fillRect(85,33+yO,2,2,0);
    // Label
    tft.setTextSize(1); tft.setTextColor(0xFFE0); tft.setCursor(5,70); tft.print("reading");
  }
  else if(gIdleSub==2){
    // === SLEEPING ===
    gFrm=(gFrm+1)%16;
    tft.fillScreen(0x0000);
    int yO=(gFrm%8<4)?0:1; // slower breathing
    int slp=2; // slump offset
    // Shadow
    tft.fillRect(71,48,18,2,0x4208);
    // Legs (lower due to slump)
    tft.fillRect(71,40+slp,2,6,CC); tft.fillRect(75,40+slp,2,6,CC);
    tft.fillRect(83,40+slp,2,6,CC); tft.fillRect(87,40+slp,2,6,CC);
    // Torso (slumped)
    tft.fillRect(69,28+slp+yO,22,14,CC);
    // Arms (relaxed at sides)
    tft.fillRect(65,36+slp+yO,4,4,CC); tft.fillRect(91,36+slp+yO,4,4,CC);
    // Eyes closed (horizontal lines)
    tft.fillRect(73,33+slp+yO,2,1,0); tft.fillRect(85,33+slp+yO,2,1,0);
    // Zzz floating
    int zp=gFrm%8;
    uint16_t zzc=tft.color565(100,180,255); // light blue zzz
    if(zp>=2) { tft.setTextSize(1); tft.setTextColor(zzc); tft.setCursor(95,24-zp); tft.print("z"); }
    if(zp>=4) { tft.setTextSize(1); tft.setTextColor(zzc); tft.setCursor(100,18-zp); tft.print("z"); }
    if(zp>=6) { tft.setTextSize(1); tft.setTextColor(zzc); tft.setCursor(105,12-zp); tft.print("Z"); }
    // Blanket
    uint16_t bl=tft.color565(80,100,180);
    tft.fillRect(67,38+slp,26,3,bl);
    // Label
    tft.setTextSize(1); tft.setTextColor(0x04DF); tft.setCursor(5,70); tft.print("zzz");
  }
  else {
    // === NORMAL IDLE (silent) ===
    gFrm=(gFrm+1)%20;
    tft.fillScreen(0x0000);
    int yO=(gFrm%6<3)?0:1;
    bool blink=(gFrm%20>=16 && gFrm%20<=17);
    tft.fillRect(71,46,18,2,0x4208);
    tft.fillRect(71,38,2,8,CC); tft.fillRect(75,38,2,8,CC);
    tft.fillRect(83,38,2,8,CC); tft.fillRect(87,38,2,8,CC);
    tft.fillRect(69,28+yO,22,14,CC);
    tft.fillRect(65,34+yO,4,4,CC); tft.fillRect(91,34+yO,4,4,CC);
    if(!blink){tft.fillRect(73,32+yO,2,4,0); tft.fillRect(85,32+yO,2,4,0);}
    if(gFrm%10==0){tft.drawCircle(95,28,3,0x04DF); tft.drawCircle(95,28,1,0x04DF);}
    tft.setTextSize(1); tft.setTextColor(0x04DF); tft.setCursor(5,70); tft.print("idle");
    // NO sound - silent idle
  }
}
```

```cpp
if(gTrans==1 && gFrm<6){
  // Close book transition
  tft.fillScreen(0x0000);
  if(gFrm<3){
    // Still holding book, closing it
    uint16_t bk=tft.color565(120,70,40);
    uint16_t pg=tft.color565(245,235,220);
    // Crab body
    tft.fillRect(69,28,22,14,CC);
    tft.fillRect(73,33,2,2,0); tft.fillRect(85,33,2,2,0); // eyes
    // Book closing
    tft.fillRect(67,42-gFrm,26,4,bk);
    tft.fillRect(69,43-gFrm,22,2,pg); // pages getting smaller
    // Arms
    tft.fillRect(65,38-gFrm,4,4,CC); tft.fillRect(91,38-gFrm,4,4,CC);
  } else {
    // Book gone, arms moving up, starting to think
    int prog=gFrm-3; // 0,1,2
    int xO=prog-1; // -1,0,1 slight tilt beginning
    int ox=65+xO;
    tft.fillRect(ox+4,28,22,14,CC);
    tft.fillRect(ox+8,32,2,3,0); tft.fillRect(ox+20,32,2,3,0);
    tft.fillRect(ox,34-prog,4,4,CC); tft.fillRect(ox+26,34,4,4,CC);
  }
}
```

```cpp
if(gTrans==1 && gFrm<6){
  tft.fillScreen(0x0000);
  int p=gFrm;
  if(p<2){
    // Book closing
    tft.fillRect(69,28,22,14,CC); // torso
    tft.fillRect(73,33,2,2,0); tft.fillRect(85,33,2,0); // eyes squinting
    // Book getting smaller
    uint16_t bk=tft.color565(120,70,40);
    uint16_t pg=tft.color565(245,235,220);

      tft.fillRect(68,44,24,max(0,bh-2),pg);
    }
    // Arms still down
    tft.fillRect(65,40,4,4,CC); tft.fillRect(91,40,4,4,CC);
    // Legs
    tft.fillRect(71,40,2,4,CC); tft.fillRect(75,40,2,4,CC);
    tft.fillRect(83,40,2,4,CC); tft.fillRect(87,40,2,4,CC);
    tft.fillRect(71,46,18,2,0x4208); // shadow
  } else {
    // Book gone, transitioning to thinking pose
    int prog=p-2; // 0,1,2
    int xO=(prog-1)*2; // -2,0,2 tilt
    int ox=65+xO;
    tft.fillRect(ox+6,46,18,2,0x4208);
    tft.fillRect(ox+6,38,2,8,CC); tft.fillRect(ox+10,38,2,8,CC);
    tft.fillRect(ox+18,38,2,8,CC); tft.fillRect(ox+22,38,2,8,CC);
    tft.fillRect(ox+4,28,22,14,CC);
    int armOff=prog>0?-2:0;
    tft.fillRect(ox,34+armOff,4,4,CC); tft.fillRect(ox+26,34,4,4,CC);
    // Eyes opening
    int eh=min(4, 2+prog);
    tft.fillRect(ox+8,34-eh/2,2,eh,0); tft.fillRect(ox+20,34-eh/2,2,eh,0);
  }
}
```

For replacement 3 (new _draw_idle), the function is about 20 lines. The new version will be much longer with three sub-states. Let me write it.

```python
def _draw_idle(self):
    # Check for sub-state transition
    if self.idle_sub == 0 and self.idle_start > 0:
        if time.time() - self.idle_start > IDLE_TIMEOUT:
            import random
            self.idle_sub = random.choice([1, 2])
    
    if self.idle_sub == 1:
        self._draw_reading()
    elif self.idle_sub == 2:
        self._draw_sleeping()
    else:
        self._draw_idle_normal()

def _draw_idle_normal(self):
    f = self.anim_frame % 20
    self._clear()
    yO = 1 if (f % 6 < 3) else 0
    blink = (16 <= f % 20 <= 17)
    self._rect(71, 46, 18, 2, SHADOW)
    self._rect(71, 38, 2, 8, CC); self._rect(75, 38, 2, 8, CC)
    self._rect(83, 38, 2, 8, CC); self._rect(87, 38, 2, 8, CC)
    self._rect(69, 28+yO, 22, 14, CC)
    self._rect(65, 34+yO, 4, 4, CC); self._rect(91, 34+yO, 4, 4, CC)
    if not blink:
        self._rect(73, 32+yO, 2, 4, BLACK); self._rect(85, 32+yO, 2, 4, BLACK)
    if f % 10 == 0:
        self._circle(95, 28, 3, CYAN); self._circle(95, 28, 1, CYAN)
    self._text(5, 70, "idle", CYAN, 1)
    # Silent - no sound

def _draw_reading(self):
    f = self.anim_frame % 16
    self._clear()
    yO = 1 if (f % 6 < 3) else 0
    # Shadow
    self._rect(71, 46, 18, 2, SHADOW)
    # Legs (partially behind book)
    self._rect(71, 40, 2, 4, CC); self._rect(75, 40, 2, 4, CC)
    self._rect(83, 40, 2, 4, CC); self._rect(87, 40, 2, 4, CC)
    # Book cover
    self._rect(64, 43, 32, 6, BOOK_CV)
    # Pages
    self._rect(66, 44, 12, 4, BOOK_PG); self._rect(82, 44, 12, 4, BOOK_PG)
    # Spine
    self._rect(78, 43, 4, 6, BOOK_DK)
    # Text lines
    self._rect(68, 45, 8, 1, BOOK_LN); self._rect(68, 47, 6, 1, BOOK_LN)
    self._rect(84, 45, 8, 1, BOOK_LN); self._rect(84, 47, 6, 1, BOOK_LN)
    # Page turn
    if f % 8 == 4 or f % 8 == 5:
        self._rect(82, 40, 10, 3, BOOK_PG)
    # Torso
    self._rect(69, 28+yO, 22, 14, CC)
    # Arms holding book
    self._rect(65, 40, 4, 4, CC); self._rect(91, 40, 4, 4, CC)
    # Eyes squinting (focused)
    self._rect(73, 33+yO, 2, 2, BLACK); self._rect(85, 33+yO, 2, 2, BLACK)
    self._text(5, 70, "reading", YELLOW, 1)

def _draw_sleeping(self):
    f = self.anim_frame % 16
    self._clear()
    yO = 1 if (f % 8 < 4) else 0
    s = 2  # slump offset
    # Shadow
    self._rect(71, 48, 18, 2, SHADOW)
    # Legs
    self._rect(71, 40+s, 2, 6, CC); self._rect(75, 40+s, 2, 6, CC)
    self._rect(83, 40+s, 2, 6, CC); self._rect(87, 40+s, 2, 6, CC)
    # Blanket
    self._rect(67, 38+s, 26, 4, BLANKET)
    self._rect(69, 39+s, 22, 1, BLANK2)
    self._rect(69, 41+s, 22, 1, BLANK2)
    # Torso (slumped)
    self._rect(69, 28+s+yO, 22, 14, CC)
    # Arms (relaxed)
    self._rect(65, 36+s+yO, 4, 4, CC); self._rect(91, 36+s+yO, 4, 4, CC)
    # Eyes closed (lines)
    self._rect(73, 33+s+yO, 2, 1, BLACK); self._rect(85, 33+s+yO, 2, 1, BLACK)
    # Zzz floating
    zp = f % 10
    if zp < 8:
        self._text(95, 25-zp, "z", ZZZ_C, 1)
    if zp >= 2 and zp < 9:
        self._text(101, 19-zp, "z", ZZZ_C, 1)
    if zp >= 4:
        self._text(107, 13-zp, "Z", ZZZ_C, 1)
    self._text(5, 70, "zzz", CYAN, 1)
```

```python
def _draw_transition(self):
    f = self.trans_frame
    self._clear()
    if self.trans_type == 1:
        # Put down book
        if f < 3:
            # Closing book
            self._rect(71, 46, 18, 2, SHADOW)
            self._rect(71, 40, 2, 4, CC); self._rect(75, 40, 2, 4, CC)
            self._rect(83, 40, 2, 4, CC); self._rect(87, 40, 2, 4, CC)
            self._rect(69, 28, 22, 14, CC)
            self._rect(65, 40-f, 4, 4, CC); self._rect(91, 40-f, 4, 4, CC)
            self._rect(73, 33, 2, 2, BLACK); self._rect(85, 33, 2, 2, BLACK)

            self._rect(ox, 34-prog, 4, 4, CC); self._rect(ox+26, 34, 4, 4, CC)
            eh = min(3, 1 + prog)
            self._rect(ox+8, 33, 2, eh, BLACK); self._rect(ox+20, 33, 2, eh, BLACK)
    elif self.trans_type == 2:
        # Wake up
        slump = max(0, 2 - f)

        self._rect(69, 28+slump, 22, 14, CC)
        self._rect(65, 34+slump, 4, 4, CC); self._rect(91, 34+slump, 4, 4, CC)
        if f < 2:

        else:

        if f < 2:

    self.trans_frame += 1
    if self.trans_frame >= 6:
        self.trans_type = 0
        self.trans_frame = 0
        self.anim_frame = 0
```

```python
def _set_state(self, state):
```

```c
static unsigned long t=0;
int dl = (gIdleSt==0) ? 300 : (gIdleSt==1) ? 500 : 600;

  t=millis();
  gFrm=(gFrm+1)%40;

  }

    int yO=(gFrm%6<3)?0:1;

  }

    uint16_t bPage = 0xFFFF; // white
```

RGB565 format: RRRRR GGGGGG BBBBB
0x8410 = 1000 0100 0001 0000 binary = 10000 100000 10000
R = 10000 = 16, G = 100000 = 32, B = 10000 = 16
RGB = (16*8, 32*4, 16*8) = (128, 128, 128) → gray. That's fine for "sleeping".

Wait, that doesn't seem right. Let me recalculate:
0x8410 in binary: 1000 0100 0001 0000
Split into RGB565:
R[15:11] = 10000 = 16
G[10:5]  = 100000 = 32  
B[4:0]   = 10000 = 16

To 8-bit: R = 16*255/31 ≈ 132, G = 32*255/63 ≈ 130, B = 16*255/31 ≈ 132
So it's a medium gray. Good, that works.

```python
def _draw_idle(self):
    # Check timeout
    if self.idle_sub == 0:
        if time.time() - self.idle_start_time > IDLE_TIMEOUT:
            self.idle_sub = random.choice([1, 2])

        ...
    else:
        # Sleeping
        f = self.anim_frame % 20  # or idle_anim_frame
        ...
```

Since the delay changes based on idle_sub (300ms, 500ms, 600ms), the anim_frame will advance at different speeds. For normal idle: 20 frames * 300ms = 6s per cycle. For reading: 20 frames * 500ms = 10s per cycle. For sleeping: 20 frames * 600ms = 12s per cycle. These are reasonable.
